title: HR & Talent Operations Manager (Remote – Full Time)
description:
About TAG

The Allicock Group (TAG) is a growing workforce solutions company that provides staffing, recruiting, and professional development services to schools and organizations across the United States.

We specialize in placing high-quality professionals including teachers, therapists, counselors, and education specialists.

Our company is expanding and we are building a stronger HR and recruiting infrastructure to support our growth.

We are looking for a highly organized and proactive HR & Talent Operations Manager to oversee recruiting pipelines, onboarding processes, HR documentation, and operational workflows.

This role will replace multiple part-time support roles and will serve as the central coordinator for TAG’s HR and recruiting operations.



About the Role

This is not a basic admin job.

We are looking for someone who can take ownership of HR operations, manage recruiting workflows, and ensure that hiring and onboarding processes run smoothly.

You will work directly with company leadership and help build systems that support a growing staffing organization.

The ideal candidate is organized, proactive, comfortable managing multiple tasks, and able to solve problems independently.

Key Responsibilities



Recruitment & Candidate Pipeline

• Source candidates through job boards and professional networks

• Review resumes and screen candidates for qualifications

• Conduct initial candidate interviews

• Schedule final interviews with leadership

• Maintain organized candidate pipelines

• Track recruitment metrics and hiring progress



Hiring & Onboarding

• Send offer letters and contracts to new hires

• Coordinate onboarding documentation

• Ensure candidates complete required forms and credentials

• Provide onboarding instructions and first-day information

• Track onboarding progress for new staff



HR Administration

• Maintain employee and contractor files

• Organize HR documentation and compliance records

• Maintain HR policies and process documentation

• Assist leadership with HR reports and data tracking



Systems & Workflow Management

• Manage HR systems and recruitment tracking tools

• Maintain candidate databases

• Track hiring progress and staff documentation

• Help develop SOPs for HR processes



Communication

• Serve as the primary HR contact for candidates and staff

• Respond to HR and recruiting inquiries

• Maintain clear and professional communication with applicants and tea
mbers



Key Metrics for Success

• Qualified candidates sourced each month

• Speed of interview scheduling and hiring processes

• Accuracy of HR records and documentation

• Successful onboarding of new staff



Requirements



Experience

• 3+ years experience in HR, recruiting, or talent operations

• Experience managing recruiting pipelines

• Experience interviewing candidates



Skills

• Strong organizational skills

• Excellent written and verbal communication

• Ability to manage multiple priorities independently

• High attention to detail



Technical Skills

• Google Workspace

• HR or recruiting systems (ATS or HRIS)

• Job boards such as Indeed or LinkedIn



Preferred

• Experience working with U.S. companies

• Experience in staffing or recruiting agencies

• Experience managing remote teams



Work Style We Value

• Proactive problem solving

• High accountability

• Strong communication

• Ability to work independently

• Commitment to professional standards



Please submit a short video introduction explaining your HR or recruiting experience.

title: Client Coach (Giving Feedback): $1,100 USD START RATE
description:
Start rate: $935 a month + performance-based bonuses (TOTAL: $1,100 a month)



Paid every two weeks via Wise.



ABOUT US







Young Publisher is an international digital marketing company working with content creators and online brands.



BENEFITS



- Full-time position: 8 hours daily, Monday-Friday; 40 hours a week

- Flexible schedule: Choose your own hours, as long as you show up for the daily meeting (MANDATORY)

- Stable income: Long-term role with regular, on-time payments

- Supportive team: Collaborative environment without micromanagement

- Growth path: Opportunities to increase responsibilities and earnings

- 100% remote: Work-from-home setup



TASKS



Client Support (maintaining 40-50 total clients):



- Run kickoff calls with new clients using our proven script

- Review client content and give actionable feedback

- Answer client messages within 24 hours

- Host weekly group calls and 1-on-1 coaching sessions

- Help clients overcome content blocks and limiting beliefs



Progress Tracking:



- Update daily/weekly reports

- Track client progress and next steps

- Join daily team check-ins

- Ensure clients follow strategies consistently



REQUIREMENTS (MUST-HAVE)



- C1+ English (written and spoken) with no accent

- Strong communication skills

- Organized and detail-oriented

- Reliable internet and a quiet workspace

- Accountability mindset and deadline commitment



IMPORTANT



When recording a Loom video as part of your application:



- Camera must show your FACE & SCREEN

- Treat it as a LIVE interview with the Hiring Manager

- Have a professional background

- Have clear audio

- Wear business-casual attire



BONUS SKILLS (NOT REQUIRED)



- Content creation and social media experience

- Knowledge of Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts

- Regular usage of AI tools (ChatGPT, CapCut)



WHY JOIN US?



- Start rate: $935 a month + performance-based bonuses (TOTAL: $1,100 a month)

Note: More experienced CSMs earn between $1,800 and $2,500 after 6-12 months.

- Performance bonuses: Up to $900+ additional monthly based on:

- Client retention rates

- Task completion metrics

- Quality of feedback

- Team collaboration

- Payments: Twice per month via Wise directly to your bank

- Tools access: We'll cover all the needed tools

- Work-life balance: No graveyard shifts

- Professional growth: Regular feedback and skill development



HOW TO APPLY



1: Message us on OnlineJobs.ph with "CSM" as the message title



2: Include ONLY the following in your message:



#1: Your CV.

#2: Your years of experience with short-form content.

#3: Your years of experience with client management.

#4: One sentence on why you're a good fit for this role.

#5: Your portfolio.



Note: Messages that do not follow this format will NOT be reviewed.



P.S. Young Publisher is the recruitment company. Successful candidates will work under Social Influence Consulting LLC.

title: Customer Service Representative
description:
Good Guy Plumbing is a fast-growing residential plumbing company based in Southern California. We are known for our 5-star service, strong team culture, and commitment to excellence. 



We are looking for a high-performing Customer Service Representative (CSR) to be the first point of contact for our customers. This role is responsible for converting inbound calls into booked appointments, supporting dispatch, maintaining accurate records, and delivering an exceptional customer experience. As part of our hiring process, we value attention to detail — applicants who carefully read this posting and include the words Hydro Jetting in their
 subject line will be prioritized for review.



This is a performance-driven, long-term position with growth potential.



Business Hours: 7:00 AM – 6:00 PM PST (California, USA)



Qualifications: 

- At least 3 years of customer service or call center experience

- Strong phone communication and objection-handling skills

- Experience converting inbound and outbound calls into appointments

- Comfortable working with KPIs and performance targets

- Experience using CRM or service software 

- Excellent English communication (verbal & written)

- Highly organized and detail-oriented

- Reliable internet, extra monitor and quiet workspace

- Home services experience is a plus, but not required.



Please submit:

- Your CV

- 2-3 minute video introduction

   - Brief self-introduction

- What was your average booking rate in your previous role?

- How do you handle an upset customer?

- Why should we hire you for this position?

title: Real Estate Media Quality Control Specialist (Photo & Video)
description:
We're a real estate media company based in Texas, USA. We create professional listing photos, videos, and 3D tours that help real estate agents market their listings and win more business.



We are looking for an experienced Quality Control Specialist to review and polish our media before delivery to clients.



Your role is to make sure every photo, video, and 3D tour meets our quality standards.



Responsibilities:



Media Quality Control:

Review listing photos and videos before delivery

Ensure media meets HomeCapture quality standards

Identify issues and provide feedback to editors



Photo Editing:

Perform light edits when needed (color correction, retouching)

Maintain consistent color, exposure, and perspective



Matterport / 3D Tours:

Create highlight reels for Matterport tours

Review tours for accuracy and flow



Editing Coordination:

Select images for Day-to-Evening edits and Virtual Staging

Provide clear instructions to editors



Team Support:

Help maintain editing consistency across the team

Provide feedback when quality issues appear



Workflow Support:

Monitor HubSpot and OpenPhone for editing requests

Work with our team to improve editing workflows



Tools We Use:

Adobe Lightroom

Adobe Photoshop

Matterport

Aryeo

Dropbox

Airtable

WhatsApp



Experience with real estate photo editing is strongly preferred.



Work Schedule:



Two schedule options:



Option 1 (Preferred)

Monday – Saturday

8:00 AM – 2:00 PM

US Central Time

36 hours per week



Option 2

Tuesday – Saturday

8:00 AM – 2:00 PM

US Central Time

30 hours per week



Requirements:



We are looking for someone who:

Has experience editing real estate photos

Has quality control / QA experience

Is extremely detail-oriented

Can communicate clearly with editors

Is organized and reliable



How to Apply:



Please include the following in your application:



1. Portfolio / Sample Work



Send examples of real estate photos you have edited.



2. Previous Experience



Briefly describe your experience with:



- real estate photo editing



- quality control or QA



- working with editing teams



3. 5-Minute Video Introduction



Record a short video (max 5 minutes) answering:

Tell us about your experience with real estate photo editing

What are the most common mistakes you see in real estate photos?

How do you maintain consistent editing quality?



Upload the video using Google Drive or Loom.



Important:

Start your application with the phrase “Matterport Ready” so we know you read the full job description.



We are looking for someone who cares about quality, detail, and consistency. If you have experience in real estate media editing and quality control, we would love to hear from you.

title: Appointment setter
description:
Remote Position



We are a growing construction and remodeling company looking for a professional and reliable Appointment Setter to manage inbound and outbound leads and schedule qualified appointments for our sales team.



This position is fully remote and requires someone organized, confident on the phone, and comfortable speaking with homeowners.



This role is not just answering calls — you must be able to convert leads into scheduled appointments.



?



Working Hours



Monday – Saturday

8:00 AM – 6:00 PM

Pacific Time



?



Responsibilities



• Contact inbound leads quickly after they submit their request

• Perform outbound calls and follow-ups to leads in the CRM

• Call and text homeowners to schedule appointments

• Convert incoming leads into booked appointments

• Handle client objections professionally

• Follow up with leads who did not schedule

• Track leads and update reports using Google Sheets

?

• Experience handling sales conversations and objections

• Strong follow-up and persuasion skills

• Experience working with Google Sheets for tracking and reporting

• Organized and detail-oriented

• Professional attitude and reliability



?



Equipment & Technical Requirements (Mandatory)



Because this role requires constant communication with leads and clients, the candidate must have a stable and professional work setup.



Required equipment:



• High-speed stable internet connection (minimum recommended 50 Mbps)

• Backup internet connection (secondary WiFi or mobile hotspot)

• Backup power solution in case of short electrical outages (UPS battery or similar)

• Professional noise-canceling headset with microphone

• Quiet working environment with no background noise

• Laptop or desktop computer capable of running GoHighLevel smoothly

• Webcam required for meetings



Applicants without reliable internet, backup connection, or professional equipment will not be considered.



?



Performance Expectations



This role is performance-based.



Expected KPIs:



• Contact new leads as quickly as possible (target under 5 minutes)

• Consistent outbound follow-ups with leads

• Book 10–20 qualified appointments per week depending on lead volume

• Provide a daily summary report of calls, follow-ups, and appointments scheduled

• Maintain lead tracking and reporting in Google Sheets



?



Application Screening Task (Required)



To apply, please submit a video or voice recording demonstrating how you would handle a new inbound lead.



Applications without this recording will not be considered.



Scenario



A homeowner submitted a request online for a remodeling estimate.



Your goal is to call the lead and convert the conversation into a scheduled appointment.



In your recording please demonstrate



• How you open the conversation when calling the lead

• How you build rapport and trust

• How you guide the conversation toward scheduling an appointment

• How you handle client objections



Client Objections



During the conversation the homeowner says:

 1. “I’m just looking for a rough price right now.”

 2. “I’m still talking to a few other contractors.”

 3. “You are really far away fro
. I don’t think that will work.”

 4. “Can you call me tomorrow to schedule?”



Please demonstrate how you would respond to these objections and still try to secure an appointment.



Recording length: 3–5 minutes

title: Short-Form Video Editor
description:
About the Role

We're looking for a creative and culturally plugged-in Short-Form Video Editor to join our team. You'll be the driving force behind our TikTok and Instagram Reels presence — transforming raw content into scroll-stopping, trend-forward videos that resonate with our global community of women aged 18–35. If you live on TikTok, genuinely get internet culture, and have a sharp eye for what makes people stop and watch, we want to hear from you.



Key Responsibilities

• Edit and produce engaging short-form videos for TikTok and Instagram Reels from existing content libraries, raw footage, and brand assets

• Stay ahead of TikTok and Instagram trends — identifying viral formats, sounds, and 
nts before they peak

• Select and integrate trending audio, including viral sounds, music, and provide voiceover scripts that align with each video's tone and target audience

• Write and overlay on-screen text, captions, and copy that feel native to the platform — referencing current pop culture, 
s, and trending language relevant to women aged 18–35 worldwide

• Create platform-specific edits optimised for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and paid social ads (with format, aspect ratio, and pacing adapted accordingly)

• Repurpose existing content across multiple platforms, adapting style and format for each audience

• Collaborate with the content and marketing teams to align video output with campaign goals, product launches, and brand voice

• Manage a consistent publishing pipeline, turning around high-quality edits quickly and efficiently

• Monitor video performance metrics and apply insights to continuously improve content



What We're Looking For

Must-Haves

• 1–3+ years of experience editing short-form video content professionally or with a strong portfolio

• Deep, genuine knowledge of TikTok culture — you use it daily and understand how the algorithm, trends, and communities work

• Strong instinct for sound selection: you know which audio is trending, when to use music vs. a viral sound, and how audio drives engagement

• Ability to write punchy, culturally relevant on-screen text that connects with a diverse global audience of women aged 18–35

• Proficiency in video editing software (CapCut, Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, or similar)

• Fast turnaround capability — able to produce multiple quality edits per day when needed

• Strong understanding of aspect ratios, safe zones, and technical specs for TikTok and Instagram Reels

Nice-to-Haves

• Experience editing paid social ads (Meta/TikTok ad formats)

• Background in content creation, social media management, or influencer marketing

• Familiarity with analytics platforms (TikTok Analytics, Meta Insights) and ability to translate data into creative decisions

• Motion graphics or basic animation skills

• Experience working with fashion, beauty, lifestyle, or consumer brands targeting women



Who You Are

• You genuinely love internet culture — you're the first to notice a new trend, 
, or audio going viral

• You understand and respect the nuance of speaking to a global female audience across different cultures, backgrounds, and experiences

• You're a self-starter who can manage your own time and content queue with minimal hand-holding

• You care about the details — pacing, transitions, font choices, and caption timing all matter to you

• You're collaborative, open to feedback, and excited to be part of a team building something meaningful



What We Offer

• A creative, supportive team that values your ideas and input

• The opportunity to shape the social media voice of a fast-growing brand



How to Apply

Please send your CV, a short cover note telling us why you're the right fit, and a portfolio or link to examples of short-form video content you've edited. We'd love to see work that demonstrates your understanding of trends, sound selection, and on-screen text — bonus points if it's made us want to watch it twice.

title: Graphic Designer for Facebook & Instagram Ads
description:
We are in need of a Graphic Designer who is creative, excellent at Canva, reliable, works with consistent quality–and last but not least, you’re decent at writing and willing to learn our AI-powered method for creating client ad copy too. 



*Please read through this entire job post before applying. I don't want you to waste your Apply Points.



Your two most important responsibilities will be to: 

1. Design graphics for clients'
 & Instagram Ads in Canva. 



2. Produce clients’
 & Instagram ad copy using our ai-powered system. (We’d rather train a phenomenal graphic designer how to write ad copy. Because design skills are really hard to train.) 



The expectation is that you'll produce lots of
 & Instagram graphics and ad copy that wows our clients without them requesting revisions. 



You must be super good at designing graphics that stand out and stop the scroll, getting people to then read the ad copy that you write for our clients. You need to be able to use a client’s sales page, opt-in page, brand guide and their photos and our ad copy system to design Meta ads graphics and write ad copy that make an impact. 





This role is a blend of:

• Graphic Designer (primary skill)

• Ad Copy Writer (secondary skill that we’re willing to train)







The Art of Online Business is looking to add a trustworthy, committed person to the team ASAP. You do not need to be a great copywriter. But you DO need to be super good with Canva graphic design, organized, proactive, and able to follow directions with strong attention to detail.

 

  

This is a fully remote part-time role requiring 10 - 15 hours per week. Pay is $8 - $9 USD/hour depending on experience. Approximate working hours are USA MDT time zone: 9:00am - 12:00pm with one 15-minute break. 



You will time off for all national and special Philippine holidays. Once you prove that you can independently handle the role’s responsibilities with accuracy, we can discuss working different hours, like during your daytime for example.



There will be a two-month trial period on a graduated pay scale meaning you will start at $7 - $8/hour DOE, receive an additional $0.50/hour increase each month and be able to receive full pay once you successfully complete your probationary period.



You will work with the video editor, Admin VA and the CEO. Do you love to collaborate and work well with other tea
mbers while serving as the key to getting results for clients? 







Do you continue a task until it’s done well? Does it bother you if your ad graphics aren’t performing well? Do you love to collaborate and work well with others? Are you ok with repetitive tasks that help the business delight its clients with solid results? 

 

If so please read through the entire job announcement before applying.



We’re an online small business that specializes in
 & Instagram ads management for course creators whose businesses already work. 



About The Owner of The Art of Online Business:

Kwadwo (pronounced QUAY. jo) is the host of The Art of Online Business podcast, with over 5 million downloads. He helps course creators whose businesses already work and who are the primary earners in their household to confidently use
 and Instagram ads to grow revenue and support their families.



A former teacher and course creator himself, Kwadwo brings more than five years of ad management experience and a decade of teaching clarity to simplify complex marketing decisions. His clients, many earning $250k–$1.2M annually, rely on him to run profitable launches, optimize funnels, and remove the stress of figuring out ads alone.



Originally from the U.S., Kwadwo spent 12 years living in China before moving to central Mexico with his wife and two kids. He speaks fluent Mandarin Chinese and conversational Spanish, and believes the best businesses are built not just to scale, but to create freedom for the people behind them.





Some of his values and thus the business’s values are: positivity, motivation, humor, enthusiasm, creativity, international travel, inspiration, respect, community and accountability.

 







The Graphic Designer is generally responsible for: 



1. Creating clients' ad graphics

• Setting up clients’ brand kits in Canva

• Designing as many on-brand graphics as it takes to get ad results for the client

• Following modern design standards





2. Creating clients' ad copy

• Following our AI-powered process to create ad copy and headlines







3. Coordinating with the CEO and/or Ad Manager in Asana







4. Maintaining SOPs related to the Graphic Designer’s role and areas of responsibility

• Creating, maintaining and updating SOPs



 

 

Basically, you’re an integral part of the team’s weekly operations, and your role is fundamental to continuing the growth of our business.







Requirements:

• Skilled Graphic Designer with experience in designing ad graphics

• Strong English written skills, C1 on the CEFR framework

• Work efficiently on responsibilities all by yourself or with little assistance (we will provide the initial training surrounding your role)

• Complete tasks with excellence 

• Finish tasks on or before assigned deadlines

• Be detail-oriented and super organized

• A resourceful problem solver

• Tech savvy + Google search literate (meaning you know your way around technology and can learn new things by Googling or watching YouTube videos.)





**Although you will receive training, you should already know your way around the following without instructions: 

– Designing graphics and using Canva.

– Using graphic design principles to make visually appealing graphics

– Look at clients’ brand guides, websites, landing pages and social media to make graphics that fit with their brand.  











Our Tech Stack:

Since you will need to work efficiently on assigned tasks all by yourself or with little assistance, ideally you will have working knowledge of a few products in our tech stack. If not, we will use screen recordings, an onboarding document and Zoom calls to explain what needs to be done and how to do it.

 

However you MUST be willing to use Google and YouTube to learn the software required for your job. Your professional development is important to the success of the business, and we will purchase courses for you when needed. 

 

You need to be able to use our complete tech stack proficiently within your first five weeks of working with us.

• Google Drive, Google Docs, Google Sheets, Google Forms

• Asana (project management)

• ChatGPT

• Slack

• Calendly

• Canva (design)

• Zoom

• Gmail

• LastPass 







Of the qualified applicants, we will prioritize those that have more familiarity with our tech stack. 



If you don’t receive a response from us, that means we chose not to pursue employment at this time. 









How to Apply:

If your interest is piqued, please reply to this job post and do the following; 

1. Include only your favorite ice cream flavor and the name of who placed third in the 2004 Olympics men's 100m butterfly event in the subject line. 

2. Respond with how many dollars in ad spend Kwadwo has managed & a tip that Miss Brazil shared on Kwadwo’s Chinese YouTube channel.

3. Read to see how clients can work with [QUAY. jo] on 
.

4. Include a screenshot of your 4-letter personality type and results from 

5. List which software in our tech stack you already know how to use and your approximate proficiency with it on a scale of 1 - 10.

6. Do not send a resume.

7. Tell us whether or not you already have a day job.

8. Let us know how many hours you are available to work each week, for example 15, 25 or 30.

9. Your application will be disqualified if you
 us directly, fill out the Meta ads intake form on the website, write a subject line resembling anything like ‘I’m your next rockstar’ or if you follow or DM Kwadwo on social media.



Please, only apply if you are very good at graphic design and you are beyond organized. You must have at least 2 years of graphic design work experience. 



We are looking to bring you on board and want you to be a part of our dynamic, very small but fun team. You’ll be a central and integral part of our small team and we’re looking for you to grow with us!



We will consider applicants who are able to successfully fulfill the nine criteria above. 

Thank you for taking the time to apply.

title: Content Creator Team - Social Media, Videography & Editing
description:
Content Creator Team – Social Media, Videography & Editing



Location: Manila, Philippines (Hybrid – Office + Travel + Remote)



We are building a creative media team in Manila to launch and grow an exciting new YouTube channel focused on showcasing the Philippines in a fresh, authentic, and engaging way to a global audience.



Our mission is to capture the culture, people, food, landscapes, and hidden gems of the Philippines through cinematic storytelling, social media content, and high-quality video production.



We are looking for passionate, creative, and reliable professionals who love storytelling, social media, and travel.



This team will begin working in Manila and eventually travel across the Philippines to produce content.



?



Positions We Are Hiring



Social Media Manager / Content Strategist



Responsibilities

• Manage YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, and other social platforms

• Plan and schedule content calendars

• Optimize titles, thumbnails, and SEO for YouTube growth

• Monitor analytics and audience engagement

• Work closely with the production team to turn filmed content into viral social media posts

• Ability to work both independently and with a creative team



?

Requirements

• Must be comfortable traveling



?



Video Editor / Post-Production Specialist



Responsibilities

?



What We’re Looking For



• Creative thinkers who love storytelling

• Passion for travel and exploring the Philippines

• Team players who are reliable and motivated

• People who want to help build a fast-growing media brand

• Comfortable working in both office and remote environments

?



Work Environment



• Based in Manila

• Hybrid work (office + remote)

• Collaborative and creative team environment



?



Why Join Us



• Be part of building a new global YouTube channel

• Travel to amazing locations around the Philippines

• Work with a creative team passionate about storytelling

• Opportunity to grow with a fast-expanding media brand



?



How to Apply



Please send the following:

• A short introduction about why you want to help showcase the Philippines to the world



?



If you are passionate about storytelling, social media, and travel, we would love to hear from you.

title: Marketing Coordinator (Full-time remote work, earn up to USD 1,600)
description:
Background



The Reliability Academy delivers world-class online training and coaching to clients and students across the globe. To date, we have helped 100+ companies, and trained 2000+ industry professionals, across 50+ countries in all major industries. Founded in 2018, we are headquartered in Brisbane, Australia but work virtually with most of our team based in the Philippines.



Please note this role is advertised as based in the Philippines but we are open to applications for people anywhere in the world.



About Us



Our customers are in all parts of the world, from individuals to large multinational companies. We have big plans and are working to deliver our online training in 8-10 different languages to better serve our customers. We believe in being a force for good and that means:



- building a great company with a strong focus on our values and behaviors. We are building a small, but mighty team that truly enjoys working together and delivers a world-class product and experience to our customers.

- serving our niche to the best of our ability and reaching those less fortunate than us. To that purpose, we have launched the Reliability Academy Scholarship Program enabling students in developing nations to access our training with a 75% Scholarship

- aligning our company mission and vision to the United Nations Sustainable Development Goals



The company is growing with a small team of full-time and part-time contractors working across the Asia-Pacific region, currently all reporting to the General Manager, also based in the Philippines whilst our Managing Director is based in Brisbane, Australia. We deliberately hire talent in different regions of the world to keep costs down, create diversity, and build a multi-lingual team.



Role Purpose 



The Marketing Coordinator is responsible for driving online sales growth through B2C marketing initiatives, with a focus on optimizing existing systems, improving conversion performance, and ensuring every campaign contributes directly to revenue. 



This role will oversee the Affiliate Program, manage lead segmentation using RightMessage, and conduct a full audit and optimization of HubSpot
 sequences—including welcome and nurture workflows—to ensure maximum engagement and conversion. 



The Marketing Coordinator will also manage and monitor paid campaigns to drive online course sales and continually refine strategies based on data and performance insights. 



Responsibilities  



As Marketing Coordinator your initial responsibilities will consist of: 



Demand Generation and Strategy 



-Develop and execute marketing strategies aligned with company goals, focusing on driving online B2C conversions. 

-Plan and manage marketing campaigns, PPC campaigns primarily for B2C (Google Ads, LinkedIn Ads,
 Ads)

-Continuously monitor, test, and tweak campaigns to optimize results and maximize performance.

-Use RightMessage to manage lead segmentation, ensuring the right message reaches the right audience (B2B and B2C). Monitor performance, refine targeting, and adjust settings as needed by leveraging analytics / insights from Segmetrics. 



Affiliate Program Management 



-Oversee and manage the company’s Affiliate Program using TrackDesk.

-Test and validate system functionality, ensuring affiliates are properly tracked and rewarded.

-Monitor affiliate performance, identify top-performing partners, and develop strategies to drive participation and conversions. 



 Marketing and Automation 



-Review, audit, and optimize
 sequences and workflows within HubSpot, including welcome sequences and nurturing campaigns. 

-Identify opportunities to improve engagement and conversion rates. 

-Make recommendations for adjustments and implement approved changes. 

-Ensure marketing automation and workflows support the company’s inbound marketing and lead nurturing goals. 



Marketing Analytics and HubSpot Management 



-Develop and maintain a marketing performance dashboard to track key metrics, such as lead volume, conversion rates, and website traffic. 

-Integrate and manage HubSpot, cold
 systems, and campaign tracking tools for marketing automation, lead tracking, and reporting. 

-Analyze performance data to optimize campaigns and recommend improvements. 

-Report on marketing activities and outcomes to the General Manager and Managing Director. 





What Success Looks Like 



Succeeding in this role will mean the Marketing Team establishes a steadily growing flow of online course sales, supported by consistent brand visibility and engagement across all channels.  



Success will be measured by the following metrics: 



-Affiliate Program is fully operational and generating measurable conversions. 

-RightMessage segmentation is active and optimized for effective lead targeting. 

-HubSpot workflows and sequences are running efficiently and driving engagement and sales. 

-LinkedIn page is active with regular, relevant posts that maintain engagement and brand trust. 

-Paid campaigns on Google, LinkedIn, and
 achieve an average 
 of 3x or higher. 

-Overall marketing performance shows measurable improvement in lead quality, conversion rates, and ROI. 

 



About You 



Knowledge and skills are important, but we will primarily hire based on attitude and behavior. We are looking for someone who: 



-Is self-motivated and proactive with a positive attitude and a great work ethic. 

-Takes ownership of their work and is results-driven, constantly seeking to improve and optimize. 

-Communicates clearly and effectively, both with internal teams and external stakeholders. 

-Has a deep understanding of inbound marketing strategies and can balance creativity with data-driven decisions. 

-Enjoys working remotely and thrives in a remote, collaborative environment and is comfortable managing a distributed, diverse team.   

-Is passionate about inbound marketing and embraces data-driven decision-making. 



Your Skills 



Your knowledge, skills and experience: 



-Proven experience in inbound and outbound marketing, and demand generation. 

-Strong digital marketing skills: PPC ads (Google, LinkedIn,
), SEO, outbound (cold
 / LinkedIn outreach) 

-Experience managing marketing performance metrics and reporting on results. 

-Experience with HubSpot Marketing Solution is a requirement; Candidates with experience on Segmetrics, RightMessage and TrackDesk (or similar tools) will be given stronger consideration. 

-Experience in PPC campaign management (Google Ads, LinkedIn Ads,
 Ads). 

-Excellent organizational and project management skills. 

-Excellent copywriting and proof-reading skills.  

-You are fluent in English with excellent written and verbal communication skills. Your written English is clear, concise, and accurate. 

-A sound understanding / experience with automation tools and AI (LLMs, agents) would be a bonus, as would experience in leading/managing/coordinating a team 



What’s on Offer



This is a long-term virtual role allowing you to work from home. You will work during Australian business hours i.e. your workday will fall between 7 am to 7 pm GMT+10 to ensure overlap with the rest of the team (who are based in the Philippines). There will be a 3-month probation period.



Base pay between USD 1,000 and USD 1,600 per month depending on experience and skills, with a 13th-month pay in December, 20 days of paid leave, an annual allowance of USD 1,000 towards Private Health Insurance and a chance to earn a performance bonus up to 3 months of salary (subject to business and personal performance).



Applying



If you are interested, please complete the online application (see link below) summarizing your background, experience, and what makes you an excellent candidate for the role. Tell us about yourself, your skills, and why you’re interested in working with us.



Application form: 



This is an important requirement for Reliability Academy, and we would love to have someone on seat as soon as possible, but we will take our time to find the right candidate. That means we will be shortlisting and interviewing soon after this job post has gone live and will continue until we find the right candidate. Therefore, this job could stay open for several weeks or close quickly



Please note, that if you do not apply via the above application form your application will not be considered. We appreciate people who pay attention to detail so please mention the words “Green Banana” when we ask about your aspirations in life.

title: Accounts Manager (Part-time remote work, earn up to USD 600)
description:
Background



The Reliability Academy delivers world-class online training and coaching to clients and students across the globe. To date, we have helped 100+ companies, and trained 2000+ industry professionals, across 50+ countries in all major industries. Founded in 2018, we are headquartered in Brisbane, Australia but work virtually with most of our team based in the Philippines.



Please note this role is advertised as based in the Philippines but we are open to applications for people anywhere in the world.



About Us



Our customers are in all parts of the world, from individuals to large multinational companies. We have big plans and are working to deliver our online training in 8-10 different languages to better serve our customers. We believe in being a force for good and that means:



- building a great company with a strong focus on our values and behaviours. We are building a small, but mighty team that truly enjoys working together and delivers a world-class product and experience to our customers.

- serving our niche to the best of our ability and reaching those less fortunate than us. To that purpose, we have launched the Reliability Academy Scholarship Program enabling students in developing nations to access our training with a 75% Scholarship

- aligning our company mission and vision to the United Nations Sustainable Development Goals



The company is growing with a small team of full-time and part-time contractors working across the Asia-Pacific region, currently all reporting to the General Manager, also based in the Philippines whilst our Managing Director is based in Brisbane, Australia. We deliberately hire talent in different regions of the world to keep costs down, create diversity, and build a multi-lingual team.



Role Purpose 



This role is a part-time (50%), virtual role responsible for executing and coordinating the financial processes within the company including bookkeeping, running financial reports, issuing invoices, managing accounts receivable and supporting our Australia-based external company accountants. 



Responsibilities  



As Accounts Manager your responsibilities will consist of: 



-Conducting bookkeeping in XERO, ensuring all transactions for the month are reconciled by the 5th of the following month. You will also set up rules to increase efficiency and identify other opportunities to improve our use of XERO. 

-Obtaining receipts from
 for inclusion in XERO (via Missive). 

-Managing our invoicing process, from the timely and efficient issue of our invoices to our customers to ensuring invoices are paid on time. 

-Managing payroll for employees and overseeing contractor payments via Wise. 

-Supporting BAS and IAS reporting (as directed by our Australia based accountants) 

-Running monthly financial reports (P&L, cashflow) and analysing and presenting these to company leadership. 

-Running quarterly expense analysis reports, analysing these, and presenting your recommendations to optimise ongoing costs.    

-Running quarterly revenue analysis reports, identifying which products, countries, industry sectors generate the most revenue and show the most revenue growth. 



What Success Looks Like 



Succeeding in this role will mean that the company leadership has access to up-to-date company financials at all times, and are supported by in-depth, insightful analysis and recommendations to improve company finances and financial processes. 



The success of this role will be measured by the following metrics: 



-Monthly reconciliations are complete by the 5th of the following month 

-Monthly & Quarterly Financial Reports issued on time 

-Invoices are issued within 3 days of being marked ready-to-invoice in the Client-to-Cash process flow  

-90% of invoice value is paid within 60 days of PO receipt 

-<5% of total invoice value is overdue 

-Number of cost improvement opportunities identified 

 



About You 



Knowledge and skills are important, but we will primarily hire based on attitude and behaviour, which means: 



-You are honest, reliable, and have a great attitude to work. You do what you say and say what you do. 

-You are highly organised, pay attention to detail, get things right the first time most of the time, but are not afraid to make a mistake and take responsibility. 

-You take initiative, can work with relatively little supervision and can manage a large diverse workload with competing priorities. You speak up when you don’t know something or don’t understand, but are proactive enough to then go and find out and learn. 

-You can work well on your own, but enjoy being part of a (virtual) team. You have no problem receiving feedback from others and acting on it. 

-You are keen to take on extra responsibilities where you can (after all you are a talented individual!) but at the same time you are happy to do simple, more administrative work where required. 

-Ultimately you are the kind of individual who can make things happen and is excited by being part of a bigger vision. 





Your Skills 



Your knowledge, skills and experience: 



-Accounting Graduate 

-Xero certified advisor 

-At least 5 years of demonstrable experience with AU accounting including GST, BAS etc. 

-Proficient with online tools, platforms, and associated integrations including Stripe, HubSpot, LivePlan 

-You have the headroom and desire to grow into a more substantial financial role within the company (subject to company success and growth)  

-You are fluent in English and especially your written English is clear, concise, and accurate.     



 What’s on Offer



This is a long-term virtual role allowing you to work from home. You will work during Australian business hours i.e. your workday will fall between 7 am to 7 pm GMT+10 to ensure overlap with the rest of the team (who are based in the Philippines). There will be a 3-month probation period.



Base pay between USD 500 and USD 600 per month depending on experience and skills, with a 13th-month pay in December, 10 days of paid leave, an annual allowance of USD 500 towards Private Health Insurance and a chance to earn a performance bonus up to 3 months of salary (subject to business and personal performance).



Applying



If you are interested, please complete the online application (see link below) summarizing your background, experience, and what makes you an excellent candidate for the role. Tell us about yourself, your skills, and why you’re interested in working with us.



Application form: 



This is an important requirement for Reliability Academy, and we would love to have someone on seat as soon as possible, but we will take our time to find the right candidate. That means we will be shortlisting and interviewing soon after this job post has gone live and will continue until we find the right candidate. Therefore, this job could stay open for several weeks or close quickly



Please note, that if you do not apply via the above application form your application will not be considered. We appreciate people who pay attention to detail so please mention the words “Golden Apple” when we ask about your aspirations in life.

title: Full-Time Virtual Assistant — Architecture & Construction Company (US Hours)
description:
IMPORTANT: To confirm you have read this entire post, please begin your application with the words: "I build with intention." Applications that do not start with this phrase will not be reviewed.

 

---

 

We are a US-based company operating two businesses — an architecture practice (Drams Architects) and a general contracting company (Drams Construction). We are looking for a sharp, reliable, and proactive Virtual Assistant to become our right hand in day-to-day operations.

 

This is a full-time remote position, Monday through Friday, 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM Pacific Time (that's 12:00 AM – 8:00 AM Philippine Time — graveyard shift). You must be comfortable and set up for night-shift work.

 

 

WHAT YOU'LL DO

 

• Answer incoming phone calls via Google Voice and take messages or route calls

• Follow up on Accounts Receivable — call clients about unpaid invoices

• Follow up on Accounts Payable — coordinate with vendors on payments and documentation

• Prepare and send proposals, contracts, and project documents

• Manage calendar, schedule meetings, and send reminders

• Track deadlines, permits, and project milestones

• Organize files in Google Drive and keep everything tidy

• Draft and send
s on behalf of the team

• Light bookkeeping support in QuickBooks (categorizing, logging receipts)

• General admin tasks as needed — research, data entry, follow-ups

 

 

WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

 

• Excellent spoken English — you will be making and receiving calls with US clients, vendors, and government offices. Clear, confident, professional phone presence is a must.

• Strong written English — you will draft
s, proposals, and client-facing documents.

• Proactive and organized — you don't wait to be told what to do. You see what needs to happen and you make it happen.

• Experience with architecture or construction companies is a strong plus — you understand project timelines, permits, contractors, and client relationships.

• Comfortable with Google Workspace (Gmail, Drive, Calendar, Docs) and QuickBooks.

• 
 experience — we use 
 for internal team communication.

• Reliable internet connection with a backup plan. You need a quiet workspace for phone calls.

 

 

WORK SCHEDULE

 

• Monday – Friday, 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM Pacific Time

• This is 12:00 AM – 8:00 AM Philippine Time (graveyard shift)

• Full 8-hour shift, must be online and responsive the entire time

 

 

COMPENSATION

 

• $4.00 USD per hour

• Paid via Wise

• Long-term position — we are looking for someone who wants to grow with us

 

 

HOW TO APPLY

 

Your application MUST include all three of the following or it will be skipped:

 

1. Start your application with: "I build with intention."

 

2. Your resume with relevant experience highlighted.

 

3. A 2–3 minute Loom video recording where you introduce yourself and tell us how you can help Drams Architects and Drams Construction. We want to hear your English, see your personality, and understand why you're a good fit.

 

   Guidelines for the Loom recording:

   • Be relaxed and natural — do NOT read from a script

   • Turn on your camera — we want to see you

   • Tell us about yourself and your relevant experience

   • Explain specifically how you would help an architecture and construction company

   • Keep it to 2–3 minutes

 

We review every Loom video personally. A great recording goes a long way.

title: Senior Product Designer (UX/UI) – SaaS Platform
description:
We are seeking a Senior Product Designer (UX/UI) to lead the design and user experience of a growing SaaS platform used by service-based businesses to manage projects, documents, estimates, teams, vendors, and analytics.



This role is responsible for product discovery, UX architecture, and high-quality Figma design execution. The designer will work closely with product leadership, developers, and stakeholders to transform complex workflows into intuitive and scalable user experiences.



The ideal candidate has experience designing multi-module SaaS platforms, operational dashboards, and workflow-driven applications.



Responsibilities

- Product Discovery

- Conduct stakeholder interviews to understand business workflows and product requirements

- Translate stakeholder input into clear product requirements and UX flows

- Identify usability challenges and propose improved product workflows

- Create user journey maps and workflow diagrams



UX Architecture

- Design the information architecture of the platform across multiple modules

- Define consistent navigation patterns, component systems, and interaction models

- Improve existing workflows to reduce friction and improve efficiency

- Ensure design consistency across all areas of the product



UX/UI Design



- Create wireframes, mockups, and high-fidelity designs in Figma

- Build reusable design systems and component libraries

- Design responsive layouts for web applications

- Create interactive Figma prototypes for stakeholder validation



Collaboration

- Work directly with product leadership and engineering teams

- Translate UX designs into clear developer-ready specifications

- Support developers during implementation to ensure designs are executed correctly

- Iterate designs based on feedback and product testing



Continuous Improvement



- Evaluate existing UI/UX and propose improvements

- Ensure platform usability and clarity as the product grows

- Help maintain long-term design consistency across modules



Required Skills



UX / Product Design

- 5+ years experience designing SaaS or complex web applications

- Strong understanding of workflow-based product design

- Experience designing dashboard-based platforms



Figma Expertise



- Expert-level proficiency with Figma

- Experience creating design systems and reusable components

- Ability to produce developer-ready design specifications



Product Thinking

- Ability to translate business requirements into clear UX solutions

- Experience conducting stakeholder interviews and product discovery

- Understanding of user journeys, wireframes, and interaction flows



Collaboration



- Comfortable working with developers in an Agile or sprint-based environment

- Experience working alongside product managers and engineers

- Strong communication and documentation skills



Preferred Experience



- Experience designing operations platforms or workflow management tools

- Experience designing multi-module SaaS products

- Experience designing analytics dashboards

- Understanding of modern web application architecture



Tools



- Figma (Required)

- FigJam or Miro (Preferred)

- Jira / Asana (Preferred)



Ideal Candidate



The ideal candidate is someone who can take a partially built product and redesign it into a polished, scalable SaaS experience, helping shape the product architecture and improve usability across the platform.

title: B2C Media Buyer (Facebook Ads Manager)
description:

We not only guarantee the best results for our clients, but we also prioritize building a one-of-a-kind working experience for our team. We are 100% remote, and we encourage our employees to work from anywhere in the world.



We have a strong company culture that focuses on innovation, personal development, leadership, and cultivating a winning environment. We believe that our company is most productive when our employees are fulfilled, challenged, and working to achieve both their personal and professional goals, while constantly striving for their own personal next level.

In today’s world taking initiative is a critical component of success. Therefore, we encourage tea
mbers to take initiative in the direction that they see fit so that they can learn valuable lessons along the way and contribute to relevant team goals. We don’t micromanage and we encourage an environment of responsibility and leadership.

title: PR & Affiliate Outreach Coordinator (Part-Time)
description:
Note: Include your Resume and answer the questions on the last part.



Job Title: PR & Affiliate Outreach Coordinator (Part-Time)

Location: Remote (PH, LATAM, or Eastern Europe preferred)

 Hours: ~20 hours per week

 Compensation: $200 bi-weekly

 Reports To: Affiliate Marketing Lead



Role Overview

We are seeking a highly organized and proactive PR & Affiliate Outreach Coordinator to support our Affiliate Marketing Lead in building and maintaining meaningful relationships with creators, media contacts, editors, and affiliate partners.

This role goes beyond administrative support. The ideal candidate will help expand our brand’s visibility through strategic outreach, media relationship management, and creator partnerships. You will play a key role in researching potential partners, initiating outreach, maintaining communication with editors and creators, and keeping partnership pipelines organized and moving forward.

If you enjoy relationship-building, communication, influencer and media research, and working at the intersection of PR, affiliate marketing, and creator partnerships, this role is a great opportunity to gain hands-on experience in modern brand outreach.



Key Responsibilities

Media & Creator Outreach

Research and identify relevant media editors, journalists, creators, influencers, and affiliate partners who align with the brand.

 and social platforms to potential partners.

Maintain updated partnership pipelines and affiliate databases.

Support reporting and insights related to outreach performance.

Maintain outreach templates and communication workflows.

Help prepare lists for upcoming campaigns and launches.

Suggest improvements to outreach systems and processes.





Qualifications

Experience communicating with media editors, journalists, creators, or influencers

Excellent written English and professional communication skills

Strong organizational and research skills

Comfortable sending outreach
s, DMs, and follow-ups

Detail-oriented with strong follow-through

Ability to manage multiple outreach conversations simultaneously

Media or editorial outreach experience is a strong plus





Tools & Platforms

Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Drive)

Microsoft Teams

Impact (affiliate platform) — strong plus

Slack

ChatGPT (for drafting outreach messages)



Social platforms including TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube





Ideal Candidate

Strong communicator who enjoys building professional relationships

Organized and detail-oriented with excellent follow-up habits



Interested in PR, media outreach, and influencer partnerships

Comfortable working independently in a remote environment

Curious about social media trends, creators, and digital marketing

Able to balance outreach strategy with operational organization



Answer:

title: Experienced Funnel Builder – Funnelish (Dropshipping)
description:
We are a fast-growing e-commerce company with multiple stores in the health & beauty niche. We are looking for an experienced Funnel Builder who specializes in Funnelish and HTML5 to build, optimize, and scale high-converting funnels.



This role is performance-focused. You will work with proven structures, competitor references, and clear briefings. Speed, accuracy, and conversion thinking are essential.



Responsibilities:



- Build complete Funnelish funnels (advertorial, sales page, checkout in Shopify, upsells via Shopify apps)

- Rebuild and adapt competitor funnels into our own branded versions

- Implement and customize HTML5 / CSS elements for layout, animations, and responsiveness

- Optimize funnels for mobile-first performance and fast loading

- Ensure correct tracking, links, and flow logic

- Apply feedback and iterate quickly on existing funnels



Requirements:



- Proven experience with Funnelish (required)

- Strong knowledge of HTML5 & basic CSS

- Experience building advertorial-style funnels

- Image/GIF/video editing skills (for small adjustments)

- Understanding of conversion optimization and performance marketing

- Able to work fast, structured, and follow instructions exactly

- Available for ongoing work and long-term collaboration



Nice to Have:



- Experience in health / beauty e-commerce

- Familiar with Meta Ads funnel structures

- Experience with A/B testing or CRO improvements



Payment & Terms:



- Paid per funnel (fixed price)

- Performance-based bonuses are available for funnels that meet or exceed agreed targets

- Ongoing and daily work

- One day off on Sunday

- Clear briefings, templates, and examples provided



How to Apply



Please include:

- Examples of Funnelish funnels you have built

- Your experience with HTML5

- Only apply if you have real Funnelish experience.



We work with templates but you'll need to create the first 2 funnels from scratch.

title: AI Software Developer (Back Office Automation & Contract Mediation Platform)
description:
Job Title:

AI Software Developer (Back Office Automation & Contract Mediation Platform)

Company Overview:

The Allicock Group (TAG) is a U.S.-based, minority-owned innovation firm driving technology solutions that empower small and diverse-owned businesses.

Our new division, TAGSolutions, is developing Back Office Boss — an AI-driven SaaS platform that automates the toughest back-office work for entrepreneurs: contracts, HR, compliance, invoicing, and mediation support.

We believe that minority and women-owned businesses deserve access to enterprise-level automation — and we’re building the platform to make it happen.

Job Description:

We’re hiring an AI Software Developer to help build the foundation of our Back Office Boss platform.

You’ll work directly with our U.S.-based CEO and creative team to develop automation workflows, document analyzers, and smart dashboards that simplify everyday business operations.

Responsibilities:

Develop AI-driven features for:

Contract review and analysis

HR document compliance and onboarding automation

Invoice and reporting automation

Mediation and conflict-resolution guidance

Integrate APIs (OpenAI, Azure Cognitive Services, or similar) to process text and generate professional business documents.

Design and deploy secure, scalable backend workflows (Python, Node.js, or no-code platforms like n8n).

Work with GoHighLevel, Airtable, or other CRMs for automation and dashboard integration.

Follow agile milestones and version control (GitHub).

Communicate clearly with project leads and deliver updates on time.

Required Skills:

Strong experience with Python or Node.js backend development

Working knowledge of OpenAI API or similar large language model integrations

Familiarity with automation platforms (n8n, Make, Zapier, or custom APIs)

Comfortable with REST APIs, webhooks, and cloud deployment (AWS, Render, or DigitalOcean)

Solid English communication and documentation skills

Problem-solving mindset and ability to work independently

Preferred / Bonus Skills:

Experience developing SaaS applications

Background or interest in small business operations, contracts, or HR workflows

Familiarity with GoHighLevel CRM and automation builder

Understanding of data privacy and compliance principles (GDPR, HIPAA, etc.)

UI/UX basics (React, Tailwind, or HTML/CSS)

Work Arrangement:

Remote / Work-from-home

Full-time or Part-time (minimum 25–40 hours/week)

Must overlap at least 3 hours with U.S. Eastern Time for communication

Weekly check-ins via Zoom or Slack

Compensation:

?70,000–?120,000 PHP per month (? $1,200–$2,100 USD/month), depending on skill and experience

Performance bonuses for milestone completion

13th-month pay and paid holidays after 6-month probation

Long-term, stable role with potential for profit-sharing or leadership position

How to Apply:

Please include the following:

Resume or portfolio (GitHub, personal projects, or SaaS samples)

Short cover letter or 1-minute video intro — tell us why you’re excited about using AI to empower minority businesses.

Your expected monthly rate and earliest start date

Answer this short question: “What’s one example of a business process you’ve successfully automated, and how did it save time?”

Subject line for your application:

“AI Developer – Back Office Boss – [Your Name]”

description:
About Leda

We make LEDA, a learning experience platform that makes leadership development easy! We use expert interviews, animations, games, self-assessments and practical activities to turn managers into better leaders.

We work with CEOs and People & Culture leaders across Australia and APAC to help them develop the many people in their organisations. Our mission? Better organisations, by making it easy for companies to develop their established and emerging leaders. High quality and fun leadership development for all!

We're a small, profitable startup based in Melbourne. We like to laugh and have fun. And yes - you'll get leadership training too.



The Role

We're looking for an experienced graphic designer to join our small but growing team.

You'll be creating proposals, case studies, blog graphics, and ads - extending our existing brand and assets, not starting from scratch. We have a style guide and templates. We need someone who can run with them and make us look great.



What You'll Be Doing: Working with our draft copy on...

Creating case studies and customer stories

Blog post graphics and featured images

Ad creatives for LinkedIn, Google, etc.

Extending and maintaining our existing brand assets





About You



You have a sharp eye for layout, typography, and clean design

You work fast without sacrificing quality

You can follow a style guide and make it sing

You're reliable, communicative, and meet deadlines

You take feedback well and iterate quickly





Skills You'll Need



3+ years experience as a graphic designer

Strong portfolio showing B2B / SaaS / professional work (not just social media templates)

Proficient in Figma and/or Canva (others ok if you have your own licenses)

Ability to work from existing brand guidelines

Clear English communication





Hours & Pay

Schedule:



Part-time: 15 hours/week

Flexible hours, but some overlap with AEST business hours preferred

Path to more hours for the right person



Compensation:



$9–11 USD/hour depending on experience



Technical Requirements:



Your own computer with design software

Stable internet connection

Ability to work in Figma and Canva





Why You'll Love Working With Us



Clear briefs and existing assets — no guessing what we want

Direct access to founders — no layers of approval

Variety of work — proposals, case studies, ads, blogs

We give feedback, not vague "make it pop" nonsense

We like to laugh and have fun

Leadership training included!





How to Apply

Click "Apply" and we'll send you our short screening process.

You'll need to share:



Your portfolio (with time taken to create each piece)

2 references from past clients or employers



Thank you for your time and interest!

Team Leda

title: AI Native Full Stack Developer - CRM Platform Build + Agency Projects (German-Speaking a Plus)
description:
About This Role

I'm Kenji, founder of a Germany-based web agency. I build websites, handle SEO, run Google Ads, and deliver design work for small-to-medium businesses. I've recently taken on a larger contract: building and maintaining a modular B2B CRM and lead-management platform for the automotive industry.

I'm looking for one strong developer to co-build this with me. You won't be handed tasks and left alone, we'll be working side by side in the codebase, architecting together, and shipping together. I'm technical, I build with AI coding agents daily, and I need someone who can match that pace and push the project forward independently when needed.

This is a long-term engagement. You'll work full-time during the active build phase, then transition to ~20 hours/month for ongoing maintenance, updates, and feature additions.



The CRM Project (Primary Focus)

You'll be the one of the developers building a modular web application (PWA) for car dealerships. The platform covers the full lifecycle of vehicle acquisition, lead management, and sales operations.

Core Modules

1. Online Acquisition Station (Customer-Facing)

Guided multi-step flow: vehicle data entry ? photo uploads (structured slots) ? contact info ? automatic confirmation + case number. Leads feed directly into the CRM.

2. Team Inbox & Lead Management

Shared inbox where all open leads are visible. Claim-to-lock system (one owner per lead, others can comment). Close with win/loss reason for clean KPI tracking.

3. Automations & Task Engine

Auto-generated tasks on new leads (e.g., "contact within 60 min"). Escalation rules: 24h inactivity ? warning, 48h ? lead returns to queue. Admin-configurable rule engine.

4. Dashboards & Reporting

User view: own leads, overdue follow-ups, appointments. Admin view: unhandled leads >24h, team workload, funnel metrics, close rates.

5. Listing Generator

Smart checklist for vehicle features ? auto-generated ad copy in multiple formats (premium, social, WhatsApp-short). Copy-button export for MVP, API sync later.

6. Document Generation

Auto-generated PDF templates (offers, reservations, draft contracts) with internal approval workflow. Clearly marked as drafts until finalized.

Future Phases (Add-ons)



Chat-based UI guide — button-driven flows for customers and internal team, with upgrade path to voice/video avatar

WhatsApp Business API integration

Outlook/M365 calendar sync via Microsoft Graph

DAT/VIN vehicle data lookup

Virtual test drive (walkaround video + live video scheduling)

Multi-location & role-based access



Tech Stack



Frontend: React / Next.js

Backend/DB: Supabase (or similar BaaS)

AI tooling: You'll be expected to use Claude Code, Codex, or similar agentic coding tools as your primary development workflow





What We're Looking For

Must-Have



Strong full-stack development skills — React/Next.js or other frontend, Supabase or similar backend, comfortable with APIs and integrations

Deep experience with AI coding agents — You don't just "use ChatGPT sometimes." You architect solutions with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, or equivalent. You understand prompt engineering at a systems level, you know when to trust the agent and when to override it, and you can debug agent-generated code efficiently

Systems-level thinking — You can take a set of business requirements (like the modules above) and break them into clean architecture, data models, and implementation steps without being told how

Strong problem-solving ability — You've solved hard technical problems before, and you can describe exactly how

Clear English communication — Written and spoken

Reliable setup — Fast internet, good laptop, professional working environment

CET overlap — At least 4 hours of overlap with Central European Time for sync



Strong Signals We Value



You've built something ambitious on your own (app, tool, automation system, SaaS)

You've taught yourself hard skills without formal instruction

You've won or placed in competitions (programming, math, robotics, etc.)

You have personal projects that show depth (home lab, custom tooling, open-source contributions)

You've done freelance or contract work above what's typical for your experience level

You can explain complex technical decisions clearly and concisely



Big Plus: German Language Skills

Our clients and end-users are in the German market. If you speak or understand German, even at a conversational level, that's a significant advantage. It means you can read client requirements, understand product context, and potentially interact with stakeholders directly. Not a hard requirement, but it will put you ahead of other candidates.



Nice-to-Have



Experience with PWA development

Familiarity with automotive or dealership workflows

Git/GitHub proficiency

UI/UX sensibility — can make things look good, not just work





Work Structure



Build Phase: Full-time (~40 hours/week) until the platform is live and stable

Maintenance Phase: ~20 hours/month for updates, bug fixes, feature additions, and support

Additional agency work available between or alongside CRM phases





Compensation



60,000–100,000 PHP/month (depending on skill level) during the full-time build phase

Maintenance-phase compensation adjusted proportionally to hours

Performance-based increases as the engagement grows

Paid trial period to ensure mutual fit





How to Apply

Subject line: CRM Developer - AI-Native Full-Stack

kishiharahandel [at] gm ail com

In your application, include:

1. About You

Name, age, location, current work situation.

2. Proof of Ability

Share 2–3 concrete examples that demonstrate your capability. These could be:



A project you built end-to-end (what, why, how, and what was hard)

A technical problem you solved that required deep thinking

A skill you learned independently



Be specific. "I built websites" tells us nothing. "I built a real-time inventory sync between Shopify and a custom warehouse dashboard using Supabase edge functions and webhooks" tells us everything.

3. Your Hardest Technical Problem

In 5–10 sentences: What is the hardest technical problem you've ever solved? Walk us through your exact approach, including at least one specific technical detail.

4. Your AI Workflow

Describe how you currently use AI coding tools in your development process. Which tools, how you prompt them, what you trust them for, and where you don't.

5. Portfolio / Proof of Work

Links to anything you've built: GitHub repos, live sites, tools, automations, screenshots, videos, documentation. Non-technical achievements that show discipline and ability are also welcome.





This role requires someone who can think independently, solve novel problems, and build production-quality systems with modern AI-assisted workflows. If that describes you and this post excited you rather than intimidated you, we'd like to hear from you.

title: Full-Time Real Estate Bookkeeping Assistant (Long-Term | Direct Hire)
description:
I am hiring a full-time bookkeeping assistant with real bookkeeping experience and real-estate accounting knowledge to support ongoing bookkeeping for multiple entities and properties.



You will be supporting a U.S.-based bookkeeping and operations firm that primarily serves real estate businesses, including rental and investing entities.



This is NOT a general VA role.

This is a bookkeeping role for someone who already understands how real-estate transactions should be treated in accounting (rentals, short-term rentals, and/or real-estate investing). If your experience is only training/certifications (and not real client work), please do not apply.



You do not need to know my exact software yet.

I am willing to train the right person on systems.



What I am not willing to train is basic bookkeeping or real-estate accounting concepts.



Primary Responsibilities

- Recording and categorizing real-estate transactions in QuickBooks Online (QBO)

- Supporting bookkeeping for:

  - long-term rentals (LTR)

  - short-term rentals (STR)

  - and real-estate investing activities

- Reconciling bank and credit card accounts

- Property-level and entity-level bookkeeping

- Preparing transactions for review and month-end close

- Assisting with real-estate closing and settlement entries (training provided)

- Working across multiple entities and properties



Required Experience (Non-Negotiable)



Please do NOT apply unless you meet all of the following:

- Real bookkeeping experience (not data entry and not administrative work)

- Real-estate bookkeeping experience or real-estate accounting knowledge, such as:

  - rental bookkeeping (LTR, STR, and/or MTR), and/or

  - real-estate investing or deal accounting

- QuickBooks Online (QBO) experience is required

- Strong understanding of how to properly categorize real-estate transactions

- Comfortable working with multiple properties and multiple entities



Preferred (Not Required – I Can Train)

- Experience with property management or real-estate software such as:

  - Buildium

  - AppFolio

  - REI Hub

  - or similar platforms

- Property management bookkeeping experience

- Experience supporting multiple properties or portfolios

Specific software experience is a preference, not a requirement.



Schedule & Availability

- Full-time role

 -Must be available to work either:

  - 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM EST, or

  - 10:00 AM – 6:00 PM EST

This is intended to be a long-term position



Compensation

- $4–$5 per hour during the first 6 months of onboarding and training

- Pay review after the initial training period based on performance and responsibility

- Paid consistently

- Long-term growth opportunity



What I’m Looking For

- Someone who wants a stable, long-term role

- Strong attention to detail

- Clear communication

- Able to follow established processes

- Comfortable asking questions instead of guessing

- Reliable internet and consistent availability



What I Do NOT Want

- Agencies

- General virtual assistants without bookkeeping experience

- Entry-level bookkeeping trainees

- Applicants juggling many full-time clients

- Short-term or “in-between” workers



HOW TO APPLY (IMPORTANT – READ CAREFULLY)



To be considered, you must answer the questions below.



Applications without complete answers will be ignored.

1. Describe your real-estate bookkeeping experience or real-estate accounting work in detail.

2. Describe your QuickBooks Online experience (how long and what type of work you performed).

3. What types of real-estate activities have you supported? (LTR, STR, MTR, investing, flips, etc.)

4. Are you available to work 9:00 AM–5:00 PM or 10:00 AM–6:00 PM EST? (Yes/No – specify which schedule.)

5. Why are you looking for a long-term role?

6. Do you have reliable and consistent internet suitable for full-time remote work?

7. Are you willing to work occasional overtime or weekends when needed? (for example, during year-end bookkeeping close-out or other urgent deadlines)?



As a test of attention to detail, please begin your application with:

I have real-estate bookkeeping experience and QBO experience.

title: HR Admin Assistant
description:
Work Schedule: Monday to Friday, 8am - 5pm Pacific Time

Work Setup: Fully Remote



Position Overview

We are seeking a proactive and detail-oriented HR Administrative Assistant to support our growing remote workforce. This role focuses on onboarding support, HR documentation, timekeeping management, and employee engagement while maintaining professional communication with US-based clients and Filipino recruits.

The ideal candidate has strong HR admin experience, excellent communication skills, empathy balanced with professionalism, and the initiative to improve processes without constant supervision.



Key Responsibilities

a. HR Administration

• Assist with onboarding newly hired recruits, including documentation, orientation scheduling, and account setup coordination.

• Maintain and monitor daily time records, attendance, and PTO credits for 50+ and growing remote employees.

• Keep HR files, recruit records, and client documents accurate, updated, and organized.

• Ensure HR compliance with company policies and client requirements.



b. Employee & Client Support

• Conduct monthly or bi-monthly check-ins with recruits and provide structured feedback reports to clients.

• Respond to HR-related inquiries from recruits and clients in a timely and professional manner.

• Support employee engagement activities and help address concerns while maintaining policy compliance.



c. Coordination

• Work closely with recruiters, managers, and clients to ensure smooth onboarding and employee support.

• Assist in policy communication, reminders, and HR announcements.



Qualifications

Required

• At least 3+ years of experience in an HR Admin, HR Assistant, or similar role.

• Strong written and verbal English communication skills and comfortable speaking with US clients.

• Experience handling employee onboarding, documentation, and timekeeping.

• Highly organized with strong attention to detail.

• Ability to balance empathy with policy enforcement.

• Self-starter with initiative and problem-solving mindset.

• Experience working remotely with distributed teams.



Preferred

• Experience in a recruitment/outsourcing environment.

• Familiarity with HRIS

• Basic knowledge of Philippine labor practices and remote work policies.

• Experience supporting 50+ employees.
