---



**Key Requirements**



• Exceptional English communication skills — written and verbal.

• Google Workspace: Advanced proficiency (Docs, Sheets, Drive, etc.) is a must.

• Platform Proficiency: Hands-on experience with Kajabi or GoHighLevel (GHL) is essential.

• Ability to work independently, manage multiple priorities, and thrive in a remote environment.

• Note: Please include the word Philadelphia in your
 subject line when applying.



---



**Bonus Skills (Highly Valued)**



• Digital Marketing: Experience with strategy or campaign management.

• Graphic Design: Proficiency in Canva, Photoshop, or similar tools.

• AI Imagery: Experience with Nano Banana or similar AI image generation tools.

• Multimedia: Video and audio editing skills for podcasts and promotional clips.

• LMS Knowledge: Familiarity with other learning management systems.



---



**Core Responsibilities**



Phase 1: Operations & Communications



• Platform Management: Manage funnels,
 campaigns, and course content within Kajabi and/or GHL.

• Communications: Handle customer and faculty
 correspondence with professionalism.

• Data & Analytics: Maintain customer databases and monitor performance analytics.

• Content Support: Assist with newsletters and promotional content creation.



Phase 2: Educational Events & Operations (After Training)



• Event Development: Support planning of educational events and management of conference materials.

• Stakeholder Relations: Coordinate communication with speakers, attendees, and vendors.

• Administration: Oversee registration systems and assist with budget tracking.

• Product Rollout: Support the launch of new educational offerings and programs.



---



**Why Join Us?**



• Collaborative Spirit: Work alongside a team that values your ideas and champions your growth.

• Flexible Schedule: Largely autonomous work schedule with only occasional tea
etings.

• Earning Potential: Base salary plus additional hourly compensation.

• Work-Life Balance: Flexible vacation policy that respects your time.

• Career Growth: Clear path to full-time employment and leadership, with regular performance bonuses.



---



**How to Apply**



Please submit all of the following to 



1. A brief statement of interest explaining why you're a great fit.

2. Your OnlineJobs.ph profile link.

3. Internet speed test results from 
.

4. A portfolio and references — especially any showcasing design, AI imagery, or video work.

5. Final candidates will be invited to a video interview via Google Meet.

title: Accounts Receivable / Accounts Payable Specialist
description:
***Accounts Receivable / Accounts Payable Specialist***

Company: Infinity22

Location: Remote

Employment Type: Full-Time



About Infinity22

Infinity22 is a fast-growing advisory, tax, and corporate finance firm operating across Australia, the UK, and the UAE. We work on high-value engagements spanning valuations, R&D tax incentives, capital raises, corporate restructuring, and strategic advisory. Our multidisciplinary team delivers insight, precision, and measurable impact to clients across diverse sectors. As we continue our expansion, we are strengthening our internal finance function with professionals who uphold the same high standards we deliver to our clients.



Role Overview

We are seeking an experienced Accounts Receivable / Accounts Payable Specialist to support the financial operations of our global practice. This role is critical in ensuring timely and accurate processing of financial transactions, maintaining data integrity, and supporting the overall performance of the finance team. The ideal candidate brings strong technical capability, a commitment to accuracy, and the professionalism required to support a high-performance advisory firm.



Key Responsibilities

-Process accounts payable invoices, vendor payments, and expense claims in line with internal policies and compliance requirements.

-Manage accounts receivable activities including client invoicing, payment allocation, reconciliations, and follow-up of outstanding balances.

-Maintain accurate, organized, and audit-ready financial records across multiple jurisdictions.

-Prepare and analyze aging reports, identifying issues and escalating as needed.

-Assist with month-end closing, reconciliations, and reporting activities.

-Liaise with internal stakeholders across Australia, the UK, and the UAE to ensure accuracy and consistency in financial data.

-Support the finance team with process improvements and system enhancements as the firm continues to scale.



Qualifications & Experience

-Minimum 2 years of experience in accounts receivable and accounts payable roles.

-Proficiency with accounting software (e.g., Xero, QuickBooks, NetSuite, or similar).

-Strong Excel capabilities, including reporting and reconciliation skills.

-Sound understanding of accounting principles and financial controls.

-Excellent communication skills and the ability to collaborate across teams and regions.

-High attention to detail, strong organizational skills, and the ability to manage competing priorities in a fast-growing environment.



What We Offer

-Competitive remuneration aligned with experience and performance.

-Exposure to a dynamic, international, and high-growth professional services environment.

-Opportunities for career development within a rapidly expanding firm.

-A collaborative culture built on trust, expertise, and continuous improvement.

title: Short Form Video Editor
description:
We’re ready to welcome one editor into our creative rhythm as we continue expanding our short-form ad content.



Each week, we produce 8–16 videos inside a clear, structured system that’s already working well. We care about consistency, professionalism, and maintaining a steady flow — and we also care about working with people who feel aligned and easy to collaborate with.



This role is for someone who values reliability, communicates clearly, and takes quiet pride in delivering strong work week after week. We’re building something long-term here, and we’re thoughtful about who we invite into that circle.



If you’re looking for stable, ongoing collaboration and appreciate being part of a focused, respectful team, we’d be glad to review your work.



Please reply with:

• A 15-second sample

• A 30-second sample

• A 30–60 second sample

• A brief note on how you maintain a consistent workflow



We look forward to connecting and exploring a long-term fit.

title: Senior Full-Stack Developer (Next.js / React)
description:
We're a US-based insurtech startup helping consumers compare insurance and save money. Our MVP is live and we're looking for a senior developer to join our small founding team in Bohol and build out the full product.

This is not a BPO or outsourcing role. You'll work directly with the founder, make real architecture decisions, and build the core product. If you want to be an early employee at a startup rather than a cog in an agency, this is for you.



WHAT YOU'LL BUILD:

Insurance quote comparison engine with carrier API integrations

User onboarding and policy management flows

Cross-platform mobile app (iOS + Android via Capacitor)

Push notifications, real-time alerts, and user dashboard

Payment processing and checkout flows



TECH STACK:



Next.js, React, TypeScript

Capacitor (iOS and Android builds)

PostgreSQL

REST APIs / third-party integrations

AWS or Vercel



REQUIREMENTS:



You've shipped production apps used by real customers — not just tutorials and side projects

Deep expertise in Next.js and React (server components, app router, SSR/SSG, API routes — you know the internals, not just the docs)

You've built and deployed mobile apps live in the App Store / Google Play

You can design a database schema, write efficient queries, and optimize for scale

You've integrated third-party APIs in production and dealt with the edge cases

Strong quantitative background — comfortable with statistics, probability, data modeling. CS + Math/Stats types thrive here.

You can look at a dataset and think about what to build with it, not just how to display it

You can take a rough idea and turn it into a working feature by end of day

Based in Bohol OR willing to relocate (relocation support available)

Strong English communication



BONUS:



Background in insurance, fintech, actuarial science, or risk modeling

You've built pricing engines, recommendation systems, or decision algorithms

Early-stage startup experience

CI/CD, monitoring, alerting from scratch

AI/ML experience — understanding the math, not just calling APIs

GitHub or portfolio that speaks for itself



Start your application with the word "lighthouse" so we know you read this.

title: Full-Time Video Editor – Automotive Content
description:
We’re a U.S.-based marketing agency that works with car dealerships and auto brands across the West Coast. Right now, we’re looking for a skilled video editor to help us with a batch of upcoming commercial projects.



This is a freelance, project-based role to start, but there’s strong potential for it to turn into a long-term position if it’s the right fit.



What You'll Be Working On:

Editing short-form horizontal ad content (mainly 30-second commercials for TV and streaming platforms)



Adding motion graphics, legal text, pricing overlays, and branded callouts



Making sure everything feels polished, on-brand, and ready for broadcast or digital use



Collaborating with our creative team (we’ll give you a clear vision, script, and assets to work with)



What We're Looking For:

Solid editing skills in CapCut (we use this for most basic edits)



Advanced ability in Adobe Premiere Pro and After Effects (especially for motion graphics)



Experience editing horizontal video content for ads — doesn’t have to be on actual TV, but should look like it could be



Strong sense of pacing, clean design, and storytelling



Bonus if you’ve worked with automotive content, or are familiar with U.S. ad standards



Schedule:

Must be available Tuesday through Saturday, 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM PH time



Occasional coordination with our U.S. team (Pacific Time overlap)



Trial Task:

If you’re shortlisted, we’ll ask you to complete a quick paid trial — it’s just a way for us to see how you work with creative direction and motion graphics.



To Apply:

Please include:



A short intro about yourself and your background



A portfolio link showing TV-style or branded horizontal ad content



Your experience level with CapCut, Premiere, and After Effects



Confirmation that you’re available during the hours listed above



When you’re able to start



Just to make sure you’re actually reading this — please include the words “Zoom-Zoom” in your application.

title: Part-Time Cold Caller — US Small Business Outreach
description:
North Shore Labs is a web design agency based in Chicago. We’re looking for a part-time cold caller to reach out to small businesses and book walkthrough appointments with our strategist.



What you’ll be doing:



Calling US small businesses from a provided lead list. You’re offering a free Competitor Intelligence Brief: a report we put together showing what the top businesses in their area are doing online. If they’re interested, you book a 10-minute walkthrough call with our team. That’s it. You’re offering something free and booking a time.



Hours:

Roughly 4 hours per day during US Central Time business hours (9am-1pm CT or 1pm-5pm CT). This means night shift Philippine time. You must be comfortable and reliable working these hours.



What we’re looking for:



Clear, natural-sounding English. You need to sound like a person sharing something interesting, not a person reading a script. 

Resourceful — if you hit a receptionist, you figure out how to reach the owner.

Reliable — you show up on time and hit your dials. Prior cold calling experience is a plus but not required if you’re a strong communicator.

title: B2B Lead Generation Specialist  Cold Email and Linkedin (Smartleads, Apollo and SalesNavigator)
description:
We're a small people skills training company looking for a sharp execution-focused lead gen specialist to run cold
 and LinkedIn outreach campaigns on behalf of our team. You'll work directly with the founder and be given clear strategy, ICPs, and messaging, we have infrastructure build, your job is to manage it, suggest improvements, run the sequences, and keep the machine humming.



What You'll Actually Do

Build and manage cold
 campaigns in Smartlead (sequences, inbox rotation, deliverability monitoring)

Initially source prospect lists using our tools. 

Set up and manage LinkedIn outreach sequences (connection requests, follow-ups)

Monitor campaign performance and report on reply rates, bounce rates, more info and booked meetings

Flag issues proactively and suggest optimisations, don't wait to be asked





Must-Haves

Hands-on experience with Smartlead, Apollo, and Sales Navigator, not just "familiar with"

Understanding of
 deliverability (SPF, DKIM, DMARC, domain warm-up)

Strong written English, you'll occasionally need to personalise copy at scale

Reliable, fast communicator who follows briefs closely



Nice to Have

Exposure to Australian or US B2B markets





You're a fit if you:

Take ownership, QA your own work, and treat a missed send or a broken sequence as something that matters.

title: Video Editor Short-Form & Long-Form
description:
About the Role

We are hiring a full-time Video Editor who is skilled in both short-form and long-form content creation. This is not a one-size-fits-all editing role — you need to be equally strong in two very different formats:



Short-Form Content (Ads & Reels)

You'll be editing advertisement videos, Instagram/Facebook Reels, TikToks, and YouTube Shorts. These are fast-paced, attention-grabbing pieces that need to hook viewers within the first few seconds. You should know how to create punchy edits with strong visual rhythm, engaging text overlays, trending audio, and smooth transitions that drive engagement and conversions.



Long-Form Content (YouTube Vlogs/Content)

You'll also be editing longer videos for our YouTube channel — vlogs, educational content, and brand storytelling. This requires a completely different skill set: pacing a story over 10–30 minutes, using b-roll effectively, maintaining viewer retention through smooth cuts, building energy and 
ntum, and delivering a polished final product that keeps people watching all the way through.



We need someone who truly understands content — not just the technical side of editing, but why certain edits work, how pacing affects retention, and what makes a viewer stop scrolling or keep watching.



Responsibilities:

- Edit short-form advertisement and reel content for social media platforms (Instagram,
, TikTok, YouTube Shorts)

- Edit long-form vlog and brand content for YouTube

- Create smooth, well-paced cuts with clean transitions

- Add and sync b-roll footage, music, sound effects, and voiceovers

- Apply text overlays, lower thirds, captions, and on-screen graphics

- Color correct and color grade footage for a consistent, professional look

- Understand the difference in editing style between short-form ads and long-form storytelling and execute both at a high level

- Stay current with content trends, platform algorithms, and what's performing well

- Collaborate with the team on creative direction, take feedback, and iterate quickly

- Deliver edits on time, every time



Requirements (Must-Have):

- Proven experience editing both short-form (ads, reels, shorts) and long-form (YouTube, vlogs) content — please have samples of both ready to share

- Proficient in Adobe Premiere Pro, CapCut, or other professional editing software (DaVinci Resolve, Final Cut Pro, etc.)

- Strong understanding of pacing, timing, and smooth cuts

- Ability to tell a story through editing — knowing when to speed up, slow down, add tension, or let a 
nt breathe

- Good ear for music selection, sound design, and audio mixing

- Knowledge of what makes content perform on YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, and

- Reliable internet connection and a computer capable of handling video editing workloads

- Strong communication skills and ability to take creative feedback

- Detail-oriented with high standards for quality



Nice-to-Have:

- Experience with motion graphics or Adobe After Effects

- Thumbnail design skills

- Understanding of YouTube SEO and audience retention strategies

- Experience editing talking-head, interview, or podcast-style content

- Familiarity with ad creative best practices and direct response marketing

- Experience with color grading tools (Lumetri, DaVinci Resolve color panel)



Compensation & Benefits:

- $650–$900 per month based on your experience level and the quality of your work

- Full-time position (40 hours per week)

- Opportunity to grow with the team as we scale

- Creative, collaborative work environment

title: Executive Assistant & Client Assistant
description:
Jessica Conner Consulting is a boutique operations and business support consultancy that helps business owners create Space to Breathe through Virtual Assistant (VA), Online Business Management (OBM), Go High Level, and Ivorey services, supported by streamlined systems, strong operational support, and thoughtful administration.

We work closely with founders and leadership teams to support the day-to-day running of their businesses, allowing them to stay focused on growth while we manage the structure and systems behind the scenes.

As our client base continues to grow, we are looking for a highly organised Executive Assistant & Operations Coordinator to support the business internally while also assisting our clients with administrative and executive support tasks.

This is a detail-driven role suited to someone who thrives in organised environments, enjoys working with systems, and loves bringing clarity and structure to busy businesses.



About the Role

This role provides support across two key areas:

• Internal operations within Jessica Conner Consulting

• Executive Assistant and administrative support for clients

You will work closely with the CEO and Head of Operations to ensure the business and our clients are supported with clear systems, structured workflows, and excellent communication.

This role will become an important part of the operational support structure of the business, particularly as Jessica prepares for maternity leave.



Expected Weekly Hours

This role will be 38–40 hours per week, with responsibilities split between internal operations and client support.

A typical weekly structure may include:



Internal Business Support

Approximately 18–20 hours per week

Supporting Jessica Conner Consulting with operational organisation, ClickUp management, reporting, and internal coordination.



Client Executive Assistant Support

Approximately 18–20 hours per week

Providing administrative and executive support for clients across a range of tasks and projects.

As the business grows, the balance of hours may shift depending on operational needs and client demand.



Key Responsibilities

Executive Support

• Assist with inbox management and
 drafting

• Coordinate calendars and scheduling

• Prepare documents, reports, and summaries

• Assist with meeting preparation and note-taking

• Manage follow-ups and action items

ClickUp Project Management & Systems

This role requires someone confident working inside ClickUp.

Responsibilities include:

• Building and organising ClickUp spaces, folders, and lists

• Creating task templates and structured workflows

• Maintaining project boards and task structures

• Supporting the team in using ClickUp effectively

• Ensuring tasks are updated and deadlines are tracked

• Linking SOPs and documentation to workflows

Experience building and managing ClickUp project structures is highly desirable.



Client Coordination & Reporting

• Monitor client hours against retainers

• Track team time entries and usage

• Prepare weekly client usage summaries

• Flag when clients are nearing their allocated hours

• Assist in preparing information for client WIP meetings



Client Onboarding & Offboarding

• Coordinate client onboarding workflows

• Send welcome documentation and onboarding forms

• Set up client folders and internal systems

• Ensure onboarding steps are completed smoothly

• Manage offboarding processes where required



Client Executive Assistant Support

You may also provide Executive Assistant support for clients, including:

• Inbox management

• Calendar and appointment scheduling

• Document preparation and organisation

• Research tasks

• Event or travel coordination

• Administrative task management

• Support with personal tasks such as bookings, coordination, and organisation

Our goal is to help our clients create more space in their schedules so they can focus on the parts of their businesses they enjoy most.



Reporting & Metrics

• Compile monthly social media metrics reports

• Support reporting across internal projects

• Assist with team capacity and task tracking

• Identify workflow gaps or inefficiencies



SOP & Documentation Support

• Assist with documenting processes and procedures

• Maintain and update the SOP library

• Record Loom walkthroughs when required

• Support the continuous improvement of workflows



About You

You are someone who enjoys creating order in busy environments and takes pride in producing high-quality work.

You are proactive, organised, and calm under pressure, with a strong ability to manage multiple moving parts while maintaining attention to detail.

You thrive in a role where systems, organisation, and communication are valued.



Key Skills & Experience

• Exceptional organisational skills

• Strong written communication

• High attention to detail

• Experience building or managing ClickUp project spaces

• Experience supporting executives or founders

• Ability to manage multiple tasks and deadlines

• Professional communication with both clients and tea
mbers

Experience supporting business owners, coaches, consultants, or small businesses will be highly regarded.



What We Value

At Jessica Conner Consulting, we value:

• Integrity and honesty

• Quality over quantity

• Clear communication

• Accountability

• Collaboration and growth

• Creating space to breathe for our clients and team

We pride ourselves on delivering thoughtful, structured, and high-quality support.



Role Details

Position: Executive Assistant & Client Assistant

Hours: 38–40 hours per week

Working Time Zone: Australian Timezone

Location: Remote (Offshore) 

Reporting to: CEO and Head of Operations

Hourly Rate: $10–$12 AUD per hour, depending on experience

There is an opportunity for this role to grow as the business continues to expand.



How to Apply

Please submit:

• Your resume

• A short cover letter explaining why this role interests you

• Your experience supporting business owners or teams

• Any experience you have working with ClickUp

To help us identify candidates who pay close attention to detail, please include the word “Breathe” at the top of your application.

Applications that do not include this may not be reviewed

title: Executive Assistant (Client & Sales Operations Support)
description:
ABOUT US



Engage Studio is a fast-growing custom jewelry company based in Toronto, Canada. We specialize in designing meaningful engagement rings and custom jewelry that mark some of the most important 
nts in our clients’ lives.



Unlike traditional jewelry stores, our process is a guided journey. We collaborate closely with each client to design a ring that reflects their story.



Our team works with clients both in-person in our Toronto showroom and virtually with clients worldwide.



We are building a world-class support team in the Philippines and are looking for highly capable Executive Assistants who want a long-term career with a growing international company.





WHO THIS ROLE IS FOR



This role is perfect for someone who:

• Loves being organized and in control of details

• Enjoys helping others perform at their best

• Takes pride in anticipating problems before they happen

• Is comfortable communicating with clients from North America

• Wants to grow long-term with a company



You will work closely with a Founder or Sales Consultant, helping them stay organized, prepared, and responsive to clients.

Your work directly helps couples design the ring they will wear for the rest of their lives.



This is not just an admin job — it is a role where you help coordinate client experiences and ensure everything runs smoothly.





WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE



• Your consultant/founder can focus on clients because you have everything organized and under control.

• Client meetings are fully prepared in advance.

• Client questions are answered quickly and professionally.

• Orders stay on schedule because you are tracking all milestones.

• Clients feel cared for because communication is clear and timely.





CORE RESPONSIBILITIES



1. Executive Support



You will manage and organize your consultant’s communications and schedule.



Responsibilities include:



• Organizing
 inboxes and identifying priority messages

• Responding to routine
s on behalf of your consultant

• Monitoring internal communication channels (Slack, WhatsApp,
)

• Managing calendars and scheduling meetings

• Ensuring all materials needed for meetings are prepared in advance



Examples of preparation may include:



• Ensure design milestones are done correctly and on time (CAD design renders, sketches or concept images, prototype models)

• Client notes and preferences are accurately written up on their profile report

• Shipment status monitoring and following up on delays



Your goal is to ensure every meeting runs smoothly and your consultant is always prepared.



2. Client Communication



Our clients are going through a life-changing event — engagement and marriage — and expect thoughtful communication.



You will help maintain strong relationships with clients.



Responsibilities include:



• Responding to client inquiries promptly (target: within 3 business hours)

• Providing order status updates during the design and production process

• Following up with prospective clients who requested quotes

• Supporting post-purchase communication and relationship building

• Helping resolve client concerns by coordinating internally



Strong emotional intelligence and communication skills are critical.



3. Order Coordination



Custom jewelry orders involve multiple steps and teams.



You will help track the progress of orders to ensure they stay on schedule.



Responsibilities include:



• Tracking orders and milestones using internal systems

• Participating in coordination meetings with our Production team

• Monitoring key stages such as sketches, CAD renders, resin models, and final production

• Escalating issues early if an order risks falling behind schedule

• Taking detailed notes during client meetings and sending instructions to the Production team



Your role ensures that nothing falls through the cracks.



4. Sales Support



You will assist the consultant in maintaining strong relationships with prospective clients.



Responsibilities include:



• Preparing and sending quotes to prospective clients

• Following up with clients who are considering a purchase

• Organizing client information and communications

• Supporting the consultant with administrative tasks that help close sales





REQUIREMENTS



• Minimum 2+ years experience as an Executive Assistant or Personal Assistant

• Excellent written and spoken English communication skills

• Comfortable communicating via Zoom,
, phone, and messaging platforms

• High attention to detail when handling specifications and documentation

• Strong organizational and time management skills

title: Client Success Coordinator
description:
POSITION SUMMARY

The Client Success Coordinator supports client onboarding and Client engagement within the 10X Business Academy. This role helps ensure clients and their teams stay on track with their learning programs by monitoring participation, coordinating touchpoints, and maintaining accurate client records. The Coordinator works closely with the Client Success Manager to identify engagement risks early, maintain proactive communication, and contribute to strong client satisfaction and retention.



ABOUT CARDONE VENTURES

Our mission is to help business owners achieve their personal, professional, and financial goals through the growth of their businesses. We work in dozens of verticals and provide strategic business guidance through courses, live events, partnerships, and investments. Our core values are the backbone of our business and guide our hiring process: we are inspirational, accountable, transparent, disciplined, aligned, and results-oriented. This company operates nationally and is growing by the day.



Wondering what it's like to work here? Come check this:


/watch?v=PIIv7sYj1Ns



SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE:

• Clients remain actively engaged in programs with strong participation and course completion.

• Client questions and requests are addressed quickly and professionally.

• Engagement data and client records are accurate, organized, and consistently updated.



OBJECTIVES

• Support onboarding of new clients by coordinating kickoff activities and tracking setup completion.

• Monitor Client engagement metrics such as participation, attendance, and course progress.

• Conduct scheduled check-ins and follow-up communication with clients.

• Maintain accurate client records in CRM and learning platforms.

• Identify disengagement risks early and escalate them to the Client Success Manager.

• Prepare engagement summaries and progress reports for leadership review.

• Coordinate scheduling for kickoff calls, accountability sessions, and coaching meetings.

• Assist with renewal preparation by compiling engagement insights and participation data.

• Performs other related duties as assigned.



COMPETENCIES

• Strong written and verbal communication skills in English.

• Organized, detail-oriented, and able to manage multiple tasks simultaneously.

• Professional and client-focused approach to communication and service.

• Ability to track engagement data and recognize participation trends.

• Strong time management and follow-through on commitments.

• Comfortable working with CRM systems, learning platforms, and productivity tools.

• Ability to work independently while collaborating with a remote team.



EDUCATION AND EXPERIENCE

• Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Communications, Education, or a related field preferred.

• 1–3 years of experience in customer service, account coordination, BPO, or client-facing roles.

• Experience working with global clients or remote teams is a plus.

• Familiarity with CRM systems or online learning platforms is preferred.



PHYSICAL REQUIREMENTS

• Prolonged periods sitting at a desk and working on a computer



COMMITMENT TO DIVERSITY

As an equal opportunity employer committed to meeting the needs of a multigenerational and multicultural workforce, Cardone Ventures recognizes that a diverse staff, reflective of our community, is an integral and welcome part of a successful and ethical business. We hire local talent at all levels regardless of race, color, religion, age, national origin, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, or disability, and actively foster inclusion in all forms both within our company and across interactions with clients, candidates, and partners.



If this position caught your eye, send us your resume! For best consideration, please complete the online application form:


/

title: Project Sales Specialist
description:
The Sales Associate is responsible for promoting and selling tiles, mosaics, slabs, and stone products to retail and corporate clients. The role involves assisting customers in selecting the right products, providing product knowledge and recommendations, and ensuring excellent customer service throughout the sales process. The Sales Associate will also support the company’s sales targets through proactive client engagement, showroom assistance, and after-sales service.



Key Responsibilities:



- Greet and assist customers in the showroom, providing detailed product information and recommendations.

- Understand customer needs and offer appropriate solutions in tiles, mosaics, slabs, and stone products.

- Prepare and present product quotations, proposals, and sales orders.

- Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets set by the management.

- Maintain product displays, sample boards, and ensure the showroom is presentable and organized.

- Coordinate with suppliers and warehouse staff for stock availability and timely delivery.

- Build and maintain good relationships with clients, contractors, designers, and architects.

- Keep updated with industry trends, new product lines, and competitor activities.

- Handle customer inquiries, concerns, and complaints professionally to ensure customer satisfaction.

- Assist in marketing initiatives such as trade shows, product launches, and promotional campaigns.

title: Written Content Specialist (Home Services Niche)
description:
Job Title: Written Content Specialist (Home?Services Niche)



Company: LocalSink — US?based, fast?growing agency for home?service businesses



Employment: Full?time, long?term



Compensation: USD $1,200/month to start, with clear growth paths and performance?based increases



Location: Remote, Philippines



Schedule: 40 hours/week, Monday–Friday, with at least 4 hours overlap with 9am–5pm Pacific Time (Las Vegas) for the first few weeks.



Role Summary

We’re adding an A?player to our content team. You’ll turn client videos and transcripts into high?quality written content across blogs, social media, and press releases for 30+ home?service clients. This is a full?time, long?term role with real growth potential.



What You’ll Do

-Repurpose client video transcripts into clear, helpful blog posts using structured outlines and targeted prompts

-Repurpose the same content into social media captions, short posts, and carousel copy using our templates and ChatGPT prompts

-Draft Google Business Profile posts and short web copy aligned with local SEO best practices

-Write press releases for service launches, new locations, partnerships, or community news

-Update existing, underperforming blog content for clients

-Follow brand voice guidelines across 30+ clients; ensure every draft is publish?ready

-Use Google Sheets to track output, deadlines, and approvals; organize files in Google Drive

-Light Canva work (select images, light formatting for carousels/graphics) using ready templates

-Edit, proofread, and fact?check; improve AI?assisted drafts into natural, human?quality content

-Collaborate with our team via written updates and short check?ins; meet tight but reasonable turnarounds



Must?Have Experience

-ChatGPT (prompting, structuring, and editing AI?assisted drafts)

-Blog content creation for business audiences

-Social media copywriting (IG/FB/YouTube Shorts/TikTok captions)

-Press releases (format, angle, headline writing)

-Local SEO fundamentals (search intent, internal linking basics, on?page best practices, GBP posts)

-Canva, Google Docs, Google Sheets, Google Drive

-Excellent written English and confident spoken English



Nice to Have (Not Required)

-WordPress/Gutenberg posting

-On?page SEO tools (Surfer, Clearscope) or keyword research tools (Ahrefs/SEMrush)

-Experience with home?service industries (plumbing, HVAC, electrical, restoration, roofing, etc.)



Success Looks Like

-Clear, concise, on?brand writing at a 5th–8th grade reading level when appropriate

-Meets deadlines consistently and maintains quality with minimal revisions

-Transforms transcripts into content that’s easy to scan and genuinely useful

-Applies SEO basics (headings, keywords in context, internal links, CTAs) without keyword stuffing

-Keeps our trackers up to date and communicates proactively



Schedule & Setup

-Full?time, 40 hours/week

-Flexible PH schedule with at least 2–3 hours overlap with US Pacific Time on weekdays

-Reliable internet and a distraction?free workspace



Why You’ll Love Working With Us

-Fast?growing agency in a stable niche

-Clear processes, templates, and a supportive team

-Plenty of room to grow your role and compensation as you prove yourself



How to Apply

Send your application via OnlineJobs.ph and include all of the following in your message:



Subject line: Written Content Specialist - Blue Wrench - [Your Name]



A short intro (2–3 sentences) about your most relevant experience



Showcase the content you’ve created



A brief note on how you use ChatGPT to go from transcript ? outline ? polished draft



Your internet speed test link/screenshot and your typical working hours in PH time



Then, send an
 with the subject line “Writer” to 
 with any other details we should know when considering your application.



Hiring Process

-Resume/portfolio review

-Paid test task for finalists

-Offer and onboarding

title: Part-Time Google Ads PPC Specialist (5–10 Hours per Week)
description:
Overview

We are looking for a detail-oriented Google Ads PPC Specialist to help manage and optimize paid search campaigns. This role is ideal for someone experienced with Google Ads who can work independently, analyze performance, and provide clear reporting insights. The position is part-time, requiring approximately 5–10 hours per week.



Responsibilities

 • Manage and optimize Google Ads campaigns (Search, Performance Max, and related campaign types)

 • Conduct keyword research and manage match types, bids, and budgets

 • Monitor campaign performance and implement ongoing optimization strategies

 • Identify opportunities to improve CTR, conversion rate, and cost per conversion

 • Create and maintain Looker Studio dashboards for campaign performance reporting

 • Provide simple insights and recommendations based on data trends

 • Periodically review search terms, negative keywords, and ad copy performance

 • Ensure tracking and conversions are properly monitored



Required Skills

 • Strong experience managing Google Ads campaigns

 • Ability to analyze data and make optimization recommendations

 • Experience creating and maintaining Looker Studio reports

 • Understanding of conversion tracking and campaign performance metrics

 • Strong communication and ability to summarize insights clearly



Nice to Have

 • Experience with Google Ads Editor

 • Familiarity with Google Analytics / GA4

 • Experience managing multiple client campaigns



Work Structure

 • Approximately 5–10 hours per week

 • Remote / flexible schedule

 • Work will include both campaign optimization and reporting



Application Instructions

To confirm that you have read this entire job posting, please include the phrase “Data drives decisions.” at the top of your application response.

title: Real Estate Inside Sales Agent (ISA) – Seller Lead Calling | $6/hour | Full-Time
description:
**Real Estate Inside Sales Agent (ISA) – Seller Lead Calling | $6/hour | Full-Time**



We are a growing **U.S. real estate team** looking for **2 experienced Inside Sales Agents (ISAs)** to call seller leads and set appointments for our agents. This role is focused on **outbound calling, lead follow-up, and appointment setting with homeowners who may be interested in selling their property.**



We are looking for someone with **excellent English, a professional phone presence, and prior experience calling real estate leads.**



This is a **long-term opportunity** for someone who is confident on the phone and comfortable speaking with homeowners.



**Pay:** $6 per hour + performance bonuses

**Schedule:** Full-Time (40 hours per week)



We are hiring for two shifts:



**Position 1:**

8:00 AM – 4:00 PM EST



**Position 2:**

12:00 PM – 8:00 PM EST (includes weekend availability)



**Responsibilities**



* Call seller leads and homeowners

* Follow up with leads who have previously shown interest in selling

* Qualify sellers and gather property information

* Set listing appointments for our agents

* Update notes and track conversations in our CRM

* Maintain organized follow-up with leads

* Use scripts while sounding natural and professional



**Requirements**



* Excellent spoken and written English

* Minimal accent and professional phone presence

* Previous experience **calling real estate leads**

* Comfortable with outbound calling and rejection

* Strong communication and persuasion skills

* Reliable internet connection and quiet work environment

* Ability to work **U.S. Eastern Standard Time hours**

* Must be dependable and consistent with calling



**Preferred Experience**



* Real estate cold calling or ISA experience

* Experience with dialers (Mojo, Batch Dialer, CallTools, etc.)

* Experience using CRM systems

* Appointment setting experience



**Compensation**



* $6/hour base pay

* Bonuses available for qualified appointments and closed deals



**To Apply**



Please submit:



1. A short paragraph describing your **experience calling real estate leads**

2. A **1–2 minute voice recording** introducing yourself

3. A list of any dialers or CRMs you have used

4. Your internet speed test results

5. Your resume 



At the top of your application write **“Seller Specialist”** so we know you read the entire job post.



We are looking for motivated callers who want a **stable, long-term position with a successful real estate team.**

title: Integration Specialist
description:
A resume is required to be considered.

Must be available to work U.S. Pacific Standard Time (PST) hours.

The contract will be managed through Deel, and work will be tracked using Hubstaff.



Position Summary



We are seeking an Integration Specialist to maintain and improve the integrations connecting our e-commerce sales channels, ERP, and fulfillment partners. You will act as the first line of defense, monitoring issues, triaging errors, and resolving problems before they impact operations.



What You'll Do



Monitor integrations across e-commerce and ERP systems for errors, failures, and data gaps.

Triage and resolve integration errors, escalating when necessary.

Perform configuration and mapping updates in our iPaaS platform, including sandbox testing and production deployment.

Review reconciliation reports and resolve discrepancies to keep order data accurate.

Identify recurring failure patterns and implement preventative fixes.

Support custom API based integrations and participate in regular team syncs.



What We're Looking For



Must have:



Strong understanding of integrations, including data mapping, field transformations, error handling, and flow logic.

Hands on experience with REST APIs and webhooks; comfortable reading API documentation and debugging requests.

Proven troubleshooting ability; follow records across systems, identify failures, and resolve them.

Ability to manage multiple open issues and prioritize effectively.

Comfortable working independently, documenting work clearly, and communicating with a remote team.



Nice to have:



Experience with an iPaaS platform such as Celigo.

Familiarity with e-commerce platforms or ERP systems.

Experience with sandbox to production deployment workflows.

Basic scripting skills, JavaScript or Python, for debugging or extending integration logic.

description:
URGENT HIRING: AU Mortgage Loan Processing Manager (WFH)

IMPORTANT – PLEASE READ BEFORE APPLYING



To ensure your application is reviewed, please follow ALL instructions below.



Step 1

CC:

.

 without completing these steps will not be reviewed.



Shortlisted applicants will be invited for a final interview with our Director, Lalen.



About Premium Select Finance



Premium Select Finance is a multi-award-winning Australian mortgage brokerage known for delivering exceptional service and reliable lending solutions to clients across Australia.



We are expanding our team and looking for a highly capable Mortgage Loan Processing Manager who can confidently manage the end-to-end loan process from submission through settlement and post-settlement support.



If you enjoy working in a structured, fast-paced environment and want a stable long-term role with an international team, this opportunity may be a great fit.



Role Details



Position: AU Mortgage Loan Processing Manager

Employment: Full-Time | Work From Home

Location: Metro Manila preferred but not required

Salary: TBD (based on experience)

Start Date: Immediate



Work Schedule



Monday – Friday

6:00 AM – 3:00 PM Manila Time



During Australian Daylight Saving Time (DST):

7:00 AM – 4:00 PM Manila Time



Key Responsibilities



You will manage the full loan processing lifecycle, including:



• Processing Australian home loan applications from submission to settlement

• Managing applications through CRM systems (Infynity preferred), Quickli, AOL, and lender portals

• Coordinating with clients, brokers, lenders, solicitors, and valuers

• Calling clients to follow up required documents or provide loan updates

• Contacting lenders or solicitors to progress applications

• Managing lender forms, supporting documents, and compliance checklists

• Maintaining accurate file notes and updates in the CRM

• Ensuring files meet Australian mortgage compliance standards (NCCP, ASIC, Privacy Act)



Requirements



To succeed in this role, you should have:



• 3–5 years experience processing Australian mortgage loans (broker-side preferred)

• Experience using CRM systems (any CRM) — Infynity experience is a strong advantage

• Familiarity with Quickli, AOL, and lender portals

• Knowledge of refinance processes, discharges, FHOG, top-ups, and investor loans

• Excellent English communication skills (written and verbal)

• Confidence making phone calls to clients, lenders, and solicitors

• Strong attention to detail and organisation

• Ability to manage multiple files and deadlines

• A reliable home office setup and stable internet



Applicants with experience working with Australian brokerages or aggregators (e.g. Aussie, Loan Market, Mortgage Choice, Connective, AFG, Finsure) will be highly regarded.



Preferred but not required



• Metro Manila based

• Experience handling complex loan scenarios (SMSF, trusts, investors)



Why Join Premium Select Finance



We are looking for someone who wants more than just a job — someone who wants a stable long-term role with opportunities to grow.



You will benefit from:



• Stable long-term work-from-home opportunity with an Australian brokerage

• Working with a supportive offshore team and experienced brokers

• Structured systems and processes to support your success

• Opportunity for career growth and leadership roles

• Australian public holidays observed (paid)

• Ongoing training and professional development



Contact



Premium Select Finance









LinkedIn: Premium Select Finance



If you have strong AU mortgage processing experience and are looking for a stable long-term opportunity with a professional Australian brokerage, we look forward to receiving your application.

title: VA for Short Term Rentals
description:
About Us

We are a premier short-term rental and property management firm based in Los Angeles. With a growing portfolio of high-end properties, we pride ourselves on delivering 5-star guest experiences through seamless operations and proactive communication.



Position Overview

We are seeking a highly detailed, organized, and seasoned Virtual Assistant with specific experience in Airbnb Co-Hosting. This is a fast-paced role that requires you to be the "voice" of our properties during peak late-night and weekend hours.



Important Note on Schedule: This role requires full alignment with Pacific Standard Time (PST). Specifically, we are looking for candidates available to work night shifts and weekends to ensure our guests are supported around the clock.



Key Responsibilities

Guest Concierge: Manage all communications across Airbnb, Vrbo, and direct booking platforms with speed and professionalism.



Logistics Coordination: Organize cleaning schedules and turnovers, ensuring our field team is updated in real-time.



Crisis Management: Handle urgent property issues or guest complaints with a calm, solution-oriented mindset.



Voice Support: Conduct phone check-ins or resolve issues via call (RingCentral provided) when text isn't enough.



Operational Sync: Work closely with the LA-based management team during PST hours.



Requirements

Proven Experience: You must have a background as an Airbnb Co-Host or in STR property management.



Technical Proficiency: Familiarity with PMS tools (e.g., Guesty, Hostaway) and communication platforms.



Communication: Exceptional written and verbal English skills. You must be comfortable speaking on the phone.



PST Availability: Must be able to work Los Angeles night shifts, including Saturday and Sunday.



Environment: A reliable high-speed internet connection and a quiet, professional workspace for phone calls.



How to Apply

If you are a problem-solver who thrives in the hospitality industry, please reply with the following:



A short introduction highlighting your hospitality experience.



Specific details regarding your prior Airbnb co-hosting experience.



Confirmation that you are comfortable working PST night shifts/weekends.



Your availability for a brief phone interview this week.

title: Remote Recruiter/Talent Acquisition Specialist
description:
About MIRA Safety



MIRA Safety provides advanced protective equipment used by civilians, professionals, and government organizations worldwide. Our product line includes military-grade gas masks and protective gear designed to help individuals and organizations prepare for emergency situations.



As our team continues to grow, we are expanding our recruitment capabilities to support hiring across multiple departments and talent markets. We are seeking a proactive recruiter who can help identify strong candidates while contributing ideas to strengthen and improve our hiring processes.



Job Overview



We are looking for a Remote Recruiter/Talent Acquisition Specialist with experience supporting recruitment for U.S.-based companies or international clients.



This role will focus on sourcing, screening, and coordinating candidates for remote positions while ensuring a professional and efficient hiring experience for both candidates and hiring managers.



The ideal candidate is organized, resourceful, and comfortable managing multiple recruitment pipelines. In addition to executing recruitment activities, this role requires someone who can think strategically about sourcing approaches, candidate pipelines, and hiring processes, and communicate recommendations when adjustments may be needed.



This is a full-time remote contractor role aligned with U.S. Central Time (CST) business hours, Monday through Friday, 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM.



Key Responsibilities

• Manage the recruitment lifecycle from candidate sourcing through interview coordination

• Source qualified candidates using job boards, professional networks, and proactive outreach strategies

• Post and manage job listings across platforms such as LinkedIn, Indeed, OnlineJobs.ph, Upwork, JazzHR, and other recruitment channels

• Conduct initial screening interviews to assess candidate qualifications, communication skills, and role alignment

• Evaluate resumes and identify strong candidates for hiring manager review

• Coordinate interviews between candidates and hiring managers across multiple time zones

• Maintain organized candidate pipelines and accurate records within the ATS or recruitment tracking system

• Track recruitment activity including pipeline progress and candidate conversion stages

• Communicate professionally with candidates throughout the hiring process

• Support hiring managers by ensuring an efficient and well-coordinated interview process

• Identify opportunities to improve sourcing strategies, candidate pipelines, or recruitment workflows when necessary

 • Assist with hiring-related administrative tasks and onboarding coordination as needed



Required Qualifications

• 3–5 years of recruitment or talent acquisition experience

• Experience recruiting for U.S.-based companies or international clients

• Experience sourcing candidates for remote roles such as customer support, operations, sales, marketing, or technical positions

• Strong English communication skills (written and verbal)

• Experience using sourcing platforms such as LinkedIn, Indeed, OnlineJobs.ph, Upwork, or similar recruitment tools

• Familiarity with Applicant Tracking Systems (ATS) such as JazzHR or similar recruitment platforms

• Strong organizational and time management skills

• Ability to manage multiple recruitment processes simultaneously

• High attention to detail when reviewing candidate profiles and resumes

• Comfortable working independently in a fully remote work environment



Preferred Skills

• Experience recruiting across both U.S. and international talent markets

• Background recruiting for customer support, operations, eCommerce, marketing, or technical roles

• Familiarity with recruitment metrics such as candidate pipeline tracking and time-to-hire

• Experience conducting structured interviews and candidate evaluations

• Familiarity with onboarding coordination and hiring documentation processes

• Experience collaborating with hiring managers using tools such as 
, Jira, or similar project management platforms

• Experience interviewing candidates for U.S.-based roles



Work Schedule

This role follows U.S. Central Time (CST) business hours, Monday through Friday. Candidates must maintain consistent availability during scheduled working hours.



Why Join Us

• Opportunity to contribute to and improve global recruitment processes

• Exposure to international hiring and remote workforce strategies

• Collaborative remote environment with opportunities for long-term growth



Application Instructions

To proceed with your application, please complete the form below:





Only applications submitted through the form will be reviewed.

title: Property & Construction Accounting Analyst
description:
Property & Construction Accounting Analyst



Upside Capital Holdings



Rate: $10-$13/hour



Schedule: 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM CST



Work Setup: Fully Remote



About the Role



The Property & Construction Accounting Analyst will support the accounting needs of Upside Capital Holdings across our residential construction projects and multifamily real estate portfolio. This role includes budget assistance, payroll allocation, intercompany reconciliations, bank reconciliations, and general accounting functions for various US-based entities.

Assist with budget preparation, forecasting, variance tracking, and CapEx cost monitoring.

Manage payroll allocations, distribution logs, and employee record updates.

Prepare and maintain intercompany reconciliation schedules across multiple entities.

Complete monthly bank reconciliations and review cash activity.

Support AP/AR processing, vendor documentation, and invoice management.

Maintain organized digital financial files and provide support for audits or CPA requests.

Prepare reports, spreadsheets, trackers, and financial summaries as needed.

1–3 years of accounting experience handling US-based clients.

Experience in residential construction and/or multifamily real estate accounting is strongly preferred.

QuickBooks Online experience is required.

Proficient in Microsoft Office (Excel, Word, Outlook).

Experience with ResMan or AppFolio is a plus.

Strong attention to detail, accuracy, and organization.

Ability to work independently in a fully remote environment.

title: CoStar Expert - Foreclosure Specialist
description:
Job Summary



We are looking for an experienced CoStar Expert to support our real estate research, property analytics, and market intelligence efforts. The ideal candidate is deeply familiar with CoStar’s research tools, data sets, market analytics, property search features, and reporting capabilities. This role will be responsible for gathering accurate property data, analyzing market trends, generating reports, and supporting acquisition or leasing strategies using CoStar.



This position is ideal for someone with a strong real estate research background, exceptional data accuracy, and the ability to translate CoStar data into meaningful business insights.



Key Responsibilities



CoStar Research & Data Management



Conduct in-depth property searches, market research, and comp analyses using CoStar.

Extract, validate, and interpret property data, including rent comps, sales comps, vacancy rates, cap rates, and demographic insights.

Maintain current and accurate property records and update internal databases with CoStar findings.

Monitor new listings, market changes, and property updates relevant to company portfolios or acquisition targets.



Market Analysis & Reporting



Prepare weekly, monthly, and ad hoc market reports using CoStar analytics and internal metrics.

Generate CoStar maps, custom reports, market snapshots, and demographic summaries.

Present key findings to management and provide insights supporting acquisitions, leasing, underwriting, or investment decisions.

Analyze historical data and trends to forecast market shifts and identify profitable opportunities.



Property & Portfolio Support



Assist in property underwriting by providing CoStar-based research and comparable data.

Support leasing and acquisition teams with actionable property intelligence.

Track competing listings, rental rates, and occupancy changes within target markets.

Validate property details for marketing materials, pitch decks, and presentations.



Data Quality & Verification



Ensure accuracy and consistency between CoStar data and internal documentation.

Cross-check CoStar findings with MLS, public records, GIS systems, and other real estate platforms.

Communicate with brokers, property owners, or research contacts for property verification if needed.



QualificationsRequired:



2+ years of hands-on experience using CoStar.

Strong understanding of commercial real estate (CRE), leasing, acquisitions, or property management.

Ability to interpret CoStar market analytics and property data thoroughly.

Proficiency in Excel, Google Sheets, and data visualization tools.

Excellent analytical, research, and data validation skills.

Strong attention to detail and ability to work independently.



Job Type: Full-time



Benefits:



Additional leave

Company Christmas gift

Company events

Opportunities for promotion

Pay raise

Promotion to permanent employee

Work from home

title: Accounting Specialist - Foreclosure and Acquisition
description:
Job description:



Deal Financial Support



Review and verify all financial assumptions for foreclosure and distressed property opportunities.

Work hand-in-hand with Foreclosure Hunters/Analysts to validate property values, repair estimates, comps, liens, and payoff figures.

Build financial models, deal calculators, and forecast sheets for acquisitions.

Assess profitability, risk exposure, cash requirements, and projected upside for each deal.

Support negotiation strategies with financial insights and breakdowns.



Due Diligence & Risk Review



Analyze foreclosure files, title reports, HOA ledgers, property taxes, outstanding liens, judgments, and loan balances.

Spot red flags early and advise the acquisition team on kill-or-go decisions.

Track auction deposits, purchase timelines, payment deadlines, and settlement requirements.

Ensure compliance with state-specific foreclosure and auction financial rules.

Accounting & Financial Control



Manage real estate accounting functions: AP/AR, property-related expenses, reimbursements, and reconciliations.

Track acquisition budgets and ensure costs stay aligned with projected numbers.

Maintain accurate financial records for all acquisitions, closings, and dispositions.

Prepare cash flow reports, portfolio summaries, and real-time financial dashboards for leadership.



Operational & Team Support



Act as the financial partner to the acquisition team — quick answers, reliable data, and clean numbers.

Communicate with title companies, attorneys, lenders, and auction offices to verify financial details.

Develop standard financial templates and processes to make the acquisition pipeline faster and cleaner.

Maintain a high level of responsiveness in a fast-moving, deal-driven environment.



What We’re Looking For



Experience & Skills



3–5+ years in accounting, real estate finance, property management accounting, or similar.

Experience with foreclosures, auctions, REO, distressed assets, or investor-focused acquisitions.

Strong understanding of property-level financials, AR/AP, GL, and real estate bookkeeping.

Ability to analyze deals quickly and present clear financial recommendations.

Tech-savvy — strong with spreadsheets, financial modeling, and research tools.



Traits



Detail-obsessed and accuracy-driven — numbers never lie on your watch.

Fast, adaptable, and comfortable in a high-urgency environment.

Proactive problem solver — not waiting for instructions.

Organized, reliable, and able to juggle many active deals at once.

Hungry for upside and growth — we want someone who wants to scale with us.

Job Type: Full-time



Benefits:





Additional leave

Company events

Opportunities for promotion

Pay raise

Promotion to permanent employee

Work from home

Work Location: Remote

title: LinkedIn Content Writer + Graphic Designer (Healthcare / Personal Brand)
description:

Our clients are consultants, healthcare leaders, and female-led organizations who are building strong personal brands and thought leadership on LinkedIn.

nts

Experience with SocialPilot is a major plus, since our clients review and approve content directly in the platform.



Required Experience



To apply, you must have:

• Experience supporting executives, consultants, or personal brands

• Strong English writing skills with a professional business tone

• Graphic design skills for social media visuals

• Experience creating short-form video clips from longer content (webinars, podcasts, interviews)

Bonus experience:

What We Are Looking For



You are someone who:



• Writes clear, engaging LinkedIn posts

• Can design clean, modern graphics quickly

• Can turn webinar content into engaging short clips and posts

• Is comfortable working inside content approval tools like SocialPilot

Speed and attention to detail are very important for this role.



Hours

?

description:
We are an outbound lead generation agency that helps digital marketing agencies connect with home improvement businesses (plumbing, pest control, roofing, and similar companies) who will benefit from the marketing help (SEO, Google Maps Ranking, Google Ads, Google Business Profile Optimization, etc.)



We are looking for a highly disciplined cold caller (aka. appointment setter) who enjoys speaking with business owners and booking qualified meetings.



You will not be working alone. You will be part of a structured calling system with scripts, materials, and ongoing support from experienced callers and the founder.



Your primary responsibility will be to contact business owners and determine whether they are open to taking on new jobs, then schedule appointments for our clients.



This is a long-term role with opportunities to grow into positions such as:

- Cold Calling Team Manager

- High-Ticket Sales Representative

- Internal Sales Coach

& others



If you are consistent, coachable, and enjoy outbound communication, this role can become a stable long-term opportunity.



1) What Makes This Role Different?



Unlike typical freelance calling roles, you will work inside a structured system with real support.



You will receive:

- Proven scripts and calling frameworks

- Structured training on the system (from multi 4-figure business coaching & courses)

- Live feedback and call reviews

- Weekly team calls

- Mindset training (for continuous growth & support)

- A supportive team of other callers

- Direct guidance from the founder



Your job is execution. The strategy, systems, and materials are already prepared.



2) Who You Will Be Calling?



You will contact home improvement contractors, including:

- Plumbing companies

- Pest control companies

- Roofing companies

- Similar residential service businesses



Your goal is to determine whether they have the capacity to take on additional jobs and schedule a meeting with our client if appropriate.



3) Your Responsibilities



Your work will include:

- Calling business owners using a provided lead list

- Following the provided scripts and frameworks

- Qualifying prospects based on simple criteria

- Booking appointments for our clients

- Logging calls and outcomes in the tracking sheet

- Participating in team feedback sessions



Tools you will use include:

- GoHighLevel

- Google Sheets

- Notion

- Google Workspace tools



4) Requirements



- Strong English proficiency with minimal accent

- Comfortable speaking with business owners

- Consistent work ethic and reliability

- Ability to follow structured processes

- Previous cold calling or appointment setting experience



5) Preferred (But Not Required)



- Located in a United States time zone

- Experience calling local service businesses

- Familiarity with CRM tools



6) Work Structure



Part-time to start.

Opportunity to grow into full-time based on performance.

Work alongside a team of other callers.

Regular team communication and support.



7) Personal Traits We Value



We are looking for someone who is:

- Consistent in their work habits

- Coachable and open to feedback

- Calm and confident on the phone

- Professional when speaking with business owners



Cold calling is a skill that improves with discipline and repetition.

We value people who are committed to mastering the craft.



To confirm you have read this description, include the number 77 in your application.

title: Virtual Assistant
description:
About the Role

We're hiring a proactive, detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to support the Humble Brags founder with day-to-day admin and event operations. You'll be a key part of a small, fast-moving team — someone who takes ownership, communicates clearly, and loves getting things done.



What You'll Be Doing

Event Coordination



Research and source suitable venues for upcoming events

Liaise directly with venues to confirm availability, negotiate terms, and manage all logistics from start to finish

Track event timelines, checklists, and deliverables to ensure everything runs on schedule



Design & Digital Assets



Create event graphics, social media assets, and promotional materials using Canva

Maintain consistent branding across all visual outputs



RSVP & Attendee Management



Build and manage RSVP landing pages for events

Collect, organise, and track attendee information and responses

Send confirmation and reminder communications to attendees



Scheduling & Calendar Management



Organise and schedule meetings for the founder

Coordinate and book partner meetings across time zones

Keep the founder's calendar up to date and flag conflicts proactively



General Admin



Manage inboxes and triage
s on behalf of the founder

Handle ad hoc admin tasks as they arise

title: Klaviyo Manager
description:
Audit and clean the list on an ongoing basis — identify and suppress hard bounces, spam complaints, role-based addresses, and chronically unengaged contacts

Set up and maintain suppression lists and unsubscribe flows

Run re-engagement campaigns before suppressing cold subscribers

Build and maintain core segments: active subscribers, VIP buyers, lapsed customers, browse abandoners, product-specific interest lists

Tag contacts based on purchase history, engagement, and product interest

Collaborate with founder to develop custom segments for targeted promotions

Design and send one weekly newsletter — you will create visuals in Canva (or a tool of your choice) and build the
 in Klaviyo

Write short, on-brand copy (founder will provide content direction and review)

title: Lead Sourcing Virtual Assistant (USA Local Businesses)
description:
We are an outbound lead generation agency that helps home improvement businesses (plumbing, pest control, roofing, and similar contractors) connect with homeowners who need their services.



We are looking for a detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to support our outbound operations.



This role focuses on lead prospecting, data organization, and improving lead quality, with opportunities to learn additional skills such as cold calling, automation, and CRM management.



Everything will be taught if needed. What matters most is attention to detail, consistency, and willingness to learn.



This is a long-term role with opportunities to grow into more advanced positions within the company.



What You Will Be Doing?

Your responsibilities may include:

- Lead Prospecting

- Researching and identifying companies that match our target criteria

- Finding business contact information

- Building lead lists

- Lead Pre-Qualification

- Reviewing companies to determine if they fit our client criteria

- Filtering out low-quality leads

- Verifying information such as company size, services, contact information



Data Organization

- Maintaining structured lead lists

- Cleaning and organizing data

- Improving lead quality over time

- CRM Management

- Updating records in CRM systems

- Tracking lead status

- Maintaining accurate prospect data

- Additional Tasks (Optional / Training Provided)



Supporting cold callers with lead preparation

- Occasionally contacting businesses for basic verification

- Assisting with process improvements and automation



Tools We Use:

You may work with tools such as:

- Google Sheets

- GoHighLevel CRM

- Notion

- Google Workspace tools

- Data scraping tools

- Google Sheets APIs and automation tools



You do not need to know all of these tools in advance.

Training will be provided where needed.



Requirements:

- Strong attention to detail

- Good written & spoken English

- Ability to work with spreadsheets and structured data

- Organized and reliable

- Ability to follow clear processes

- Familiarity with Google Sheets functions



Preferred (But Not Required)

- Existing personal LinkedIn account

- Experience with lead prospecting or data research

- Experience working with CRM systems (such as GHL)

- Basic understanding of APIs or automation tools (e.g. Clay)



Work Structure:

- Part-time to start

- Opportunity to grow into a full-time role

- Work within a structured team environment

- Regular communication and support



Personal Traits We Value:

We are looking for someone who is:

- Detail-oriented

- Curious and willing to learn

- Organized and structured

- Consistent in their work habits



Many of the systems we use can be learned quickly by someone who is motivated and systematic.



Application Instructions



To confirm that you read this job description, include the number 77 in your application.

title: Grant Research & Application Specialist (Remote)
description:
Job Title: Grant Research & Application Specialist (Remote)



Company: ET Prosperity Group



About Us  

ET Prosperity Group is a financial education and credit empowerment organization dedicated to helping individuals and families rebuild their financial foundations through credit education, financial literacy, and strategic guidance. Our mission is to equip individuals with the tools and knowledge needed to restore financial confidence and build sustainable economic futures.



Position Overview  

We are seeking a highly organized and detail-oriented Grant Research & Application Specialist to identify, research, and assist with submitting grant opportunities that align with our mission. The ideal candidate will help maintain a consistent pipeline of grant applications to support the growth of our financial literacy initiatives and community programs.



Key Responsibilities

- Research and identify relevant grant opportunities weekly  

- Review eligibility requirements and funding guidelines  

- Assist in drafting and submitting grant applications  

- Adapt existing grant materials to fit different funding opportunities  

- Maintain a grant tracking spreadsheet for deadlines and submissions  

- Organize grant documents and supporting materials  

- Provide weekly updates on grant opportunities and submissions



Preferred Skills

- Experience researching grants or writing proposals  

- Strong research and writing skills  

- High attention to detail and organization  

- Ability to follow instructions and meet deadlines  

- Experience with Google Docs or spreadsheets



Nice to Have

- Experience with nonprofit, financial literacy, or community programs  

- Understanding of grant databases and funding opportunities



Work Schedule

- Flexible remote work  

- Approximately 10–20 hours per week to start



Compensation

- Hourly (based on experience)



How to Apply

Please include the following with your application:

1. A brief introduction about your grant research or writing experience  

2. One example of a grant or research project you have worked on  

3. The word “Prosperity” in your subject line so we know you read the full

title: Sales Assistant
description:
Virtual Assistant – Sales & Operations Support (EST Hours)



Company: Tolla LLC

Position Type: Remote – Full Time or Part Time

Working Hours: Daytime (U.S. Eastern Standard Time)



Overview



We are seeking a highly organized and proactive Virtual Assistant to support our sales operations and customer follow-up processes. This role will assist with daily administrative tasks, CRM updates, customer communication, and internal reporting to help keep our sales pipeline running smoothly.

Compensation

• Long-term opportunity for the right candidate

• Performance bonuses may be available

title: eCommerce Growth Expert
description:
Own Category Growth, Optimize Performance, and Expand Market Dominance.



Hadley Designs is seeking a Growth Expert to take full ownership of a multi-million dollar product category, with Amazon as the primary growth channel. This is a high-impact role for a results-driven e-commerce operator who thrives on ownership, accountability, and driving measurable growth through disciplined execution and data-backed decision-making.



While this role operates deeply within Amazon, we welcome candidates who have driven growth across e-commerce, DTC, or marketplace environments and are excited to apply that experience within a scaled Amazon ecosystem.



How You’ll Win at Hadley Designs:

We believe performance comes from strong systems executed consistently.



Every eCommerce Growth Expert is expected to progress through three stages:



- Learn the Playbook – Understand our category strategy, operating standards, and decision frameworks

- Apply the Playbook – Execute accurately and consistently to deliver predictable, scalable results

- Enhance the Playbook – Improve systems with new ideas and strategies after mastery is demonstrated



This order matters. We value innovation, but only when it is grounded in proven execution. Our playbook exists to help high performers win faster, create leverage, and scale impact — not slow them down.



To formally apply, apply HERE:
