title: Amazon PPC Executive
description:
Ready to dominate Amazon as part of a winning crew?



At Hadley Designs, we’re all about filling lives with beauty and inspiration through products that unlock people’s best selves. Amazon’s our fortress—70-80% of our revenue—and we need an Amazon PPC Executive to own a multi-million dollar portfolio and take it to the next level. This isn’t just a solo hustle; it’s your chance to join a tight-knit team, learn our proven playbook, and still crush the competition while shaping our future.



While we’re scaling across all channels, Amazon’s where our bread is buttered. We’re looking for a pro who’s hungry to scale portfolios, optimize like a champ, and spot golden opportunities, someone who’s coachable yet ready to drive millions in revenue with profitability locked in. If you’ve conquered Amazon before, love data-driven wins, and can gel with a team that’s got your back, this is your shot. No red tape, just big resources, a CEO who bets on bold, and a crew ready to help you shine.



What Winning Looks Like:



Six months in, your category’s unstoppable: sales are up, profits are peaking, and new products are killing it. You’ve mastered our optimization game, revitalized legacy items, and pitched expansions that have competitors sweating—all while syncing with the team to make Hadley Designs’ Amazon presence a juggernaut. You’re hitting targets, balancing inventory like a pro, and proving you can hustle hard and learn fast.



Your Playbook:



One Thing:

- Turn your category into a profit-churning machine.



Big Rocks (Own These First):



1 Drive sustainable growth with smart sales, pricing, and ad strategies.

2 Optimize performance using data, tweak positioning, pricing, and promos with precision.

3 Pitch high-potential product expansions backed by market smarts.

4 Revive legacy products to keep them profitable and relevant.

5 Nail inventory, meet demand, dodge fees, keep it lean.



Daily Hustle:



1 Dig into sales and marketplace data weekly to sharpen your moves.

2 Run PPC campaigns and keyword plays—boost visibility, max conversions.

3 Team up with cross-functional crews to sync and scale.

4 Revamp listings, test pricing, and tweak ads for top profitability.

5 Scout trends, audit competitors, and brainstorm growth hacks—stay ahead.

6 Build SOPs and processes to keep the category humming.



KPIs You’ll Smash:



1 Boost category net profit by 20% year-over-year.

2 Hit sales targets for 80% of new launches in 6 months.

3 Grow relaunched product profit by 15% yearly.

4 Keep legacy profit drops under 10% year-over-year.

5 Cap inventory surcharges below $1,000/month.

6 Build a $2.5M new product revenue pipeline for 2026.



Who You’ll Roll With:



- Optimization Manager & PPC Specialist - Daily syncs to set priorities and crush progress.

- Senior Manager, Sales Operations - Weekly huddles to lock in goals and strategies.

- Cross-Functional Teams - Regular collabs with Product Development and Supply Chain to keep it seamless.

- Executive Leadership - Monthly check-ins to flex your wins and get the big-picture nod.



Apply Now, Own Amazon, and Shape Our Future.

Requirements

Who You Are:



- An Amazon pro with 5+ years owning a category, sales, profits, and growth in your blood.

- A proven scaler, ex-brand owner or e-commerce vet who’s built winning portfolios.

- Seller Central wizard: PPC, keyword ranking, competitive analysis, you’ve got it down.

- Data-driven, turning numbers into strategies that win.

- Inventory ace, forecast demand, cut costs, keep it tight.

- A team player who’s coachable, eager to learn our winning ways, and ready to execute big.

- Hungry to crush it, glued to trends, and relentless about results.



Benefits

Why You’ll Thrive Here:



- Own a multi-million dollar Amazon category with a team that’s got the tools and trust to help you scale.

- Join a high-growth crew that lives for innovation, data, and collective wins.

- Cash, tools, and freedom, no leash, just trust.

- Remote Full Time Work

- Flexible Schedule

- Regular Interaction with CEO

- Established Company doing business for 10+ years

- Personal Development

- Autonomy of time and schedule

- Established company, 10+ years strong, ready to soar higher with you onboard.



To formally apply, apply HERE: 
/hadley-designs/j/F8E61FA972/

title: PPC Strategist with Google Ads experience
description:
We’re hiring a data-driven PPC strategist to manage and grow Amazon Advertising across two consumer product brands (Premium Mixology and  Sports Compression Apparel). Combined monthly ad spend exceeds $100,000 across US, UK, and Canada.



Here’s what makes this different: we’re not looking for someone who already knows everything about Amazon Ads. We’re looking for someone who is exceptionally strong with data and has proven PPC experience on other platforms — e.g. Google Ads, Meta Ads, or similar — and wants to apply that analytical firepower to Amazon’s advertising ecosystem.



Amazon PPC has its own mechanics (keyword harvesting, match types, ASIN targeting, placement bidding), but the underlying logic — auction-based bidding, ROAS optimisation, audience targeting, creative testing — will be familiar to you. We’ll invest in training you on the Amazon-specific elements. What we can’t train is the ability to look at a data set and connect the dots that others miss.



You'll work closely with a high-level, PH-based team of 7, with regular collaboration with our Analytics Engineer, Creative Director, and Head of Operations.



** What You’ll Do **



- Learn and master Amazon Advertising across Sponsored Products, Sponsored Brands, and Sponsored Display during a structured onboarding (with support from the wider team).

- Apply your analytical skills to campaign performance data. Identifying patterns, testing hypotheses, and making data-backed decisions about where to invest and where to cut.

- Think beyond the ad platform. You’ll connect advertising performance to pricing strategy, inventory levels, organic ranking trends, and profitability. The goal is commercially intelligent advertising, not just good ROAS numbers.

- Build and maintain reporting using Power BI, Google Sheets, and custom dashboards. You’ll collaborate with our Analytics Engineer on data pipelines, but you need to be self-sufficient in pulling and analysing data.

- Develop strategic advertising plans aligned with business goals, such as product launches, seasonal pushes, profit targets, or market expansion.

- Progressively automate repetitive tasks. We want someone who naturally thinks “how can I do this faster and smarter?” and is excited about leveraging AI and automation tools over time.



** Must-Have Skills **



- 2+ years of hands-on PPC management experience on Google Ads, Meta Ads, TikTok Ads, or another major platform, managing meaningful budgets (equivalent of $20k+/month).

- Proven analytical ability: you can work with large data sets, build pivot tables, use advanced spreadsheet functions (INDEX-MATCH, VLOOKUP, array formulas), and draw actionable conclusions fro
ssy data.

- A track record of strategic thinking in PPC: you can explain your decision-making framework, not just the buttons you pressed.

- Comfort with or a strong interest in learning new ad platforms quickly. You’ll be trained on Amazon Ads, but the speed of your ramp-up depends on your curiosity and desire to learn.

- Understanding of auction-based bidding, ROAS/CPA optimisation, and conversion funnel analysis.

- Clear written and verbal communication in English.

- Philippines-based. Available to work full-time and dedicate 100% of your working hours to this role.

- Background in mathematics, statistics, computer science, economics, engineering, or a quantitative discipline from a reputable Philippine university.



** Nice-to-Haves **

(Not required, but great if you have, or are eager to learn):



- Experience with BI tools (Power BI, Tableau, Looker Studio) or data analysis beyond spreadsheets.

- Any exposure to Amazon Advertising, even if limited (e.g., helped a brand run basic Sponsored Products campaigns).

- Experience with e-commerce businesses, marketplace models, or DTC brands.

- Interest in or experience with scripting (Python, Google Apps Script), API integrations, or AI/automation tools (Claude, Gemini, ChatGPT, etc).



**What We Offer**



- $2,000–$2,500/month (PHP 120,000–150,000), DOE and assessment performance, with growth potential as you skill up. 

- A structured onboarding programme to get you up to speed on Amazon Advertising, supported by a handover from the outgoing PPC Manager.

- Fully remote role with flexible hours (core overlap with the team required).

- A dedicated, single-portfolio role. You work on two brands, deeply. No client juggling.

- A team that invests in data infrastructure (BigQuery Database, Power BI, Amazon API integrations). You won’t be flying blind with our high-level team.

- Real strategic ownership with accountability - no micro-managing. We want someone who shapes the direction. Your performance gets seen. Your voice matters.

- Growth path into Amazon PPC mastery and AI-assisted campaign management.

- HMO, 13th-month pay, and paid leave (details confirmed at offer stage).



** Why This Might Be the Right Move for You **



If you’re a sharp PPC professional on Google or Meta but feel you’ve hit a ceiling, Amazon Advertising is a mature yet continually evolving ad platform. The skills are highly transferable, the demand for strategic Amazon PPC talent far outstrips supply, and mastering it now positions you at the cutting edge of e-commerce advertising.



We’ll invest in your transition. In return, we’re looking for someone who’s genuinely excited about learning the ecosystem and committing to growing with us.



** Who This Role Isn’t For **



- If you’re currently managing multiple freelance clients and looking to add another, stop reading. We demand 100% dedication.

- If your PPC strategy is just ROAS-based bid adjustments and negative keywords, this isn't for you. We need deep, strategic thinkers.

- If you’re not interested in learning a new platform from the ground up, move on. This role requires genuine curiosity and commitment to mastering Amazon Ads.



** How to Apply **



Ready for a new challenge? If this role resonates with you and you possess the necessary skills, apply today by completing the form below. You can save your progress and return later to finish or edit your application if needed.



Apply via this link:

title: Senior Amazon PPC Strategist & Ads Manager | Data-Driven Advertising Specialist
description:
We’re hiring a strategic Amazon PPC expert to fully own advertising for two growing consumer product brands (Premium Mixology and Sports Compression Apparel). Combined monthly ad spend exceeds $100,000 across US, UK, and Canada.



We aren’t looking for another ACOS optimizer, but instead a full-on strategizer. You will d
 where and why we invest, define success, and execute/adapt the strategy using data. You'll work closely with a high-level, PH-based team of 7, and regularly collaborate with our Analytics Engineer, Creative Director, and Head of Operations.



If you want to focus deeply on two heavily-invested brands instead of spreading thin, this role is for you. You MUST be full-time and exclusive; no agency or freelance setups managing multiple clients. Serious applications only, looking to push the limits of our dual-brand advertising operation.



** What You’ll Do **



- Own the full PPC strategy across all Amazon ad types (SP, SB, SBV, and SD) for both brands. You will define the direction, build campaigns, adjust based on data, and drive results.

- Analyze performance data across multiple dimensions. Go beyond ACOS to evaluate TACoS, contribution margin, impression share, placement performance, keyword-level conversion trends, organic vs. sponsored ranking, and competitor dynamics.

- Connect PPC strategy to commercial factors like pricing, inventory, and organic ranking. Adjust your bid and budget strategies based on stock levels, price changes, and overall business goals—think commercially, not just in terms of ad metrics.

- Build and maintain robust reporting using Power BI and Google Sheets. While you'll collaborate with our Analytics Engineer on data pipelines, you must be comfortable pulling, manipulating, and presenting data independently.

- Develop comprehensive quarterly and monthly PPC plans that align with broader business goals, including product launches, seasonal pushes, profit targets, and market share objectives.

- Identify and implement opportunities to automate repetitive tasks. Over time, leverage AI and automation tools to scale your impact. This is a growth expectation, not a day-one requirement.



** Must-Have Skills **



- 3–5 years of hands-on Amazon PPC experience, managing $50k+/month in ad spend.

- Deep familiarity with the Amazon Ads console, campaign structures, match types, bidding strategies, placement modifiers, and use of bulk operations files.

- Experience with at least one third-party Amazon PPC tool (Pacvue, Scale Insights, Perpetua, Quartile, or similar).

- Strong analytical skills: You’re comfortable with pivot tables, INDEX-MATCH/VLOOKUP, and building data models in spreadsheets.

- Ability to think strategically: You can explain why you made a decision, not just what you did.

- Experience with Helium 10 or equivalent for keyword research and competitor analysis.

- Clear written and verbal communication in English.

- Philippines-based. Available to work full-time and dedicate 100% of your working hours to this role.

- Background in mathematics, statistics, computer science, economics, engineering, or a quantitative discipline from a reputable Philippine university.



** Nice-to-Haves **

(Not required, but great if you have, or are eager to learn):



- Experience with Power BI, Tableau, or Looker Studio.

- Familiarity with the Amazon Advertising API.

- Experience managing PPC across multiple Amazon marketplaces (US, UK, Canada).

- Understanding of contribution margin and unit economics at the SKU level.

- Interest in AI tools (Claude, Gemini or ChatGPT), automation, or scripting (Python, Google Apps Script) for campaign management.



**What We Offer**



- $2,400–$3,200/month (PHP 140,000–190,000), DOE and assessment performance.

- Fully remote role with flexible hours (core overlap with the team required).

- Dedication: You work on two brands, deeply. No client juggling.

- A team that invests in data infrastructure (BigQuery Database, Power BI, Amazon API integrations). You won’t be flying blind with our high-level team.

- Real strategic ownership with accountability - no micro-managing. Your recommendations get implemented. Your performance gets seen. Your voice matters.

- Growth path into PPC automation and AI-assisted campaign management.

- HMO, 13th-month pay, and paid leave.



** Who This Role Isn’t For **



We want to be upfront so we don’t waste your time or ours:

- If you're juggling 5+ brands as a freelancer, stop reading. We demand 100% dedication.

- If your PPC strategy is just ACOS-based bid adjustments and negative keywords, this isn't for you. We need deep, strategic thinkers.

- If you follow a fixed playbook, move on. Our strategy is dynamic, data-driven, and constantly evolving.



** How to Apply **



Ready for a new challenge? If this role resonates with you and you possess the necessary skills, apply today by completing the form below. You can save your progress and return later to finish or edit your application if needed.



Apply via this link:

title: Mobile Developer (React Native / Expo)
description:
About the Role 



Our application is a location-based mobile app for group coordination: real-time maps, group and direct messaging, voice calls, social feeds, and automotive convoy management. We need a strong React Native / Expo developer to own feature work, performance, and architecture — and to use Cursor as a primary development tool for fast, high-quality first passes. You’ll work across the full mobile stack (UI, real-time, maps, voice, push) and collaborate on architecture and refactors. 



Key Responsibilities 



- Feature development – Build and ship new features across maps, chat, voice, and convoy flows. 

- Performance & architecture – Refactor large screens, optimize lists, reduce re-renders, and improve startup/scroll performance. 

- AI-assisted development – Use Cursor for rapid first passes, code generation, and refactors; review and refine AI output for correctness and best practices. 

- Platform parity – Ensure solid behavior on both iOS and Android with appropriate use of Platform.OS and platform-specific modules. 

- Backend integration – Implement and maintain Firebase (Auth, Firestore, RTDB, Storage, Cloud Functions). 

- Real-time features – Work with Firebase RTDB, LiveKit (voice), and push/VoIP flows. 

- Code quality – Write clear, maintainable TypeScript; follow existing conventions; add tests where appropriate. 



Required Qualifications 



Must-Have 



- 3+ years production experience with React Native and Expo (including expo-dev-client, native modules, and EAS builds). 

- TypeScript fluency (strict mode, generics, path aliases). 

- Firebase experience: Auth, Firestore, Realtime Database, Storage, and ideally Cloud Functions. 

- AI-assisted development – Comfort using Cursor (or similar) for first-pass implementation, refactoring, and exploration. You should be able to evaluate and improve AI suggestions. 

- Solid understanding of React patterns: hooks, context, memoization, and state management. 

- Shipped apps on both iOS and Android. 

- Familiarity with Git workflows (branching, PRs, code review). 



Strongly Preferred 



- LiveKit or other WebRTC-based voice/video integration. 

- Mapbox (or similar) for maps, markers, and navigation. 

- expo-router or comparable React Navigation setups. 

- Performance tuning – Profiling, list virtualization (e.g., Flash List), 
mo, re-render reduction. 

- Push notifications (FCM, expo-notifications) and/or VoIP (e.g., CallKeep). 

- Experience working in a single-backend architecture (e.g., Firebase as primary backend). 



Nice-to-Have 



- Firebase Cloud Functions (Node.js, TypeScript). 

- React Native New Architecture (Fabric, TurboModules). 

- Geospatial work (geohashing, location services, clustering). 

- CarPlay or similar platform extensions. 

- Experience with AI pair-programming beyond Cursor. 



Tech Stack 



- Technologies > Framework : React Native 0.79, Expo SDK 53  

- Language : TypeScript (strict)  

- Routing  : expo-router (file-based)  

- Backend : Firebase (Auth, Firestore, RTDB, Storage, Cloud Functions)  

- Real-time : Firebase RTDB, LiveKit (voice)  

- Maps : Mapbox 
  

- Build/Deploy : EAS (Expo Application Services)  



What Success Looks Like 



- Delivering features quickly and reliably using Cursor for first drafts. 

- Measurable performance improvements (smoother scrolling, faster startup, fewer janks). 

- Clearer, more maintainable structure (e.g., breaking up very large screens). 

- Consistent behavior on both iOS and Android. 

- High-quality, well-structured TypeScript and React code.

title: Paralegal/Attorney – Criminal Defense
description:
Position Overview:

We are seeking a skilled and detail-oriented Paralegal or Attorney to support our criminal defense practice. This role requires in-depth knowledge of criminal law, including motion preparation, legal research, and document management. The ideal candidate will be responsible for preparing motions, drafting legal documents, and ensuring compliance with legal procedures. They will work closely with attorneys to ensure the defense strategy is executed effectively, and help prepare cases for court. This is a remote position requiring exceptional written English, organizational skills, and a strong grasp of U.S. criminal law procedures fundamentals.



Key Responsibilities:

• Draft, review, and be prepared to file various legal documents including motions, briefs, and memoranda.

• Prepare appendices for motions, including organizing exhibits, declarations, and supporting documentation.

• Prepare the table of contents for legal filings, ensuring accuracy and compliance with court rules.

• Conduct in-depth legal research on complex criminal law issues and generate a research summary for the attorney.

• Analyze discovery materials to identify critical issues and inconsistencies.

• Prepare memoranda and case summaries to aid in litigation strategy.

• Assist in the preparation of motions for hearings, trials, and appeals, including motions to suppress evidence, dismiss charges, or modify bail.

• Manage case files, ensuring all relevant documents and evidence are properly documented and stored.

• Prepare discovery responses, subpoenas, and other legal documents as directed.

• Coordinate with clients, witnesses, and experts to gather information and evidence for cases.

• Maintain communication with the court, opposing counsel, and clients regarding motions, hearings, and court dates.

• Provide support during trial preparation, including organizing exhibits, trial briefs, and witness lists.

• Ensure all legal documents comply with applicable state and federal rules and deadlines.



Qualifications:

• Paralegal Certificate or Law Degree (JD) required.

• Proven experience in criminal defense law, specifically in motion practice.

• Strong knowledge of court rules, procedures, and legal writing standards.

• Experience preparing appendices, tables of contents, and organizing large case files.

• Excellent research, analytical, and writing skills.

• Ability to manage multiple cases and meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment.

• Strong communication skills and attention to detail.

• Experience with legal research tools (e.g.,Lexis/Nexis and Westlaw) and document management software, such as Clio CRM software.



Preferred:

• Prior experience in criminal defense law or litigation.

• Knowledge of specific motions in criminal defense, including motions to suppress, dismiss, and motions for bond 

        reductions.

• Familiarity with Nevada local court rules and procedures in criminal defense.



Application Process:

Interested candidates should submit the following:

• An updated resume.

• A cover letter detailing your experience with U.S. criminal law and Clio software.

• Two writing samples (legal motions or briefs preferred) with how long it required the applicant to finalize the presented 

        document (in hours) from the time the assignment was given to the document presented.

title: Video Editor
description:
Short Form Caption & Visual Editor (Subtitles + B-Roll for TikTok / Reels / Shorts)



We are looking for a detail-oriented editor who specializes in subtitles and visual overlays for short-form social media videos.



This role is part of a team editing workflow.



You will receive a completed rough cut from our story editor, and your job is to add:



• engaging captions

• highlighted keywords

• supporting B-roll and overlays



Typical video length: 30–60 seconds



Your Responsibilities



Captions:

• generate subtitles

• correct grammar and timing

• apply brand caption styles

• highlight key words for emphasis

• add light caption animations



Visual Enhancements:

• add basic B-roll when a result or transformation is mentioned

• overlay supporting visuals while the speaker talks

• place before/after clips when referenced in dialogue



Caption Styling Rules



• use 2–3 font styles maximum

• highlight important words with color or bold text

• use drag and drop captions effects provided by us



Example caption styling:



“This product saved us HOURS every week.”



Where HOURS is:

• highlighted

• slightly scaled

• briefly animated



B-Roll & Overlay Guidelines



Use B-roll when:

• the speaker references a result

• a transformation is mentioned

• showing context improves clarity



Examples:

• before/after clips

• product usage footage

• finished results

• process visuals



Expected Output



Each video should include:

• styled captions

• keyword emphasis

• supporting visuals

• smooth basic visual flow



Software Required



• Adobe Premiere Pro



To Apply Please Send



3 short-form videos where you added captions and overlays



how long it takes you to caption a 45–60 second video



your hourly or monthly rate



Bonus if you have edited TikTok / Instagram Reels testimonial content.



To confirm you read the post, include the word CREATOR at the start of your application.

title: AI Systems Engineer (Claude-Centered Research Systems)
description:
AI Systems Engineer (Claude-Centered Research Systems)



Overview



Upside Auction is building a structured AI infrastructure to power real estate auction intelligence at scale as we expand into more states and properties.



We are seeking our first dedicated AI Systems Engineer / AI Engineer to architect and implement a Claude-centered research system that automates:



1. Foreclosure and lien research

2. Title and legal document analysis

3. Court notice and deed parsing

4. Property-level research and information gathering

5. CRM and workflow automation tied to AVP and HubSpot



We are looking for a builder who can design, deploy, and operationalize real-world LLM systems inside a production workflow, with hands-on implementation, setup, and virtual environment deployment experience.



Anthropic Claude will serve as the central orchestration layer (“bot manager”) for research and decision-support processes, coordinating AI agents to perform tasks.



What You’ll Build



You will design and deploy a scalable AI research infrastructure that:



1. Acts as an internal AI research assistant for property and auction data

2. Automates foreclosure, lien, and broader legal/title research workflows

3. Coordinates AI agents to:

   3.1 Retrieve documents from multiple external sites and tools

   3.2 Summarize and validate results

   3.3 Flag mismatches (e.g., wrong document numbers, wrong property)

4. Parses and extracts structured data from:

   4.1 Court filings and notices

   4.2 Notices of sale

   4.3 Deeds and title documents

   4.4 Legal PDFs and scanned documents

5. Integrates directly with:

   5.1 Internal data sources and research tools

   5.2 AVP workflows

   5.3 HubSpot CRM

6. Maintains structured logs, audit trails, and validation checks so humans can quickly review and correct edge cases

7. Optimizes cost and performance of LLM usage as we scale to hundreds of properties



You will help move Upside Auction from manual, research-heavy workflows (multiple people, many minutes per property) to structured, AI-assisted research systems.



Key Responsibilities



1. Architect Claude-centered LLM workflows for legal/property research and document handling

2. Design system prompts and multi-step reasoning chains for:

   2.1 Document retrieval

   2.2 Structured extraction

   2.3 Validation and error detection

3. Build document parsing pipelines (PDF, OCR, text extraction, structured output)

4. Implement:

   4.1 Error handling and retry logic

   4.2 Validation layers to catch issues like mis-labeled or mis-indexed documents

   4.3 Task feedback loops between AI agents and the Claude “manager” bot

5. Deploy and maintain services in virtual/cloud environments (virtual terminals/VMs)

6. Integrate LLM outputs into:

   6.1 HubSpot CRM workflows

   6.2 AVP and internal automation systems

   6.3 Internal folders and knowledge repositories

7. Implement monitoring, logging, and cost tracking for AI usage

8. Document:

   8.1 System architecture

   8.2 Installation and configuration steps (virtual terminals/environments)

   8.3 Operational playbooks for non-technical tea
mbers

9. Work directly with leadership and research staff to translate current manual research processes into robust AI-powered workflows



You will own this function end-to-end and will be building this as a fresh project.



Required Skills & Experience



1. Production experience implementing Anthropic Claude (real workflows, not demos)

2. Experience with OpenAI GPT/Codex or comparable LLM APIs

3. Proven ability to design and ship production systems independently

4. Strong skills in Python (preferred) or JavaScript/TypeScript

5. Comfortable with Linux, virtual environments, and cloud/VM deployment

6. Experience building API integrations and document processing pipelines (PDF/OCR/structured extraction)

7. Working knowledge of databases and structured data modeling

8. Ability to translate manual business processes into automated, agent-driven workflows

9. Clear technical documentation and communication skills



Nice-to-Have



1. Experience designing agentic or multi-step LLM systems

2. Familiarity with RAG, vector databases, or retrieval systems

3. Experience integrating with HubSpot or similar CRMs

4. Exposure to LLMOps / monitoring / prompt versioning

5. Background in real estate, foreclosure, title, or legal-tech workflows

6. Startup experience with full ownership of systems



Send us your resume and portfolio to apply.

title: U.S. Tax Manager
description:
Essential Functions

• Review and manage staff deliverables including tax returns, extensions, tax planning calculations, and write-up work for all entity types (C-Corp, S-Corp, Partnership, Fiduciary, Non-Profit, gift, multi state and TX franchise).

• Review Compiled financial statements for Corporations, Not for Profit entities, Partnerships, and Individuals, including workpapers, accounting and adjusting entries, bank reconciliations, and client books and records.

• Prepare and review complex tax planning projections for individual and corporate estimated tax liability.

• Manage and monitor client deliverables and due dates.

• Prepare complex U.S. and multi-state income tax returns for business entities, including consolidated and non-consolidated C-corporations, S-Corporations, Partnerships, Fiduciary, and Non-Profit Organizations.  

• Prepare complex U.S. and state individual income, gift tax, and estate tax returns.  

• Conduct complex tax research and prepare memorandum outlining findings and conclusions.

• Respond to IRS and state agency audits, inquires, and tax notices.  Communicate with IRS and clients in connection with audits, inquires, and tax notices.

• Delegate projects to staff that can handle them most efficiently and provide accounting and tax assistance to staff as needed.

• Communicate directly with existing clients, colleagues, management, and IRS representatives regarding various tax matters.  

• Assist with business development efforts, including but not limited to, meeting with prospective clients, preparing fee quotes and proposals, and evaluating clients’ needs.

• Lead department in knowledge of software, processes, and workflows.

• Assist with employee training for new hires and ongoing employee training.  

• Engage in consulting and special projects as requested by Management and Clients.



Required Education & Experience

• CPA certification required.

• Bachelor’s degree in accounting.

• Minimum of five to seven years of experience preparing all types of tax returns with a public CPA firm.

.

title: Quality Assurance (QA) Manager - Home Care Operations
description:
Job Title

Quality Assurance (QA) Manager – Home Care Operations



Location: Remote (Philippines preferred)

Company: OPA Home Care

Reports To: Director of Operations



Role Overview

OPA Home Care is seeking a Quality Assurance Manager responsible for ensuring operational accuracy across our core service workflows.



This role functions as the final quality gate before operational work reaches leadership.



The QA Manager will review operational outputs, identify process failures, and ensure that work produced by the operations tea
ets OPA’s standards for accuracy, completeness, and professionalism.



The position is process-oriented and requires strong attention to detail, structured thinking, and the ability to enforce standards consistently.



Core Responsibilities

The QA Manager is responsible for quality control across the following operational areas:



Referral and Intake

Review referral intake records for accuracy and completeness



Verify correct client demographic and service data



Ensure referral documentation is properly recorded in the system



Scheduling

Audit caregiver schedules for accuracy and coverage



Verify caregiver assignments match client care plans



Review missed-shift i
 and identify process failures



Documentation

Review caregiver visit notes for completeness and accuracy



Ensure documentation meets operational and compliance standards



Track missing or incomplete documentation



Billing Preparation

Verify visit data and documentation required for billing



Ensure service records are accurate before submission



Quality Reporting

Maintain a QA tracking system identifying recurring operational errors



Produce weekly quality reports for operations leadership



Recommend process improvements when errors repeat



Key Outcomes

The QA Manager is accountable for the following outcomes:



Metric Target

Operational documentation accuracy 100%

Referral intake accuracy 100%

Scheduling audit compliance 100%

Error detection before leadership review >95%

The QA Manager ensures work is correct before it reaches leadership review.



Required Qualifications

3+ years experience in quality assurance, auditing, or operational review



Experience reviewing administrative workflows or documentation



Strong attention to detail and ability to detect errors



Strong written English communication



Comfortable working with operational systems and spreadsheets



Experience with healthcare operations, BPO quality assurance, or administrative auditing preferred



Preferred Experience

Experience in one or more of the following areas is strongly preferred:



Home care or healthcare operations



Quality assurance in BPO environments



Medical documentation review



Operational compliance auditing



Skills Required

Structured thinking



High attention to detail



Ability to enforce operational standards



Strong organizational discipline



Ability to identify root causes of recurring operational errors



Work Style

This role requires someone who:



notices small inconsistencies others overlook



prefers structured processes and checklists



is comfortable enforcing quality standards



takes ownership of accuracy and process improvement



About OPA Home Care

OPA Home Care provides in-home care services to older adults and individuals who require assistance with daily living.



Our company is built around the following core values:



Attention to Detail



Reliability



Strong Work Ethic



Efficiency



Coachability



Self-Starter mindset



Lagniappe – delivering a little extra



We are building systems that ensure every client receives dependable, high-quality care.



Compensation

Compensation is competitive and based on experience.



Typical range for this role:



Location Monthly

Philippines $1,200 – $1,500 / month

Application Instructions

Applicants should submit:



Resume



Short description of prior QA or operational review experience



Example of a process or workflow they have improved



Hiring Filter (Important)

Candidates who succeed in this role typically demonstrate:



exceptional attention to detail



comfort identifying operational mistakes



discipline in following structured processes



This role is not a customer service position. It is a process accuracy and quality control role.



Optional Enhancement (Strongly Recommended)

Add a screening test to the job posting.



Example:



Give applicants a sample operational document with errors and ask them to identify mistakes.



This dramatically improves hiring quality for QA roles.

title: TikTok Manager
description:
Job Description: TikTok Head of Commerce 



Company: Burman Enterprise 



Location: Remote

Job Type: Full-Time

Schedule: Flexible, but must cover 4PM-8PM PH Time.





Company Overview:



We are a leading Amazon brand aggregator operating in the U.S., Canada, the U.K., and across the EU. Our mission is to acquire, scale, and optimize e-commerce brands, transforming them into market leaders. We leverage expertise in product development, creative design, data analytics, supply chain management, and PPC strategy to ensure our brands outperform the competition. With a data-driven mindset, cutting-edge technology, and a culture of innovation, we continuously push boundaries to create best-in-class brands that thrive in the ever-evolving e-commerce landscape.



About the Role: 





We aren't looking for a "manager" to maintain the status quo; we are looking for a visionary growth architect. As the Head of TikTok Commerce, your primary mandate is to build the TikTok department from the ground up and scale it to achieve a 20x profit increase.

This is a high-stakes, high-reward role for a leader who treats the department like their own business. You will own the entire P&L (Profit & Loss), ensuring that every creative, every influencer partnership, and every ad dollar is a calculated move toward massive profitability. You aren't just creating campaigns; you are building a profit machine.



Key Responsibilities

Departmental Architecture & P&L Ownership

Build from Scratch: Recruit, hire, and train a world-class TikTok team (outreach, creative, and ops).

P&L Management: Total accountability for the department’s financial health, managing budgets, margins, and overhead to hit our 20x profit target.

KPI Definition: Establish the North Star metrics that define success for every sub-function of the department.

Commerce & Operations Oversight

End-to-End Operations: Manage TikTok Shop logistics, product uploads, and inventory flow in coordination with global suppliers.

Resource Management: Oversee the sourcing of creatives, props, and materials to ensure the production engine never stops.

Marketing & Aggressive Growth Strategy

20x Profit Strategy: Develop and execute the roadmap to scale TikTok from a secondary channel to a dominant profit center.

Influencer & Ads Synergy: Lead paid advertising (TikTok Ads Manager) and influencer seeding strategies to ensure maximum ROAS and viral potential.

Creative Direction & Data Analysis

High-Velocity Creative: Oversee UGC and branded content production, ensuring every piece of content is engineered for conversion.

Data-Driven Pivots: Use deep-dive analytics to provide regular reporting and pivot strategies instantly based on real-time performance data.

Core Qualifications

Proven TikTok Mastery: You have a track record of scaling TikTok Shop or TikTok-first brands—specifically in a leadership capacity.

Financial Acumen: You understand a P&L statement as well as you understand a viral hook. You know how to balance aggressive growth with healthy margins.

Team Builder: Experience building and managing remote teams in a fast-paced e-commerce environment.

Entrepreneurial Grit: You thrive in "day zero" environments where you have to create the systems and processes yourself.

Platform Expertise: Expert-level knowledge of TikTok Shop, Ads Manager, and the current influencer ecosystem.

Benefits

Profit Sharing: Performance-based bonuses and profit-sharing opportunities tied to your department's growth.

Stock Options: Share in the long-term success of Burman Enterprise.

Time Off: 12 days annual leave (cash-convertible) + 9 paid PH holidays + Birthday leave.

Health: HMO coverage upon completion of probation.

Education: 4 hours of company-sponsored learning per week to keep your skills sharp.

Culture: Local and international team-building trips.



Technical Setup Requirements

Internet: Stable high-speed connection (minimum 20 Mbps, with backup).

Hardware: * Minimum Intel Core i5 (10th Gen) or AMD Ryzen 5.

16 GB RAM / 512 GB Storage.

title: Google Ads & Performance Specialist — Premium Australian DTC Brand
description:
Who We Are:

MOD Appliances makes the MOD Cold Press Juicer and MOD Cold Press Auto+,  a premium cold press juicer sold direct to consumers across Australia. We have a loyal and growing customer base, a strong creative team producing high-quality video and static assets, and we're scaling our paid channels deliberately.

We run lean. Everyone owns their area. No micromanagement, no hand-holding.



The Opportunity

This is a part-time retainer — approximately 15 hours per month — for a specialist who wants one clean, well-structured account to own alongside their existing clients.

You'll work directly with our Creative Performance Lead who supplies ready-to-use video and static assets, and our Operations Coordinator who handles site updates. You won't be starting from scratch or working in a vacuum.

One product. One market. Clear goals. Real growth path as we launch new products and markets.



What You'll Own



- Full ownership of Performance Max, Shopping, and Search campaigns

-Google Merchant Center health — feed errors and disapprovals resolved before we notice them

-YouTube paid ad setup and optimisation using assets our creative team provides

-Bid strategy, budget management, and negative keyword refinement

-Search query analysis — surfacing insights that feed back to our creative team

-Weekly Slack updates and monthly GA4 performance deep-dives

-Monthly CRO suggestions for our Shopify product page



You're The Right Person If You:



-Have hands-on PMax experience with eCommerce or DTC brands

-Know Google Merchant Center, GA4, and Google Tag Manager deeply

-Understand what makes a strong PMax asset group and can give clear feedback to our creative team

-Spot issues before being asked — broken tracking, disapproved products, underperforming assets

-Send clear, insight-driven Slack updates — not just numbers

-Want a stable long-term retainer, not one-off projects





What You Won't Do



Create videos or static images — our creative team handles all assets

Manage organic YouTube

Wait to be told something needs fixing



Hours & Compensation



-15 hours per month to start (roughly 3–4 hours per week)

-Fixed monthly retainer paid via Wise or PayPal

-Rate based on experience — tell us what you're looking for

-Hours grow naturally as we scale products and markets

-Direct relationship — no platform taking a cut of your rate





How To Apply

Three things only:



One or two accounts you currently manage or have managed — what you did and what improved

One result you're proud of — doesn't need to be massive, just genuine

Your timezone, availability, and rate expectation



No long cover letters. Show us you know your craft.

title: ***URGENT HIRING! Customer Service Representative for Amazon FBA and Walmart WFS - Full Training Provided***
description:
Job Title: Customer Service Representative



As a Customer Service representative, you will be responsible for providing exceptional customer service and support to our clients through phone and non-phone interactions. You will serve as a vital link between our company and our customers, addressing inquiries, resolving issues, and ensuring a positive customer experience. This role is critical to maintaining and enhancing our reputation for excellent customer service.



Key Responsibilities:

1. Phone and
 Customer Support: Handle calls and
s from customers with professionalism and courtesy, actively listening to their concerns and providing solutions or information.

2. Issue Resolution: Investigate and resolve customer inquiries, complaints, or issues efficiently, striving for a first-call resolution whenever possible.

3. Product Knowledge: Develop in-depth knowledge of our products or services to provide accurate information and guidance to customers.

4. Documentation: Maintain detailed and accurate records of customer interactions, including the nature of the inquiry and the steps taken to resolve it.

5. Customer Education: Offer guidance, instructions, and information to customers to help them make informed decisions and use our products effectively.

6. Upselling and Cross-Selling: Identify opportunities to promote additional products or services to customers and achieve upselling and cross-selling targets.

7. Quality Assurance: Ensure that all interactions meet or exceed company standards for quality, professionalism, and customer satisfaction.

8. Adherence to Policies: Follow company policies and procedures, especially in cases of customer returns, refunds, or warranty claims.

9. Team Collaboration: Work closely with other tea ---------- mbers and departments to address complex customer issues and provide comprehensive solutions.

10. Feedback Loop: Provide feedback and insights to the management team regarding recurring customer issues, potential improvements, and market trends.

11. Adhoc: If there are not many calls, help with research and ad-hoc tasks



Qualifications:

- Previous experience in customer service (minimum 2 years).

- Excellent verbal and written communication skills.

- Active listening and empathy in dealing with customer inquiries.

- Strong problem-solving abilities and patience.

- Ability to adapt to changing customer needs and business requirements.

- Willingness to work flexible hours, including evenings, weekends, and holidays as required.



Attributes:

- Strong customer focus and dedication to delivering exceptional service.

- Ability to remain calm under pressure and handle difficult or upset customers with professionalism.

- Positive attitude, reliability, and a willingness to go the extra mile to ensure customer satisfaction.

- Strong interpersonal and teamwork skills.

- Adaptability and the ability to learn quickly and apply new knowledge to support customer needs.



In this role, you will play a crucial part in ensuring our customers receive the support they need, which contributes to our company's success and growth. If you are passionate about providing exceptional customer service and enjoy resolving customer inquiries via phone, we encourage you to apply for the position of Customer Service Phone Support. Join our team and help us maintain our commitment to customer satisfaction.





Other Details (MUST READ):



This is not a regular job post for you just to make some money and for me to get a “virtual assistant”. This is very different. I am not looking for just “another VA”, I am looking for somebody who always strives for excellence, pushes for more, and never settles for mediocrity. I am looking for a reliable teammate to build the last and long-term relationship with, and to grow and make money together. I am looking for someone who can step into bigger shoes, try new things, and assume meaningful responsibilities! This is a CAREER OPPORTUNITY, there will be many growth opportunities, for a salary increase and bonuses! I truly believe in integrity and fairness, so I always will be more than happy to reward outstanding work. Though you will start with just a few responsibilities and lower pay, later on, it will ultimately be up to you to d ---------- whether you want to widen your set of responsibilities and increase the pay accordingly!



I recognize nothing but excellence. Please DO NOT apply for this job post if you are okay with average, and want to “coast”. I expect your full effort in anything, whether it is just sending a simple
 or something more complex. My expectations are high but so are the rewards. Don’t worry though, I am not expecting you to come in and be a superstar from the first Day. I will provide sufficient training and there will be plenty of opportunities to ask questions and to clarify things, and I would be very happy to go through everything and anything. I expect some mistakes and a learning curve in the beginning, it is fine as everybody makes them. As long as you learn from them and never repeat the same mistake twice! Once you get some time and practice, I expect you to be excellent at it and always over-deliver. I do not micro-manage and won’t be a crazy “boss”. I just give you the job and expect excellent results. Anything else outside of it is not my business (how exactly you have done it, when etc). At the end of the day, I want you to truly be able to say that you’ve realized your potential.



I believe in fair compensation and creating an environment where people can be successful. At the same time, I don’t want people that need a lot of hand-holding. I expect that the people we hire can hit the ground running and start making an impact immediately.



I am very reasonable, fair, and flexible. More than happy to provide vacation time, sick days off, bonuses, flexible schedules, really anything, as long it makes sense. Nobody takes advantage of anybody. As long as the job gets done at the best level, and everything is fair to everyone, I am more than happy to discuss anything. I am also more than happy to be wrong, because we are not always right, and we take our mistakes very seriously too. So there will be plenty of room for discussing this type of thing.



This is a great opportunity to build the whole career! As I mentioned there will be plenty of opportunities to grow, to learn new skills, to get rewarded and even to get management positions! You will be given meaningful responsibilities as I will be hiring more people and growing a bigger team! It will ultimately be up to you to d ---------- , how much work you want to put in, how hard to try, and how far to grow! Even the sky is not the limit! I can’t wait to start working together with you! I can’t wait to see the leader you will become.



If you are interested and think this is for you then please apply to this message by having your subject line as "Never Settle for Mediocrity” and then tell me about yourself. Also, answer ALL of the following questions:



-What kind of employer do you like the best?

-Do you have suggestions to make this project run successfully?

-Why should I hire you?

-What is your expected salary? (40 work hours a week)

-Do you have any previous experience working for an Amazon or e-commerce business? If yes, specify the details.

-Do you have any previous experience with customer service (mainly
s)? If yes, specify the details.

-What other experiences/skills do you have that would allow you to do well in this position?

-What are 3 values that describe your character?



About myself:

My name is Kevin and I am working for a company that is a firm that runs Amazon businesses in the USA. We currently sell Supplements. I am a very easygoing and friendly guy in my personal life. However when it comes to business I am very strict and demanding and accept nothing but excellence from MYSELF, so I would expect the same from others. At the same time, I am very fair, open-minded, reasonable, patient, and willing to listen and compromise. Highly open to new ideas and suggestions. Truly believe in integrity and trust. I always appreciate honesty and transparency, so no matter what it is, just bring it up to me and we can talk about it. In my spare time, I like going to the gym, eating, and reading.



If you think you have what it takes, I Look forward to speaking with you.



Kevin

title: Social Community Manager
description:
About Dulcedo



Dulcedo Management began as a high-profile modeling agency and has since evolved into the largest multidisciplinary talent management group in Canada and a leading force in North America. With a steadfast commitment to excellence, our reach extends across all spheres of entertainment, from our offices in Montreal and Toronto to remote collaborations worldwide.



Our talented team of Agents and Account Managers represent and manage the national and international careers of over 500 models, hundreds of Olympic and professional athletes, top-tier digital influencers, content creators, and streamers.



Dulcedo is, above all, a community of incredible individuals who “work hard but play harder.” Our team is united, welcoming, and inclusive, with company culture remaining a top priority. Proudly certified as a Great Place to Work for two consecutive years, our mission is to empower our employees by creating an environment where work feels motivating, creative, and meaningful.



The Opportunity

We’re looking for a strategic, culture-driven, and highly engaged Community Manager to nurture and grow our digital and talent-facing communities. This role is ideal for someone who understands the creator economy, thrives in fast-paced environments, and genuinely loves building meaningful relationships online and offline. You’ll play a key role in strengthening engagement between Dulcedo, our talents, our audiences, and our partners - ensuring our community feels connected, inspired, and aligned with our brand voice.



As Dulcedo continues expanding its international presence, this position offers real opportunity to shape how we cultivate and activate our community at scale.



Scope of Work

Community Engagement & Growth

Build and nurture relationships with our talents, creators, and digital audiences.

Actively engage across social platforms (Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, LinkedIn, etc.), responding to comments, DMs, and community inquiries.

Develop initiatives to increase engagement, loyalty, and brand affinity.

Identify emerging creators, cultural trends, and community opportunities.

Monitor audience sentiment and feedback.

Assist in organizing online and in-person community activations when required.

Track engagement, growth, and community performance metrics.

Analyze trends and provide insights to optimize strategy.

Prepare monthly community reports with actionable recommendations.





Your Profile

+5 years of experience in community management, social media, or influencer marketing.

Strong understanding of social media platforms and digital culture.

Exceptional communication skills (written and verbal) in English

Strong organizational skills: you're a pro at managing tasks & staying on top of priorities.

Excellent time management and a proactive attitude.

Familiar with Canva for simple design tasks like templates and formatting.

Positive, personable, approachable and you enjoy being part of a collaborative team!



Work Parameters & Perks of Working with Dulcedo

Schedule: Full-time

Work hours aligned with Eastern Time Zone

13th month pay to reward your dedication!

Opportunities to grow. As we build our remote team, you’ll have chances to expand your role!

Mentorship & support because we prioritize people, learning, and your success.

A fun, dynamic environment where collaboration and creativity are part of daily life.

Work from home with a full-time schedule synced with the Eastern Time Zone.

Join a close-knit team where your work has real impact and your contributions are valued.

title: Legal Intake Specialist
description:
About Us:

Very Decent Marketer partners with leading personal injury law firms to help individuals who have recently experienced an injury find the legal support they need. As the first point of contact for prospective clients, our role is more than just fielding phone calls - we’re providing a compassionate and reassuring presence during a difficult time. We’re passionate about delivering excellent service, fostering meaningful connections, and ultimately guiding people toward the legal help they deserve.



Position Overview:

As a Legal Intake Specialist, you will be at the forefront of our client outreach efforts. Your primary responsibility is to engage with individuals who have suffered injuries and are exploring their legal options. Through a combination of active listening, empathy, and clear communication, you’ll help them understand how our partner law firms can assist. While empathy and emotional intelligence are crucial in this role, you will also need the confidence and energy to “sell” our services. Your goal is to create a positive first impression, instill trust, and help prospective clients take the next step toward securing legal representation.



Key Responsibilities:



Client Outreach & Communication:

*Speak directly with prospective clients over the phone, listening carefully to their stories and gathering essential information about their case.

*Engage with prospective clients through various written communication channels, including live chat, direct messages on social media platforms, and text messages, ensuring empathy, professionalism, and clear guidance at all times.

*Convey compassion, understanding, and professionalism at all times.



Emotional Support & Guidance:

*Recognize that callers may be in pain, experiencing stress, or feeling vulnerable. Respond with warmth, patience, and reassurance.

*Offer clear guidance on next steps and help them feel confident in their decision to seek legal representation.



Qualifying Leads & Intake Management:

*Assess each caller’s case eligibility based on provided criteria.

*Ask targeted questions to confirm key details and ensure that their legal needs align with our partner firms’ areas of expertise.



Persuasive Communication:

*While maintaining empathy and integrity, use your communication skills to emphasize the value and benefits of securing legal representation through our network.

*Confidently “sell” the advantages of working with our partner law firms, keeping the client’s best interests at heart.



Accurate Documentation:

*Input call details, case summaries, and other pertinent information into our intake management system with a high level of accuracy.

*Maintain organized and up-to-date client records.



Qualifications & Skills:

*Fluent in English with no detectable accent.

*Remote Work Requirements: You own a computer and headset. Ability to maintain a dedicated, quiet, and distraction-free workspace suitable for extended phone conversations, along with a reliable, high-speed internet connection to ensure clear, uninterrupted communication.

*Empathy & Emotional Intelligence: You’re naturally empathetic, genuinely care about others, and can adapt your tone and approach to different emotional states.

*Strong Listening & Communication Skills: You have a knack for making people feel heard, understood, and comfortable. Your voice is calm, reassuring, and confident.

*Persuasive & Results-Oriented: You’re a persuasive communicator who can highlight the advantages of our services and motivate prospective clients to move forward.

*Telephone Experience: You’re comfortable and confident spending the majority of your day on the phone.

*Attention to Detail: You document information accurately and thoroughly, ensuring our partner law firms have all they need to provide top-quality legal support.

*Adaptability & Resilience: You stay focused and effective even when conversations are challenging. You’re able to handle rejection or caller hesitation gracefully.

*Integrity & Professionalism: You represent our company and our partner firms with the utmost professionalism, honesty, and discretion.



PLEASE INCLUDE WITH YOUR APPLICATION: 

A voice recording of you reading the following message - "Hi, my name is [Name]. I am interested in the position of Legal Intake Specialist. I have a computer, a fast internet connection, and as you can hear in this message, I speak English very clearly. I hope to hear from you soon"

title: Shopify Web Developer - CRO Specialist - Ecommerce Advertising Agency - Full Time 4b
description:
APPLY ON MY WEBSITE TO BE CONSIDERED: 





CRO Shopify Web Developer – Job Overview

I am looking for an experienced shopify web developer to help me upgrade client’s checkout processes and execute CRO tests for various ecommerce brands.

In this role you will update Shopify theme templates, develop landing pages using various page builders and html/CSS frameworks, research/install various checkout/bundle applications, and implement A/B tests using testing tools like intelligems.

You will also report on test performance, and provide suggestions for next steps.

This is a full-time opportunity. Training will be provided and you will work directly with me.



About Zack Miller

My name is Zack Miller, and I’ve been a DTC Ecommerce Growth Marketer since 2019. I’ve done everything fro
dia buying and client strategy, to agency internal operations.

I’ve contributed to the growth of over 200 ecommerce brands in my agency experience. Now, as an independent growth marketing partner, I work closely with a small number of brands on their new customer acquisition strategy.



Note: All Remote Employees Must Be Available To Work During The Following Business Hours:

Monday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Tuesday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Wednesday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Thursday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Friday: 9am – 5:30pm EST



Roles & Responsibilities

- Develop landing pages using Figma and various WYSYWIG editors including but not limited to Replo and Pagefly.

- Edit product, collection and other page templates using Shopify Liquid template engine, and various HTML/CSS frameworks.

- Install various checkout/tracking applications (aftersell, Zipify OCU, Upstack, etc)

- Install various applications for product bundling when needed, and create product bundles. 

- Install tracking pixels on client’s websites

- Implement A/B tests in intelligems for product price tests, shipping price tests, theme tests, landing page tests, and more. 

- Research new ideas for direct response content marketing strategies.

- Work in my project management system, ClickUp.

- Apply a process-first mentality and provide feedback to help further develop our operating systems.



Required Experience & Education

- Strong verbal and written English language skills (American Dialect)

- Strong knowledge of HTML/CSS/Javascript/Shopify Liquid required.

- 1+ years of web development (Shopify) experience required
