title: Operations VA & Client Care Coordinator
description:
Operations VA & Client Care Coordinator



We are looking for someone who wants to grow with the company long-term. This role will start part-time with a focused scope and will expand in responsibility, compensation, and hours as the right person proves ownership, initiative, reliability, and operational value. We reward effort, follow-through, problem-solving, and loyalty. As the business grows, this role is intended to grow with it.



Required:



*excellent written English

*highly organized and detail-driven

*strong follow-through

*calm and polished with clients

*initiative without sloppiness

*tech-comfortable and able to learn software quickly

*willing to document systems and improve them

*able to manage recurring tasks without being chased

*comfortable working with structure and ambiguity

*genuinely interested in helping build a company





Primary Objective:

Support Verdant Landscape Designs by managing lead flow, scheduling, proposal and LMN admin, invoicing and collections follow-up, subcontractor coordination, document organization, SOP implementation, and recurring-service support so projects move smoothly, clients receive polished service, and the company can scale with stronger systems.



Core Responsibilities:



manage inbound leads and client follow-up, including Houzz

support proposal creation, estimate admin, and LMN entry

manage scheduling, job calendar coordination, and confirmations

prepare invoices and support collections follow-up

organize digital files, documents, templates, and job records

coordinate with subcontractors and assist with materials ordering

help document, clean up, and implement SOPs using your critical thinking skills, AI and other softwares

support rollout and administration of new maintenance division, autonomous landscape tech & personalized touch points within Fine Gardening Program

assist with Canva-based marketing/admin materials and Houzz profile upkeep

maintain weekly reporting on leads, proposals, invoices, schedule, and open items

suggest process improvements and operational ideas - want someone who is bright, can think for themselves, offer suggestions for improvements, ideas and is ready to become part of this business and watch it grow!



Success in This Role Looks Like:



leads are responded to quickly

proposals do not sit stale

invoices go out on time

collections are followed up consistently

schedule conflicts are caught earlier

subcontractors and materials are better coordinated

documents are organized

recurring clients receive more proactive service

SOPs begin to live in real life

title: Senior Real Estate Deal Analyst (Leadership Track)
description:
24/7 Cash Flow University – Boots on the Ground Program



We are hiring a high-level Real Estate Deal Analyst to join our growing Boots on the Ground (BOTG) program supporting U.S. real estate investors.



This is NOT a basic data-entry or number-crunching role.



We are looking for someone who can think critically, make decisions, communicate confidently, and grow into a leadership or operations role within our organization.



Our company is building systems and automation that reduce repetitive analyst work. Therefore, this role is designed for individuals who can evolve beyond analysis into strategy, leadership, and process management.



This is a long-term remote position with significant growth potential.



???? Core Responsibilities



• Analyze incoming property opportunities for investment viability

• Perform comparable sales analysis and interpret market trends

• Estimate renovation costs using structured frameworks

• Build professional deal reports for U.S. real estate investors

• Identify risks, opportunities, and strategic recommendations

• Communicate analysis insights clearly to internal leadership

• Assist in improving analysis workflows and internal systems

• Participate in operational discussions and team problem-solving

• Help train or guide future analysts as the team grows



???? We Are Looking For Someone Who



• Thinks beyond templates and understands investment strategy

• Has strong written and spoken English (professional client-level communication)

• Can confidently explain analysis and defend conclusions

• Demonstrates leadership mindset and initiative

• Is comfortable working in fast-moving startup environments

• Can handle responsibility and make judgment calls

• Is highly organized but also adaptable

• Wants long-term career growth, not just a remote job



? Preferred Experience



• Real estate wholesaling, flipping, or investment analysis

• Experience supporting U.S. real estate investors or companies

• Strong understanding of ARV, ROI, deal structuring

• Familiarity with PropStream, Privy, Zillow, Redfin, or similar tools

• Experience mentoring or leading small teams is a strong plus



???? What This Role Leads To



This role is designed to grow into positions such as:



• Senior Deal Analyst

• Team Lead / Analyst Manager

• Operations Coordinator

• Acquisitions Strategy Support

• Process & Systems Manager



We promote from within and reward leadership potential.



???? What We Offer



•  Consistent base salary (USD), paid bi-weekly or monthly

• Long-term remote position with stability

• Exposure to real U.S. real estate investment operations

• Opportunity to grow into leadership or management roles

• Direct mentorship and professional development

• A high-performance, growth-oriented team environment



???? Application Process



Please submit:



• English resume

• Short video introduction (required)

• Example of a deal analysis (if available)

• Brief explanation of your long-term career goals



We are specifically looking for candidates who want to grow into leadership roles.

title: Email Marketing Designer (Figma Specialist, Klaviyo Experience)
description:
?? Please read this entire job post carefully before applying.



We receive a high number of applications, and we only move forward with dedicated A-players who follow the instructions exactly. Applications that do not follow the requirements at the bottom of this post will not be considered.



We are a fast-growing ecommerce
 marketing agency, and we are looking for a highly skilled Figma
 Designer who understands Klaviyo
 marketing and wants to grow with us long-term.



For the right person, this role offers significant long-term growth opportunities as our agency continues to expand.



About the Role



Your main responsibility will be designing high-quality, conversion-focused
 campaigns for ecommerce brands.



You should be highly experienced in Figma, understand
 marketing structure, and ideally have experience building or importing
s into Klaviyo.



We are looking for someone who is detail-oriented, structured, and takes pride in producing high-level work.



What You’ll Do



Design
 campaigns in Figma



Create promotional
s, campaign
s, and flow
s



Build or import the designs into Klaviyo



Ensure
s are clean, responsive, and structured correctly



Design with dynamic blocks and flow logic in mind



Follow brand guidelines while improving visual hierarchy



Deliver organized Figma files



Requirements



Highly experienced in Figma (required)



Strong experience designing
 marketing campaigns



Experience with Klaviyo (preferred)



Ability to build or import
 designs in Klaviyo



Understanding of
 flows (welcome series, abandoned cart, post-purchase, etc.)



Awareness of dynamic content blocks



Strong understanding of typography, spacing, layout hierarchy, and mobile design



High attention to detail



Reliable and professional communication



This is a long-term opportunity for the right designer. We work with multiple ecommerce brands and regularly need new
 campaigns designed.



Application Instructions (Required)



Thanks for your interest in working with us.



Due to the high number of applications we receive, we only move forward with designers who can demonstrate quality upfront. This step is mandatory and non-negotiable. To be considered, please do the following:



• Share previous work as a Figma file only (no PDFs, images, or links to other tools)

• Create one
 design in Figma for one of the brands below so we can assess your quality and attention to detail:



– Dore & Rose

– Hear’s Earplugs

– Eyekonnik Eyewear



This allows us to fairly and quickly evaluate skill level, structure, typography, spacing, and overall design quality.



Applications that do not meet these requirements will not be reviewed.



If your design matches the level we’re looking for, we’ll reach out with next steps.



Thank you for your time and effort.

title: Systems Coordinator
description:
Position Overview:  



The Systems Coordinator is responsible for creating, managing, and troubleshooting automation workflows in GoHighLevel (GHL) to support efficient operations across the company. This role requires at least one year of hands-on experience in GHL or a similar automation platform, along with strong analytical and problem-solving skills. In addition to system automation, this person will assist the Admin Operations Team with various ad hoc tasks and continuously seek opportunities to optimize workflows, eliminate inefficiencies, and enhance team productivity. 



 



Pay Range: $8 per hourwith a performance review scheduled after 90 days of employment. We believe in rewarding exceptional talents. 



 



About Power Plus Systems: 



Power Plus Systems, LLC has been a dominant force in the residential electrical contracting industry for two decades, and we continue to lead the way. Our vision is to successfully wire 28,000 homes to completion by the year 2029, ensuring safe and efficient electrical solutions, thereby making a positive impact on the lives of our customers and communities. At Power Plus Systems, LLC, a position with us isn't just a job; it's an opportunity to grow and develop within a company that genuinely appreciates your contributions and dedication to our shared mission. 



 



Objectives: 



Build, maintain, and troubleshoot automation workflows in GoHighLevel to support streamlined operations. 



Monitor performance of active automations to ensure accuracy, functionality, and timely resolution of system issues. 



Work closely with the Operations Manager to understand workflow needs and translate them into effective and efficient automations, while coordinating with Admin Operations and other departments as needed. 



Identify inefficiencies in current processes and proactively recommend workflow improvements. 



Assist the Admin Operations Team with various administrative and operational tasks, ensuring smooth day-to-day operations. 



Troubleshoot and resolve Admin Operations Help Tickets with a customer-service–focused approach. 



Manage and update pipelines, triggers, automations, forms, and integrations as needed. 



Ensure all GHL data, workflows, and configurations are maintained accurately and consistently. 



 



Competencies: 



Strong understanding of automation logic, workflows, and pipeline management. 



High attention to detail to ensure accurate configuration and troubleshooting of automation sequences. 



Excellent problem-solving skills with the ability to identify system gaps and propose solutions. 



Strong written and verbal communication skills to work effectively with cross-functional teams. 



Proficiency in GoHighLevel or similar automation platforms (HubSpot, Zapier, Make, Zoho, ActiveCampaign, etc.). 



Ability to manage multiple tasks simultaneously in a fast-paced environment. 



Proactive mindset with a drive for continuous improvement. 



Customer service orientation when supporting internal stakeholders. 



 



Equipment Requirements: 



Must own a reliable computer or laptop capable of handling administrative tasks efficiently. 



High-speed internet connection to support video calls, cloud-based collaboration, and remote work. 



 



Education and Experience: 



At least one year of hands-on experience with GoHighLevel or similar automation platforms. 



Experience in operations, administrative support, or systems management is a plus. 



Familiarity with CRM logic, automation mapping, or workflow design is strongly preferred. 



 



Physical Requirements: 



Extended periods of sitting at a desk and working on a computer. 



 



Benefits: 



Growth opportunities in a well-established company. 



Ongoing training and professional development opportunities. 



Opportunity for advancement within the company. 



A supportive and collaborative work environment. 



Company-observed paid United States holidays (full time). 



Paid vacation. 



 



How to Apply: 



If you are ready to join Power Plus Systems, LLC, a well-established residential electrical contractor that values its tea
mbers and offers excellent benefits, please submit your application through the link below. 




/internationalform 



Power Plus Systems, LLC is an equal opportunity employer and welcomes applicants from all backgrounds to apply. 



Join us at Power Plus Systems, LLC, and be part of our continued success as we embark on the next 20 years of excellence in residential electrical contracting!

title: Executive Assistant to CEO
description:
Position Overview: 



As the Executive Assistant to the CEO, you will play a pivotal role in ensuring the smooth and efficient functioning of the executive office. Your primary responsibility will be to provide comprehensive administrative support to the CEO, managing their schedule, and coordinating various tasks to enhance productivity. Your ability to maintain confidentiality, exercise sound judgment, and proactively handle administrative duties will contribute to the overall effectiveness of the CEO's office. 



 

Pay Range: $8 per hour with a performance review scheduled after 90 days of employment. We believe in rewarding exceptional talents. 



 

About Power Plus Systems: 



Power Plus Systems LLC has been a dominant force in the residential electrical contracting industry for two decades, and we continue to lead the way. Our vision is to successfully wire 28,000 homes to completion by the year 2029, ensuring safe and efficient electrical solutions, thereby making a positive impact on the lives of our customers and communities. At Power Plus Systems, LLC, a position with us isn't just a job; it's an opportunity to grow and develop within a company that genuinely appreciates your contributions and dedication to our shared mission. 



 

Objectives: 

• Manage and organize the CEO's daily schedule, including meetings, appointments, and travel arrangements.

• Act as a gatekeeper, screening and prioritizing communications to the CEO.

• Coordinate and facilitate communication between the CEO and internal/external stakeholders.

• Anticipate the CEO's needs and proactively handle tasks to ensure optimal time management.

• Coordinate special projects and initiatives as assigned by the CEO.



 

Competencies: 

• Exceptional organizational and multitasking skills, with keen attention to detail.

• Strong written and verbal communication skills.

• Ability to maintain confidentiality and exercise discretion in handling sensitive information.

• Proficient in using Microsoft Office and Google Suites.

• Familiarity with scheduling software; experience with additional productivity tools is an advantage.

• Strong interpersonal skills with the ability to interact effectively with individuals at all levels.

• Proactive problem solver and resourceful thinker.



 

Equipment Requirements:  

• Must own a reliable computer or laptop capable of handling administrative tasks efficiently.

• Must own and actively use an iPhone and/or MacBook or Mac computer for efficient communication and task management.

• High-speed internet connection to support video calls, cloud-based collaboration, and remote work.



 

Physical Requirements: 

• Extended periods of sitting at a desk and working on a computer.

 

Benefits: 

• Growth opportunities in a well-established company.

• Ongoing training and professional development opportunities.

• Opportunity for advancement within the company.

• A supportive and collaborative work environment.

• Company-observed paid United States holidays (full time).

• Paid vacation.





How to Apply: 



If you are ready to join Power Plus Systems, LLC, a well-established residential electrical contractor that values its tea
mbers and offers excellent benefits, please submit your application through the link below. 




/internationalcareers



Power Plus Systems, LLC is an equal opportunity employer and welcomes applicants from all backgrounds to apply. 



Join us at Power Plus Systems, LLC, and be part of our continued success as we embark on the next 20 years of excellence in residential electrical contracting!

title: Full-Time Virtual Assistant – Social Media, Funnels & Website Management
description:
Are you a high-performing, ambitious, and resourceful Virtual Assistant looking for an opportunity to grow with a company that rewards excellence? If you thrive on independence, love solving problems, and enjoy making things happen efficiently, this might be the perfect role for you!



We’re looking for a rockstar VA with experience in:

- Social Media Management – Creating, scheduling, and optimizing content for engagement and growth.

- Content Creation & AI Tools – Using AI-powered tools to generate videos, reels, and engaging social media content.

- Market Research – Conducting research to identify trends, opportunities, and competitive insights.

- Go High Level (GHL) & Lead Management – Setting up funnels, automation, and managing CRM for lead conversion.

- Landing Page & Website Management – Building, Updating, optimizing, and maintaining landing pages or websites.

- Independent Execution – You find solutions and get things done without needing constant supervision.



Work Schedule & Compensation:

Full-Time | 40 Hours per Week – Monday to Friday, 8 hours per day.

Base Salary: $400 per month 

Performance-Based Bonus: Unlimited earning potential!



Performance Bonus Structure:

If monthly revenue increases by $10,000, you earn a $200 bonus

If monthly revenue increases by $50,000, you earn a $1,000 bonus

For revenue growth beyond $50,000, you earn 2% of the additional revenue growth

No Cap – The More You Help Grow the Business, the More You Earn!



Who You Are:

Self-motivated & proactive – You take ownership of your tasks without needing micromanagement.

A creative problem-solver – You love figuring things out and making processes more efficient.

Detail-oriented & organized – You manage tasks effectively and meet deadlines.

Tech-savvy & AI-driven – You embrace technology and automation for smarter work.

title: Finance Director
description:
Role Title: Finance Director



Salary: $5,000/m







Job Overview:







We are seeking a strategic, results-driven Finance Director to lead the financial operations of a high-growth, multi-entity investment and asset management firm. This executive will serve as a key member of the leadership team, responsible for driving financial strategy, ensuring compliance, optimizing performance, and enabling data-informed decision-making at the highest level.



The ideal candidate will have deep experience in financial planning and analysis, multi-entity and fund accounting, and real estate or private equity environments. Proficiency in NetSuite is required. You will be hands-on and detail-oriented while also contributing to long-term planning and financial leadership. This is an exciting opportunity to make a lasting impact in a fast-paced, innovative, and mission-driven organization.











Key Responsibilities:



Lead and oversee all financial functions, including accounting, FP&A, budgeting, reporting, audit, and compliance

Own monthly, quarterly, and annual financial reporting for leadership and stakeholders

Direct financial planning and cash flow forecasting across multiple entities and investment vehicles

Ensure timely, accurate month-end close, reconciliations, and internal controls

Partner closely with executive leadership on long-term financial strategy, fundraising, and capital planning

Oversee and continuously improve systems, processes, and automation to increase financial efficiency and insight

Coordinate with external auditors, legal, and tax professionals to maintain compliance with all regulatory requirements

Manage and mentor the finance team, fostering a high-performance and detail-oriented culture

Support due diligence, investor reporting, and fund performance analysis

Optimize the use of NetSuite and other systems to streamline reporting and decision-making









Qualifications:



CPA or equivalent financial certification preferred

Minimum of 5 years of experience in progressively senior finance roles .

Strong experience in fund or real estate accounting, private equity, or asset management

Proficiency in NetSuite is required

Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite and Google Workspace

Proven track record in financial forecasting, budgeting, and strategic planning

Exceptional analytical, organizational, and leadership skills

Excellent communication and interpersonal abilities

Ability to thrive in a fast-paced, entrepreneurial environment with competing priorities

title: Senior US Tax Accountant
description:
PLEASE READ BEFORE APPLYING. This role is open only for candidates who has experience in US Taxation.



Job Description





Role Title: Senior US Tax Accountant

Shift: 07:00 AM - 03:30 PM PST

Salary: $1,700







Overview:



We are seeking a highly experienced Senior US Tax Accountant with strong hands-on expertise in U.S. federal and multi-state taxation, including extensive experience with Schedule E, pass-through entities, and real estate taxation. This role will be responsible for preparing and reviewing complex tax returns, handling advanced tax compliance and planning, and serving as a technical resource for clients and internal teams.







Key Responsibilities:



Prepare and review U.S. federal and state tax returns including:

Individuals (Form 1040)

Corporations (Forms 1120, 1120S)

Partnerships (Form 1065)

Trusts and Estates (Form 1041)

Prepare and review Schedule E for:





-Rental real estate income and expenses



-Depreciation and cost segregation



-Passive activity loss limitations



-K-1 income from partnerships and S-corporations



-Basis, at-risk, and passive loss carryforwards



-Handle multi-state filings and allocations for pass-through entities.



-Prepare tax provisions, estimates, extensions, and quarterly filings.



-Perform tax research and provide technical guidance on complex issues.



-Review fixed assets, depreciation schedules, and amortization.



-Support IRS and state audits, notices, and correspondence.



-Provide tax planning strategies to minimize liabilities.



-Communicate directly with clients regarding tax matters and compliance.







Qualifications:



Bachelor’s degree in Accounting or Finance (Master’s in Tax preferred).

CPA or EA strongly preferred.

5+ years of U.S. public accounting experience in taxation.

Strong expertise in Schedule E, rental real estate, partnerships, and S-corps.

Advanced knowledge of U.S. federal and state tax law.

Proficiency with tax software such as UltraTax, ProSystem fx, Lacerte, CCH Axcess, or similar.

Experience with multi-state and multi-entity structures.

Excellent written and verbal English communication skills.

Highly organized, detail-oriented, and able to manage multiple deadlines.

Preferred Experience:



U.S. CPA firm or large accounting firm background.

Real estate, investment, and high-net-worth individual tax clients.

Review and leadership experience managing junior staff.

Ability to work U.S. business hours and collaborate with U.S. teams.

Manage and update pipelines, triggers, automations, forms, and integrations as needed.

Competencies: 



Strong understanding of automation logic, workflows, and pipeline management. 



High attention to detail to ensure accurate configuration and troubleshooting of automation sequences. 



Excellent problem-solving skills with the ability to identify system gaps and propose solutions. 



Strong written and verbal communication skills to work effectively with cross-functional teams. 



Proficiency in GoHighLevel or similar automation platforms (HubSpot, Zapier, Make, Zoho, ActiveCampaign, etc.). 



Ability to manage multiple tasks simultaneously in a fast-paced environment. 



Proactive mindset with a drive for continuous improvement. 



Customer service orientation when supporting internal stakeholders. 



 



Equipment Requirements: 



Must own a reliable computer or laptop capable of handling administrative tasks efficiently. 



High-speed internet connection to support video calls, cloud-based collaboration, and remote work. 



 



Education and Experience: 



At least one year of hands-on experience with GoHighLevel or similar automation platforms. 



Experience in operations, administrative support, or systems management is a plus. 



Familiarity with CRM logic, automation mapping, or workflow design is strongly preferred. 



 



Physical Requirements: 



Extended periods of sitting at a desk and working on a computer. 



 



Benefits: 



Growth opportunities in a well-established company. 



Ongoing training and professional development opportunities. 



Opportunity for advancement within the company. 



A supportive and collaborative work environment.

Paid vacation. 



 



How to Apply:

mbers and offers excellent benefits, please submit your application through the link below. 




/internationalform 



Power Plus Systems, LLC is an equal opportunity employer and welcomes applicants from all backgrounds to apply. 



Join us at Power Plus Systems, LLC, and be part of our continued success as we embark on the next 20 years of excellence in residential electrical contracting!

title: Director of Digital Marketing & Branding (Multiple Brands-F/T 9AM-6PM-Central Time-5 Days A Week)
description:
Director of Digital Marketing & Branding

Remote | Full-Time | Executive Marketing Leadership



Build the brands. Grow the audience. Drive the revenue.

We are looking for a high-performing digital marketing leader who wants more than just running social media accounts.

This role is for a builder, strategist, and creative executor who knows how to turn ideas into marketing systems that generate real results.

You will work directly with the CEO to turn high-level marketing concepts into fully executed campaigns that grow brands, generate leads, and drive bookings across multiple companies.

If you thrive in fast-moving entrepreneurial environments, love building brands, and enjoy turning creative ideas into measurable growth, this role is designed for you.

The Brands You Will Help Grow

You will lead digital marketing strategy for a portfolio of growing companies including:

• Lakecation Vacations – Vacation rental and hospitality brand

• Maid Squad Ozarks – Residential and vacation rental cleaning services

• Property Squad – Maintenance and repair services

• Aloha Laundromat – Modern self-service laundry experience

• Aloha Laundry Co. – Commercial laundry & wash-dry-fold delivery service



Each brand serves a different market, creating exciting opportunities for creative marketing and storytelling.



Your Mission

Your mission is simple:

Turn ideas into marketing systems that drive measurable growth.



You will take the CEO’s vision and transform it into:

Campaigns

Content strategies

Marketing funnels

Digital lead generation systems

Brand awareness initiatives

This role combines strategy, creativity, analytics, and execution.

What You Will Be Responsible For

Digital Marketing Strategy

Develop and implement digital marketing strategies across all brands that increase visibility, engagement, and revenue.

Social Media & Content Creation

Create engaging and strategic content for:


Instagram

TikTok

Local marketing groups

Blog content and SEO articles

Promotional and storytelling campaigns

This includes short-form video, reels, promotional campaigns, and brand storytelling.



Website Marketing & Digital Storefront Optimization

Our websites are designed to function as powerful digital storefronts.

You will:

Work with contracted website companies and developers

Monitor website performance metrics

Ensure websites generate leads and bookings

Create website updates, blog content, and new landing pages

Improve website SEO and conversion performance

Ensure all websites remain fresh, relevant, and high-converting

Monitor Google Analytics

Marketing Campaign Development

Design and launch campaigns including:

Digital advertising

Seasonal campaigns

Brand awareness initiatives

Local digital and print advertising

Digital billboard campaigns

Automated marketing drip campaigns and re-engagement campaigns

Promotions and special offers

Referral campaigns and more

Lead Generation & Sales Growth

Build systems that increase:

Direct bookings

Website traffic

Customer inquiries

Service leads

Conversion rates

Recruitment Marketing

Develop marketing campaigns to attract talent for growing teams including:

Operations

Cleaning technicians

Maintenance teams

Customer service staff

Community & Brand Engagement

Build brand awareness through community engagement initiatives and partnerships.

Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)

Success in this role will be measured by measurable growth including:

• Increased direct bookings through company websites

• Increased qualified inbound leads

• Growth in social media engagement

• Increased followers and audience reach

• Increased website traffic and conversion rates

• Increased service inquiries and new customers

The Type of Person Who Thrives in This Role

This role is perfect for someone who:

? Loves building brands

? Thinks like an entrepreneur

? Enjoys turning ideas into campaigns

? Is both strategic and hands-on

? Understands how marketing connects directly to revenue

? Can manage multiple brands at once

? Is creative but also analytical

You should be comfortable working in a fast-growing entrepreneurial company where innovation and creativity are valued.

Skills & Experience

Preferred qualifications include:

• Experience leading digital marketing campaigns

• Strong social media marketing skills

• Experience creating video and short-form content

• Experience managing multiple brands or campaigns

• Knowledge of SEO and blog marketing

• Experience with digital marketing funnels and lead generation systems

• Strong copywriting and storytelling skills



Experience with tools such as:

Canva or similar design tools

Social media scheduling platforms

Website analytics tools

 marketing platforms

CRM or marketing automation systems

Why This Role Matters

Marketing is the growth engine of our companies.

This role directly impacts:

Revenue growth

Brand awareness

Customer acquisition

Recruitment success

Community engagement

The Director of Digital Marketing & Branding acts as the bridge between vision and execution, transforming ideas into campaigns that deliver real business results.

What Makes This Opportunity Unique

You won’t just manage marketing for one brand.

You will help grow multiple fast-growing companies across hospitality, property services, and consumer services.

This role offers the opportunity to:

• Build brands

• Launch creative campaigns

• Drive measurable growth

• Work directly with company leadership

• Help shape the marketing future of a growing organization



Position Details

Position Type: Full-Time

Location: Remote / Virtual

Industry: Hospitality, Property Services, and Consumer Services



To help us identify candidates who are strategic thinkers, please include the following in your application:



A short paragraph describing a marketing campaign you created that generated measurable results.



Links to any brands or social media accounts you have managed.



Your favorite brand on social media right now and why you think they are doing great marketing.



Response it the heading "I Love Marketing"

title: Marketing Manager : bookkeeping and property admin VAs
description:
This is a startup opportunity.   Equity may be available to the right candidate, with internal promotion to Marketing/Growth Director  en route. 

Compensation: $2 per hour minimum, and substantial commission.  OTE $2000 per month.  

Hours: Flexible (20, 40, or 40+ hours per week)



ABOUT THE OPPORTUNITY

Our organization provides administrative and bookkeeping support to USA businesses, focused on Property management and the allied trades. Our clients don't just need "help"—they need clarity, reliability, and the ability to scale without overhead.  We are looking for a strategic Marketing Manager who can connect our offshore expertise with business owners who need to reclaim their time.



ABOUT THE ROLE

You will be the engine behind our client acquisition. Your mission is to communicate the value of offshore delegation to skeptical or overwhelmed business owners. This isn't about "posting on socials"; it's about building a lead-generation machine and signing up the business, or creating appointments for the onshore team to sign up the clients.  The goal is to sign up the first role within 6 weeks of starting, and the target is 50 FTE from the Philippines within 12 months.



That means:



Driving Lead Gen: Identifying and reaching business owners who need 20–40+ hours of weekly support, admin or books, or both.     To help you, our USA reference site has 9 offshores from 3 continents, grown from zero 18 months ago.   Our owner still work there as the Controller.



Sales Alignment: Ensuring the marketing funnel delivers "ready-to-buy" prospects for you to close. We will help. 



Content Strategy: Creating case studies and messaging that highlight the pain points and demonstrating the ROI of offshore bookkeeping and admin.



Market Positioning: Differentiating our high-touch service from low-quality "gig" platforms.



WHAT YOU’LL OWN

Develop and execute
, SMS, and digital marketing campaigns targeting SMEs (the trades) and property management  firms.



Develop and execute outreach via LinkedIn, SMS,
 marketing, and targeted advertising ($400pm budget for PPC) , creating compelling messaging that addresses the specific "pain points" of bookkeeping and admin backlog.



Rewrite the website will be an early task.



Optimize the conversion funnel from initial awareness to signed contract.



Report on key metrics (CPA, conversion rates, and lead quality) to leadership.



YOU’RE A STRONG FIT IF YOU HAVE

Proven Experience: A track record in B2B marketing, specifically for professional services or outsourcing.



Strategic Mindset: You understand how to sell "time" and "peace of mind," not just tasks.



Adaptability: You are comfortable working with online teams and understand the global talent landscape. Obviously, you must be prepared to work graveyard shifts.



Results-Orientation: You prefer being measured by lead quality and revenue rather than just "likes" or "shares."



Communication Skills: Exceptional English and a knack for building trust quickly.



WHY THIS ROLE MATTERS

Many business owners are drowning in paperwork and "invisible" admin tasks. By successfully marketing our services, you aren't just selling a product—you are providing the oxygen these businesses need to grow. You will be the bridge between world-class offshore talent and the clients who need them most.

title: No-Code App Developer (Softr + Supabase)
description:
ABOUT US

We are a US-based wedding photography company operating multiple brands. We manage a team of sales reps, photographers, videographers, and contractors across all brands. We are modernizing our entire operation by replacing HoneyBook, Google Sheets, and SignUpGenius with a unified platform built on Softr with Supabase as the backend database.

This is a long-term position with room to grow as the platform expands.



WHAT YOU WILL BE BUILDING

A multi-role web portal accessible on desktop and mobile with five distinct user-facing sections:

Client Portal

Clients will log in to view their project to-do checklist, payment schedule and payment status, available add-ons to purchase, and communicate with their coordinator.

Sales Rep Dashboard

Reps will track all proposals they have sent including client name, date sent, and current status (sent, viewed, accepted, paid). They will also view their commissions and earnings.

Contractor Portal

Contractors will browse and apply for available jobs, view jobs they have been assigned to, see their payment history, and communicate on active projects.

Wedding Manager Dashboard

Managers will oversee full project pipelines across their brand, manage contractor assignments and approvals, review contractor profiles including past jobs and internal notes, and manage media delivery and QA approvals.

Internal Job Board

A system to post new jobs every Wednesday at 9am automatically, with support for urgent postings outside the schedule. Contractors apply and managers approve, with conflict detection to prevent double-booking.

All data lives in Supabase (PostgreSQL). You will be responsible for connecting Softr to Supabase, building out all user roles and permissions, and migrating relevant data and workflows from our existing tools.



WHAT YOU MUST HAVE

You must have real, demonstrable experience building and shipping apps in Softr. Softr experience is strongly preferred but serious experience in another no-code platform such as WeWeb, Bubble, or Glide will be considered. A portfolio is required to be considered for this role.

You must be able to connect Softr to an external Supabase database via REST API, configure multi-role user access and permissions so that each user type sees only what they are supposed to see, work with existing data in Google Sheets and map it cleanly to database tables, and communicate clearly and proactively in written English.



WHAT YOU DO NOT NEED TO DO

You do not need to write backend code or manage Supabase infrastructure. The database schema will be provided to you in detail. You do not need to build the proposal generator as that is a separate project handled separately. You do not need to do any graphic design as branding and design direction will be provided.



HOW WE WORK

We work async-first with regular check-ins over Slack or a similar tool. Tasks are managed via a shared project board. You will work directly with the business owner who will provide specs, feedback, and approvals. We expect clear communication, honest updates on progress, and proactive flagging of any issues or blockers.



TO APPLY

Please send the following:

Links to 2 or 3 apps you have built, with live links or screenshots. Apps that involve external database connections are preferred.

A brief description of one project where you connected a no-code app to an external database or API. What was the tool, what was the database, and what challenges did you run into?

Your available hours per week and your timezone.

Please be OK with using Slack for communication and Timeproof for time tracking.

title: Experienced Fire Alarm / Low Voltage Systems Designer (Remote | $6- $10/hour)
description:
Experienced Fire Alarm / Low Voltage Systems Designer (Remote | $6- $10/hour)



Job Description:



We are looking for a skilled and dependable Fire Alarm / Low Voltage Systems Designer to join our growing team.



This is a remote role for someone with real experience in fire alarm design, and ideally also security, CCTV, and access control systems. We need someone who can produce clean, accurate work, communicate well, and take ownership of their tasks without constant follow-up.



This is not a role for someone who only knows basic drafting. We are looking for a designer who understands system layout, code compliance, submittals, and the level of detail needed for real-world projects.



If you are experienced, responsive, and take pride in doing things right, we’d love to hear from you.



Location: Remote

   Work Type: Freelance, Part-Time, or Full-Time

   Pay: $6-10/hour USD depending on experience, skill level, and overall fit



What You’ll Be Doing



> Design fire alarm, security, CCTV, and access control systems



> Create professional drawings and submittal packages using AutoCAD



> Prepare device layouts, riser diagrams, wiring details, and design documentation



> Ensure designs comply with NFPA, IBC, IFC, and local code requirements



> Revise drawings based on project updates, AHJ comments, and internal feedback



> Coordinate with project managers, contractors, and tea
mbers when needed



What We’re Looking For



> Proven experience in fire alarm system design and/or low voltage systems design



> Strong AutoCAD skills



> Good working knowledge of NFPA 72 and related fire/life safety codes



> Strong attention to detail and accuracy



> Ability to work independently and meet deadlines



> Clear communication and good follow-through



> Someone who is responsive, reliable, and professional





Nice to Have



> NICET certification in Fire Alarm Systems

> Experience preparing complete submittal packages for AHJ approval

> Familiarity with manufacturers such as Fire-Lite, DMP, Kidde, Silent Knight, Honeywell, and similar systems





Why This Role Stands Out



We are building a team for the long term. This role is a real opportunity for the right person to grow with a company that values quality, accountability, and strong systems.



*** If you perform well, there may be room for more hours, a long-term role, and future leadership opportunities.***



How to Apply



We receive a lot of applications, so we only consider candidates who follow instructions carefully.

Please complete all of the steps below:



>> Send your resume

>> Write a short paragraph explaining why you are a strong fit for this role

>> Answer this question in 2–3 sentences:

      If you are designing a fire alarm system and the AHJ requests additional devices after your initial submittal, how would you handle the change?



>> Send a 2-minute video introduction telling us:

*who you are

*your experience in fire alarm / low voltage system design

*what types of projects you’ve worked on

*why you think you would be a good fit for this role



Upload the video using Google Drive or Loom and include the link in your application



Include your availability:

      --->> Freelance, Part-Time, or Full-Time



Use this exact subject line in your application:

 Designer Application – [Your Name]



At the very end of your application, include this exact phrase:

 I want to synergize with you



Important!!

Applications that do not follow the instructions above will not be prioritized.

We are looking for someone who is not only technically capable, but also attentive, professional, and serious about the opportunity.

If that sounds like you, we’d be glad to review your application.

title: Web Dev Specialist – WordPress & Beaver Builder
description:
Web Dev Specialist - WordPress & Beaver Builder



We're a US-based marketing agency serving local service businesses, B2B manufacturers, and specialty industries. We're looking for a skilled WordPress developer to join our team and help manage a diverse portfolio of client websites.



About the Role

As a Web Dev Specialist, you'll work across multiple client sites, handling everything from new page builds to troubleshooting plugin conflicts and content updates. You'll need to adapt quickly to different design frameworks and technical environments while maintaining consistent quality standards.



This is a part-time position of up to 4 hours per day, 20 hours per week, depending on workload.



Key Responsibilities

• Build new websites and landing pages in WordPress using Beaver Builder, Beaver Themer, and related plugins

• Perform routine maintenance across multiple client sites via ManageWP

• Troubleshoot and resolve issues including plugin conflicts, bugs, and performance problems

• Implement proper heading structure, alt tags, metadata, and on-page SEO elements

• Handle backend tasks like DNS records, hosting setup, and site configuration

• Make updates to existing pages based on requests from our Marketing Strategist

• Apply best practices for schema, site speed, accessibility, and technical SEO

• Leverage AI tools to accelerate troubleshooting, learn new techniques, and optimize workflows

• Stay current with WordPress tools, plugins, and development best practices



Requirements



Technical Skills

• Strong experience with WordPress and Beaver Builder (required)

• Solid understanding of on-page SEO, site structure, and technical foundations

• Comfortable working across multiple client sites with varying setups

• Experience with ManageWP or similar management platforms (preferred)



Soft Skills

• Strong attention to detail and commitment to quality

• Natural problem-solver and avid learner who actively seeks solutions

• Excited to use AI tools and find new ways to incorporate them into your workflow

• Ability to prioritize and manage multiple tasks across different clients

• Self-motivated and able to work independently with minimal supervision

• Excellent communication skills and responsive to feedback

• Adaptable and comfortable with shifting priorities



Other

• Fluent in written English for team communication

• Reliable internet connection and ability to work during our business hours (7am–3:30pm PT overlap required)



Compensation



What We Offer

• Hourly rate: $9 USD per hour

• Payment schedule: Twice monthly via Wise (3rd and 17th)

• PTO: 9 days per year after 3-month probationary period



To Apply



Please send your application to 
 Include

• A brief overview of your WordPress and Beaver Builder experience

• Examples of sites you've built or maintained (links preferred)

• Your availability and preferred scheduled working hours within our operating hours (7am–3:30pm Pacific Time)

title: Real Estate VA
description:
PropZap is building a next-generation real estate platform designed to expand across North America.



We are pioneers in how modern real estate companies should be built — powered by strong systems, smart technology, data-driven decision-making, and operational efficiency.



We’re building with intention.

With structure.

With technology at the core.

With performance that compounds over time.



Our goal is to create a brand that sets the standard. A company that leads. A platform built to scale intelligently and sustainably across markets.



And for the right person, this isn’t just a job inside that company.



It’s a front-row seat to its growth.



--------------------------------------------------------------



Role: Real Estate VA

Location: Philippines (Remote)

Shift: Night Shift — Canada MST

Role Type: Full-Time, Long-Term

Compensation: Top-tier salary + performance bonuses + growth-based increases



We believe strong operators deserve strong compensation. If you take ownership and help us grow confidently, you will be rewarded accordingly.



--------------------------------------------------------------



Why This Role Is a Big Opportunity



This isn’t just about processing files.



This is about helping build a company that scales smoothly.



As PropZap expands into new markets and increases transaction volume, you’ll be part of strengthening the operational backbone that allows that growth to happen confidently.



As we grow, your scope grows.



More responsibility.

More visibility.

More leadership potential over time.



If you’re looking for long-term stability and upward movement instead of hopping between short-term roles, this is that kind of opportunity.



--------------------------------------------------------------



Your Core Responsibilities:

You will own and lead the backend operations that power our agents and client experience.

Full Real Estate Operations Leadership (Hands-On)



You will personally execute and oversee:

- Transaction and listing coordination

• Contract preparation, amendments, compliance, and document management

• MLS drafts, uploads, and accuracy checks

• FINTRAC, signatures, deadlines, and audit-ready files

• CRM hygiene, pipelines, task boards, and workflow tracking

• Calendar management, reminders, and operational follow-ups



You will ensure nothing slips, nothing is messy, and everything is executed with precision.



Listing & Marketing Operations:

- Coordinate photos, drone, measurements, floorplans, and virtual tours

• Manage listing timelines, deliverables, and launch readiness

• Prepare polished listing descriptions and marketing instructions

• Oversee signs, lockboxes, open houses, and showing instructions

• Maintain organized listing folders, media libraries, and assets

• Coordinate with marketing vendors and internal resources



Agent & Client Backend Support:

- Act as the primary operational support behind agents

• Communicate professionally with clients, lawyers, vendors, and partners

• Track conditions, deadlines, and next steps

• Ensure agents can focus on selling while operations run flawlessly



Systems, Process, and Scale:

- Maintain clean, reliable, and scalable operational systems

• Identify inefficiencies and proactively improve workflows

• Document processes and help build SOPs as the business evolves

• Support leadership with operational insights and execution

• Assist in hiring, training, and onboarding future operations tea
mbers



Who This Role Is Great For



Someone who enjoys ownership.



Someone who likes being the person everything runs through smoothly.



Someone who wants to grow inside a scaling company.



• Experience in real estate operations (U.S. or Canadian experience is a plus)

• Organized and detail-oriented

• Comfortable managing multiple files at once

• Clear and professional communicator

• Proactive and solutions-focused

• Interested in long-term growth



Highly Ideal:

• Experience mentoring others

• Experience improving workflows

• Experience in fast-growing environments



--------------------------------------------------------------



What You Gain



• Above-market compensation

• Performance bonuses tied to impact

• Long-term stability inside a scaling company

• Direct exposure to leadership

• A clear path toward greater operational responsibility

• A role that expands as the company expands



Imagine being two or three years into a company that has expanded across markets — and knowing you helped build the operational backbone that supported that growth.



That’s what this role offers.



--------------------------------------------------------------



How to Apply



Send the following to: 



• Resume

• Portfolio (if available)

• 2-minute intro video introducing yourself

• Summary of your real estate operations experience

• Expected monthly salary (PHP)

• Internet speed test link

• Any DISC test result



Subject Line: Real Estate VA – Your Name



If you’re ready to grow with a company that’s expanding — and build something meaningful behind the scenes — we’d love to hear from you.

title: Digital Marketing Specialist (Klaviyo)
description:
Job Title:

Junior Digital Marketing Strategist

Location:Remote

Employment Type:Full-Time



About the Role

We are looking for a strategically minded Junior Digital Marketing Strategist to support multi-

channel client accounts with oversight, coordination and foundational technical implementation.

This role is not primarily execution-based.



Instead, we are seeking someone who:

• Understands how PPC, SEO,
 and eCommerce channels connect

• Can audit and review agency work to ensure alignment with client goals

• Has foundational technical knowledge across platforms

• Can implement basic technical marketing updates when required

• Acts as a strategic support layer between clients and channel specialists



This is ideal for someone early in their career who understands digital ecosystems and wants to grow

into a strategic marketing lead role.



Core Responsibilities

1. PPC Strategic Oversight

• Review and audit PPC campaign structures (Google & Meta)

• Ensure campaigns align with client objectives and funnel stages

• Identify gaps in tracking, targeting or messaging

• Support client PPC teams with strategic direction (not daily execution)

• Monitor performance trends and highlight improvement areas



2. SEO Foundations & Technical Implementation

• Understand how organic ranking works (on-page, technical, authority signals)

• Support foundational technical SEO tasks including:

o Sitemap submissions

o Schema markup updates

o Meta title & description optimization

o Basic keyword mapping

• Review agency SEO work for consistency and alignment

• Identify technical SEO gaps and escalate where necessary



3. Website & eCommerce Oversight (Shopify & BigCommerce)

• Review site performance and UX for conversion alignment

• Understand Shopify and BigCommerce theme structures

• Make minor no-code edits where required

• Assist with product organization, tagging and collections

• Identify technical or structural issues affecting marketing performance

• Ensure tracking (GA4, Meta Pixel, Google Ads) is correctly implemented



4. Cross-Channel Alignment & Auditing

• Audit marketing activities across PPC, SEO,
 and paid social

• Ensure messaging is consistent across channels

• Review agency deliverables to ensure they align with client goals

• Identify inefficiencies, overlaps or gaps

• Provide strategic improvement recommendations



5.
 & Funnel Awareness

• Understand how
 integrates with paid and organic channels

• Review automation flows (welcome, nurture, abandoned cart)

• Identify alignment gaps between traffic and retention strategies



6. Technical & No-Code Knowledge

• Familiarity with no-code tools (landing page builders, theme editors)

• Basic coding literacy (HTML/CSS fundamentals)

• Ability to understand theme structure

• Comfortable making small structural or formatting edits

• Ability to communicate effectively with developers when escalation is required



7. Analytics & Reporting

• Review performance data from GA4 and ad platforms

• Identify trends and anomalies

• Ensure reporting reflects true performance

• Highlight discrepancies or tracking issues



Required Experience & Skills

Experience

• 2–4 years in digital marketing

• Experience working across multiple channels

• Experience reviewing or coordinating agency work preferred



Foundational Knowledge Required

• PPC strategy principles (Google & Meta)

• SEO fundamentals (on-page + technical basics)

• Shopify (required)

• BigCommerce (advantageous)

• GA4 basics

• eCommerce conversion principles

• Digital funnel strategy



Technical Skills

• Basic understanding of HTML/CSS

• Comfort with no-code tools and theme editors

• Understanding of schema and sitemap structures

• Tracking implementation awareness (pixels, tags, conversions)



Soft Skills

• Strong analytical thinking

• Strategic mindset

• Detail-oriented

• Comfortable reviewing and challenging work constructively

• Clear communicator

• High initiative and ownership

• Able to manage multiple client environments



For serious applicants, please send the following:

- Your updated CV

- Intro Video

- Whatsapp number (for phone screen)

- Earliest Availability

title: Creative Director (E-commerce Advertising)
description:
We are looking for a high-level Creative Director to take full ownership of the creative process for our e-commerce advertising.



This role is not just about design or editing — you will be responsible for the entire creative pipeline from A to Z, with a strong focus on performance-driven advertising.



Your Responsibilities

Own the full creative process from concept to final ad

Research competitors and winning ads in the market

Develop high-performing hooks and ad concepts

Create ad scripts and angles that drive conversions

Work with creators, actors, or AI avatars to produce content

Use AI tools to generate and enhance video ads

Direct the creative execution (visuals, messaging, pacing)

Test multiple creative variations and iterate based on performance

Continuously develop new concepts to scale winning ads



What We’re Looking For

Strong experience with paid social advertising (Meta, TikTok, etc.)

Deep understanding of direct-response advertising

Ability to create scroll-stopping hooks

Experience producing UGC-style ads

Comfortable using AI tools for video creation

Strong understanding of angles, storytelling, and persuasion

Ability to move fast and produce multiple creative variations



Bonus Points



Experience scaling 7–8 figure e-commerce brands

Background in media buying or performance marketing

Experience with AI video tools, avatars, and automated content production



Goal of the Role



Your mission is simple:

Create high-performing ad creatives that drive revenue and scale our brand.

If you understand what makes ads convert and can turn ideas into winning creatives quickly, we’d love to hear from you.



Application Requirement



To apply, please include multiple examples of video ads you have created.

Provide links or references to your work so we can clearly see your creative direction, hooks, editing style, and overall ad execution.



Applications without video examples or portfolio references will not be considered.

title: Customer Service and Social Media VA
description:
Virtual Assistant for Ecommerce Brand – Admin, Customer Support & Social Media



We are a growing ecommerce brand looking for a reliable and positive Virtual Assistant to support us with customer service, admin tasks, and social media engagement.



This role is ideal for someone organised, proactive, and comfortable communicating with customers online. Experience with social media or content tools is a bonus, but we’re happy to train the right person.



About Us



We are a Husband and Wife team, positive supportive people looking for the right VA to help us run two brands and we care deeply about customer experience and building a positive community, so we’re looking for someone who shares those values.



Responsibilities



Customer Service

Respond to customer queries via our
 inbox

Provide friendly and helpful responses to customers

Escalate issues to the team when needed

Provide a daily summary of action points and important messages



We will offer training on how to deliver customer service in our brand style. 



Social Media Engagement:

Respond to comments and messages on our 2 active social media pages

Like and reply to comments to help build community

Engage with posts on both accounts

Help maintain a positive and friendly tone with followers



LinkedIn Support:

Post content on our personal LinkedIn profiles

Connect with relevant people

Like and comment on posts to help grow our network



General Admin

Support with small admin tasks as needed

Help keep communications organised

Assist the team with day-to-day tasks

Weekly meeting to discuss goals for the week



Bonus Skills (Not Required)



These are helpful but not essential:

Canva (creating simple static ads or social posts)

AI content tools (e.g. Artlist)

CapCut or Instagram Edits for basic video editing

Social media content creation







What We’re Looking For



The most important qualities are:

Great attention to detail

Fluent / strong written English

Positive and friendly communication style

Customer-first mindset

Reliable and organised

Keen to learn and grow with the business



Hours

Part-time initially with the potential to grow to full time as the business grows over the next few months.



How to Apply



Please include:

A short introduction about yourself

Your experience with customer service or social media

Any experience with Canva, AI tools, or video editing (if applicable)



We’re looking for someone who can become a long-term part of our team as our brands continue to grow.



We look forward to meeting you.

title: Do you love making people feel cared for? Support our CEOs as an Executive Personal Assistant!
description:
Do you love making people feel cared for? Are you the one who remembers everyone’s birthdays, plans amazing gatherings, makes fun plans, and brings warmth into the lives of those around you?



This is NOT your typical assistant job. It’s deeply personal. You’ll work with a kind but intense U.S.-based pair of brothers (proven entrepreneurs working as Co-CEOs of the same business) to support their lives, not the company they are building. From keeping friendships alive and planning meaningful experiences to sending thoughtful gifts and helping them stay on track with personal goals, you’ll be part organizer, part cheerleader, part coach. If you’ve ever been called the “mom” of your group and you’re looking for a decades-long position, this might be your dream job.



Your Role

- Build trust by executing on tasks and communicating clearly, which will lead to taking on more responsibility, which will then lead to increases in pay.

- Keep relationships thriving by managing a personal CRM and helping stay in touch with friends and family.

- Use technology to help automate certain tasks that are repetitive.

- Track habits, support routines, and act as an accountability partner for personal goals.

- Pick out thoughtful, creative gifts for birthdays and other special 
nts.

- Research products, tools, and ideas to make life easier, better, or more fun.

- Plan and book unforgettable travel, great hotels, and the perfect dinner spots.

- Jump in on special personal projects wherever a helping hand is needed.



What’s In It for You

- A Long-Term Role: This is meant to last. The entrepreneurs who you'd be an assistant to are looking for a lifetime assistant.

- Great Place to Work: These entrepreneurs are known to have a super high retention rate of employees and create a great work environment.

- Creative Work: From planning memorable trips to picking out the perfect gift, this role lets you flex your creative muscles and thoughtful side every day.

- Variety: No two days will feel the same. You’ll get to research, plan, coach, organize, and more.

- Paid Leave: You'll get at least 10 days of paid leave plus major holidays.

- Remote Flexibility: Work from the comfort of your home and gain flexibility with hours once trust is built.



Desired Attributes

- Extremely caring, social people-person who will excel in personal tasks

- High attention to detail and organizational skills

- Very strong written and oral English skills

- Minimum 50 Mbps Internet Speed

- Designated office space in your home



To apply and ensure your application is considered, do all of the following two steps:

1. DM with a quick introduction to yourself if you're interested. Include the word "cupcake" *in your subject line*, and Include your resume. ++Bonus points for a video introduction, though it's not strictly required

2. Fill out this form:

3. Add the Letters "PA" in the "What's your full name" field [E.g. PA - John Doe], so we know what role you are applying for.

ntum?

title: Direct Response Video Editor (D2C Ads / VSLs for Meta)
description:
We are looking for a direct response video editor who understands how to create video ads that convert, not just videos that look good.



Our fast-growing D2C e-commerce startup in the men's grooming space is scaling aggressively through
 and Instagram ads, and we are looking for someone who can help us produce high-performing VSL-style ad creatives.



If you understand scroll-stopping hooks, direct response storytelling, and performance-driven creatives, this role is for you.



This is a remote freelance role (worldwide) with the potential for long-term collaboration if performance is strong.



About the Company



We are a direct-to-consumer e-commerce startup focused on solving a specific problem for men in the grooming space.



Our growth is purely driven by performance marketing on Meta 
 & Instagram), which means our success depends on strong creatives that convert viewers into customers.



We run a structured creative testing framework, where we constantly test new angles, hooks, and concepts to find winning ads we can scale aggressively.



You will work directly with the Creative Director and contribute to the growth of the brand through powerful video creatives.



Responsibilities



You will be responsible for creating high-converting VSL-style ad creatives.



Your main responsibilities include:



• Editing direct response video ads for Meta 
 & Instagram)

• Turning scripts and creative briefs into engaging VSL-style videos

• Structuring videos using direct response frameworks (Hook ? Problem ? Solution ? Proof ? CTA)

• Searching and sourcing B-roll and supporting content when needed

• Using AI tools to generate additional visuals or assets when appropriate

• Iterating on existing ads to create new variations and improvements

• Creating scroll-stopping hooks that grab attention immediately

• Analyzing videos and identifying why ads work or fail

• Communicating clearly with the Creative Director and consistently meeting deadlines



Requirements



We are looking for someone who:



• Has minimum 2 years of video editing experience

• Experience working with D2C e-commerce brands

• Has experience editing direct response ads or VSL-style videos

• Understands Meta advertising and performance-driven creatives

• Can structure ads using proven direct response principles

• Is comfortable finding and sourcing B-roll or external content when needed

• Has strong creative instincts and storytelling ability

• Can generate strong hooks that stop the scroll

• Is fluent in English (written and spoken)

• Communicates clearly and meets deadlines consistently



Nice-to-Have Skills



• Understanding of ad performance metrics and creative testing

• Ability to analyze winning ads and extract patterns

• Experience working with creative testing frameworks or feedback loops

• Familiarity with AI tools for video creation



What Success Looks Like in This Role



After 90 Days



• You have produced at least 6 top-performing ads that the team is able to scale aggressively

• You understand our creative testing framework and workflow

• Your edits consistently meet the performance and creative standards



After 6 Months



• You consistently produce winning creatives that drive profitable customer acquisition

• You proactively suggest new creative angles and hooks

• You quickly iterate on winning ads to produce new scalable variations

• You become a key contributor to the creative testing pipeline



Compensation



This is a freelance / contractor role.



When applying, please include your price for creating a 2–3 minute VSL video that includes 3 different hooks.



We are looking for editors who can consistently produce high-quality creatives, so pricing transparency is important for us to plan long-term collaboration.



Application Process



Please follow the steps below when applying:



1. Portfolio

Send us a Google Drive folder containing examples of VSL-style ads you have edited.



2. Creative Analysis

Briefly explain why you believe those ads perform well.



3. Tools

Tell us which editing software and AI tools you use.



4. Strategy Question

Answer this question:



What do you think is the most important element of a winning Meta ad creative, and why?



5. Skill Assessment

Selected candidates will complete a TestGorilla assessment.



6. Trial Project

Candidates who pass the test will be asked to create a short trial video.



7. Final Interview

Top candidates will have a final call with the CEO.



Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be reviewed.

eting details and support tasks

title: Full-Time Cold Caller | Pay Increase + Bonuses
description:
We’re a US-based roofing company expanding our proven call center operation, and we’re looking for experienced cold callers who are confident speaking with US homeowners and motivated by performance pay.



If you’re comfortable on the dialer, know how to handle objections, and can turn conversations into booked jobs or sales, this role offers stable hours, clear pay increases, and strong bonus potential.



This is not a startup script, we already have a system that works. We just need reliable dialers who can perform.



???? Compensation (Performance-Based Pay)

Starting pay is $3/hour, with automatic increases every pay period (2 weeks) based on results.



Base Pay: $3/hour

2+ sales in a pay period ? $4/hour for that period

4+ sales in a pay period ? $5/hour for that period

$25 bonus for every sale



Most dialers make 2+ sales per week, which usually means:

$4/hour + $50+ in bonuses



Strong performers regularly reach:

$5/hour + $100+ per week in bonuses



There is real earning potential for consistent callers.



? Schedule

40 hours per week

Monday – Friday: 11:00 AM – 8:00 PM CST

1 hour unpaid lunch



Optional Saturdays: 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM CST (not required, but encouraged)



We are looking for people who want steady long-term work, not short-term freelancers.



? Requirements

Excellent English fluency

Natural American accent

Minimum 1 year cold calling experience

Experience with US roofing, solar, or real estate campaigns preferred



Applicants who do not meet these requirements will not be interviewed.



???? Application Requirement (Required for Interview)

To move forward, send a 30-second video explaining:

Your cold calling experience

Any roofing / solar / insurance / real estate campaign experience



Which mornings you are available for a 9 AM CST interview



We are conducting interviews every morning at 9:00 AM CST for the next two weeks, and we are looking for people who can start immediately.



If you’re a consistent dialer who wants steady hours, performance pay, and real bonuses, this is a good opportunity with a company that already has a working system.



— Graham

Roofing Solutions

title: Remote Sales Closer – High Commission / Automotive
description:
Are you a closer or just an appointment setter?

We are My Car, a high-volume automotive dealership in the USA. We don’t need "virtual assistants" to send
s. We need Sales Closers who want to sell cars and make more money.



We provide 100% warm leads (FB Marketplace, Website, DMS). You provide the skill to close the deal and take the deposit.



The Role: From "Hello" to "Deposit"

You will own the entire sales process. You aren't just answering questions; you are leading the customer to a purchase.





Handle Financing: Interview clients, gather financial data, and submit credit applications accurately.



Close the Deal: Overcome objections, negotiate terms, and secure the deposit to take the car off the market.



Expert Consulting: Provide vehicle history reports and walk-around video insights to build trust.



Who We Are Looking For (Requirements):

2+ Years Sales Experience: You must have a proven track record of closing deals (Automotive experience is a big plus).



Fluent English: Your verbal and written English must be high-level and persuasive.



Tech Savvy: You can manage a DMS, CRM, and credit portals at the same time.



Financial Literacy: You are comfortable discussing interest rates and monthly payments.



The "Hustle" Mentality: We want people who are hungry to sell and increase their earnings.



Why Join My Car?



High Earning Potential: We want serious people who want to sell more to make more.



Tech-Forward: We use modern tools and a minimalist, efficient workflow.



Professional Growth: Work directly with a fast-growing US-based team.



IMPORTANT: We are only looking for serious professionals. If you are looking for a "chill" job, please do not apply. If you are a closer who wants to dominate and grow your income, we want to hear from you.
