title: Agency Operator / Integrator – DTC Performance Creative Agency – $3k–$5k/mo + Performance Bonuses
description:
Agency Operator / Integrator – DTC Performance Creative Agency – $3k-$5k/mo + Performance Bonuses



-------



WHO WE ARE



We run a performance creative agency for DTC brands on Meta. We own creative strategy (angles, awareness levels, emotional triggers, formats) and treat media buying as execution. We currently deliver static ads through a proven system and are actively expanding into full-funnel video creative, AI-assisted production, and funnel development.



We are at around $30k/month in retainers with a distributed team across Europe and Asia. The systems and playbook are already built. What is missing is the right operator to run the machine, remove the founder from day-to-day decisions, and help us scale to $100k+ per month.



-------



WHAT YOU WILL DO



>>> Build and run a sales system that consistently brings in qualified DTC clients

>>> Own delivery operations — make sure every client gets what they need, on time, without the founder in the middle

>>> Hire, train, and manage Filipino tea
mbers (creative strategists, designers, video editors) and keep them proactive and high-output

>>> Build dashboards using AI tools (Claude, automation platforms) that pull together key business metrics — output per person, client performance, team utilization, revenue, profit

>>> Create and maintain SOPs, workflows, and simple automations (Airtable, Zapier/Make, Notion) that keep the operation tight

>>> Help steer our expansion into video ads, AI-assisted creative production, and full-funnel development

>>> Report directly to the founder/CEO with clear weekly overviews of what is working, what is not, and what needs attention



-------



YOU MUST HAVE



>>> Prior experience in a creative or performance marketing agency (non-negotiable — you need to understand creative workflows and output tracking)

>>> Proven track record hiring and scaling remote Filipino teams

>>> Strong systems builder mindset — you have built SOPs, automations, and dashboards before

>>> AI literate — you use Claude or similar tools daily for real work, not just experimenting

>>> Proactive owner energy — you see problems before they reach the founder and fix them

>>> Excellent English and fast communication (Slack/Meetings)



-------



WHAT WE OFFER



>>> $3,000 to $5,000 USD per month base depending on experience

>>> Performance bonuses tied to agency growth milestones ($50k, $70k, $100k/mo and beyond) — if you are meaningfully contributing to the growth, you get paid for it

>>> We share real revenue and profit numbers with you — you will always know the score

>>> Clear growth path into a senior leadership role as we scale



-------



This is NOT a VA or project manager role. This is the integrator seat that takes our existing playbook and turns it into a scalable, profitable operation.



-------



HOW TO APPLY



To apply, answer these three questions in your message:



1. What is the biggest team you have personally hired and scaled in a creative agency, and to what monthly revenue?



2. Give one example of a system, automation, or dashboard you built that saved time or improved output. Screenshots or links welcome.



3. How do you use AI in your daily work, and what kind of automations can you build?



Serious applicants only. No agencies or middlemen. Loom video applications will be prioritized.

title: Virtual Assistant – Operations Support
description:
Thrive Landscapes is a residential landscaping company based on Vancouver Island, Canada. We help homeowners maintain and improve their outdoor spaces.



We are looking for a reliable Virtual Assistant to help maintain operational data and systems that support our field crews and management team.



This role focuses on structured administrative work such as updating spreadsheets, maintaining records, and performing routine system checks.



This is not a customer service role. If you enjoy organized work, spreadsheets, and maintaining clean systems, this position could be a great fit.



This role requires excellent attention to detail and the ability to maintain accurate records.



Primary Responsibilities

You will help maintain several internal systems and reports that keep the company organized and running smoothly.

Typical work includes:

• Updating operational spreadsheets and performance dashboards (Google Sheets)

• Maintaining our hiring candidate tracking spreadsheet

• Recording fleet fuel consumption data

• Adding job expenses to projects in Jobber from
ed invoices

• Cleaning up $0 service jobs related to lawn care and irrigation programs

• Performing basic data integrity checks in Jobber

• Updating employee bonus scorecards based on management notes



Occasional Tasks

From time to time you may also assist with:

• Preparing documents or spreadsheets for internal projects

• Organizing files in Google Drive

• Updating internal training resources

• General administrative support tasks



Tools You Will Use

• Google Sheets

• Google Drive

• Jobber (service management software)

• Canva (occasionally)

• Zoho Learn



Training will be provided through short videos and written procedures.



Ideal Candidate

You may be a good fit if you:

• Have strong attention to detail

• Enjoy working with spreadsheets and structured data

• Are reliable and organized

• Communicate clearly in written English

• Can follow instructions carefully



Experience with spreadsheets or CRM systems is helpful but not required.



This is an entry-level remote role with the potential to grow into additional responsibilities over time.

Hours

10 hours per week guaranteed, with occasional increases during busy seasons.

This is a long-term contractor position.



How to Apply

Please include the following in your application:

A short introduction about yourself

Your experience working with spreadsheets or data entry

Your hourly rate

Begin your application with a definition of the word “Thrive.”

Shortlisted candidates will be invited to complete a short paid skills test.

title: Finance Operations Specialist (QuickBooks + Advanced Excel) – Remote
description:
Why This Role Exists?

We are hiring a Finance Operations Specialist to own and elevate our financial systems.



This is not an administrative assistant role. This is a finance-driven seat responsible for accuracy, reporting clarity, and process improvement.

If you love clean books, smart dashboards, and using AI to streamline financial workflows — this role is for you.



Your Mission - Within your first 90 days, you will:

· Run QuickBooks independently with zero supervision

· Maintain accurate AP/AR and invoice workflows

· Deliver clean, reliable monthly financial reports

· Build and maintain Excel dashboards for financial visibility

· Create process flowcharts and SOPs for finance operations

· Introduce at least one AI-driven efficiency improvement in finance workflows

Success = Accurate books, clear dashboards, and scalable financial systems.



What You’ll Own? 

Finance Operations (Primary Focus)

·  Full-cycle bookkeeping in QuickBooks

·  Invoice creation, tracking, and reconciliation

·  AP/AR management and reporting

·  Cash flow updates

·  Month-end close support

·  Financial reporting preparation

·  Dashboard creation (Excel-based)

·  Spreadsheet modeling and analysis

·  Process mapping (flowcharts, SOP documentation)

·  AI-assisted workflow optimization



What You Must Bring (Non-Negotiables)?

· 2+ years finance or bookkeeping experience

· Advanced QuickBooks proficiency (must run seamlessly)

· Advanced Excel skills (pivot tables, dashboards, formulas, reporting)

· Strong Microsoft Word formatting/documentation skills

· Experience building financial dashboards

· Experience creating flowcharts/process documentation

· Familiarity with AI tools (ChatGPT, automation tools, AI reporting support)

· High attention to detail

· Strong written English



Tech requirements (non-negotiable). Attach device specs/screenshots with your application.

· Laptop/desktop (less than 3 years old)

· CPU: Intel i5 10th-gen+ / AMD Ryzen 5+

· RAM: 8GB+

· Internet: 50–100 Mbps (with backup)

· A/V: Working webcam, mic, and headset



Benefits & Perks: 

· Paid Company Holidays, PTO, Referral incentives

· HMO upon 1st year

· Quarterly PAG-IBIG incentive

· Tech incentive

· Tokens from employee engagement events

· Company-facilitated hackathons / free learning sessions

· Year-end virtual event

· Bi-monthly salary

· Weekends off

· Supportive remote team community



How to apply (3 quick steps):

1.
 

Subject: Job Application — Executive Admin (Finance & Ops)



2. Attach your resume and device specs/screenshots.



3. In the body, answer briefly (2–3 sentences each):

- Your experience with QuickBooks (modules used + typical weekly tasks)

- A recent finance/ops process you improved—what changed?

- Your internet speed (main + backup), and your working hours preference



Tip: Links to a portfolio, sample reports/dashboards, or SOP you created are a plus.

title: Executive Assistant to Two CEOs – Multi-Business Operations
description:
USA-Based Leadership | Remote | California Time Zone Required



Please read below details fully to be considered for the interview



Applicants must be able to work full-time during California business hours (PST/PDT).

Applicants who cannot work California hours will not be considered.

 

About Us

We are a fast-growing group of operating companies spanning automotive, logistics, transportation, franchising, hospitality, and experiential services. Our portfolio currently includes:

• Car Dealership

• Auto Body Shop

• Auto Mechanic Shop

• Car Rental Company

• Amazon Logistics & Delivery Operations

• The UPS Store Franchise

• Passenger Transportation & Wine Tour Company

The businesses are led by two hands-on CEOs (husband and wife) who are deeply involved in strategy, execution, and growth.

We are seeking an exceptional Executive Assistant / Operations Partner who can function as a trusted operational partner and extension of leadership.

This role is high-responsibility, fast-paced, and intellectually demanding, ideal for someone who thrives under pressure, learns quickly, and enjoys managing complexity across multiple business units.

This is not a traditional administrative assistant role.

 

Position Overview

The Executive Assistant will act as the right hand to both CEOs, supporting executive communications, operations, cross-business coordination, HR functions, research, licensing, and compliance activities.

This role operates closer to an Operations Coordinator / Executive Partner than a traditional assistant role.

The ideal candidate anticipates needs, manages competing priorities, and proactively solves problems while maintaining strong organization and attention to detail.

Performance and activity tracking will be managed through Hubstaff from Day 1.

 

Key Responsibilities

Executive & Strategic Support

• Manage executive inboxes and communications for both CEOs

• Draft, review, and send executive-level correspondence

• Coordinate meetings, calls, and follow-ups across multiple businesses

• Act as a communication bridge between leadership, managers, vendors, and partners

 

Business Operations, Research, Licensing & Compliance

• Support operational oversight across all companies

• Conduct research supporting strategic decision-making and business improvements

• Track contracts, renewals, vendors, and compliance deadlines

• Assist with licensing, registrations, permits, insurance, and regulatory requirements

• Maintain organized documentation for legal, HR, and compliance records

• Support HR functions including onboarding, employee records, payroll coordination, benefits administration, and documentation

• Assist with budgeting, invoicing, expense tracking, and basic financial reporting

 

Project & Process Management

• Quickly learn operational workflows across multiple industries

• Manage cross-functional projects across several companies simultaneously

• Track deadlines, priorities, and deliverables

• Identify operational inefficiencies and recommend improvements

• Follow up consistently to ensure execution and accountability

 

Marketing & Administrative Support

• Assist with marketing coordination and promotions when needed

• Maintain organized digital filing systems and operational databases

• Support event planning, client coordination, and special projects

 

Qualifications

Required

Bachelor’s degree in Business, Management, Human Resources, or related field

3+ years experience supporting executives, HR leadership, operations management, or project coordination

Fluent English (written and verbal)

Experience supporting HR functions and employee lifecycle processes

Experience with research, licensing, compliance, or regulatory processes

Experience using workflow management tools (
, Asana, ClickUp, or similar)

Advanced proficiency in Google Workspace and Microsoft Office

Exceptional organization and ability to manage multiple priorities

High discretion when handling confidential information

Availability to work full-time during California business hours

Comfortable with work activity tracking through Hubstaff

 

Preferred

Master’s degree (MBA, MHRM, or equivalent)

Experience supporting multiple operating companies or executives

Experience working with licensing and regulatory compliance

 

You Will Thrive In This Role If You Are

• A fast learner who enjoys complexity

• Calm and effective under pressure

• Highly accountable and self-directed

• Business-minded and proactive

• Comfortable supporting demanding executive leadership

 

What We Offer

Competitive compensation based on experience

Full-time long-term position

Remote work flexibility (within California business hours)

Direct exposure to executive-level decision-making

Opportunity to grow with a multi-industry organization

A challenging role with real responsibility and impact

 

Important Note

This is a dedicated full-time role.

We are not seeking freelancers, agencies, or assistants managing multiple clients.

We are looking for a long-term tea
mber committed to growing with our businesses.

 

Application Instructions (Important)



To confirm you carefully read this job posting, begin your application with the phrase:

Operational Excellence



Please do not include a long cover letter, personal story, or general statement of interest.

Instead, provide short, direct answers to the questions below and attach your resume.

Applications that do not follow this format will not be reviewed.

 

Required Response Format

Operational Excellence

QA1 – Project Management

How do you manage multiple projects with deadlines on the same day?

Briefly describe your prioritization and execution method.

QA2 – Compliance / Licensing

Describe your experience managing business licensing, permits, regulatory filings, or compliance requirements.

What types of processes or renewals have you handled?

QA3 – HR Operations

Describe your experience supporting HR functions, including involvement with:

• employee onboarding

• HR documentation

• payroll coordination

• benefits administration

• employee records

• KPI or performance tracking

QA4 – Financial Awareness

Describe your experience working with financial processes, such as:

• budgeting

• invoice tracking

• expense management

• payroll coordination

• financial reporting

This role does not require an accountant, but candidates must demonstrate basic financial literacy and comfort working with financial data.



QA5 – Have you read the requirements section and do you agree that you meet the qualifications?

 



Your submission should include only:

Operational Excellence

QA1:

QA2:

QA3:

QA4:

QA5:

Resume Attached

title: Customer Support Experts Needed
description:
We are now hiring Customer Support Experts to assist our customers over the phone.

This is a full-time position only with long-term potential



Customers will call us and ask for assistance with various tasks, such as:



Checking their
 accounts

Purchasing items they need

Signing up for services

Logging into or managing their accounts

Checking or signing up for credit score reports

Conducting general online searches



The tasks we handle are all things that can be done online.



PAY & EARNING STRUCTURE



Base rate starts at $4.50 per hour.

Agents usually work 10 hours per day including the paid breaks, and we allow more hours if someone wants to earn more.

During busy times, we also pay time-and-a-half overtime when we need additional coverage.

Good performers can earn a monthly bonus between $60 and $150.

There is a $50 monthly attendance bonus for consistent on-time performance.

Every 6 months, we evaluate performance and agents can receive up to an extra $0.50 per hour added to their rate if they are doing well.



With base hours plus bonuses and performance increases, a strong performer can earn up to around $1,100 per month.



This is the roadmap of our hiring process:



- You will take a quiz that typically takes about an hour to complete.

- If you pass the quiz, you will be invited to take two live mock calls or skill tests. The first one usually takes around 20 minutes, and the second one is longer, typically about an hour.

- Once you pass, you will then proceed with orientation and training.



Please note that our quizzes and skill tests can be challenging for beginners and require sharpness, speed and excellent attention to details. If you believe you possess these skills, feel free to apply.



You need to have fluent English as well as having very good internet connection and a quiet place to work.

Please apply only if you are fully available for a full-time position.

Please do not apply if you are not based in the Philippines.



When You Apply*



Please answer the following questions:



1. How many hours are you available daily, and on which days of the week?

2. How soon are you ready to start?



Lastly, please include a link to a Vocaroo audio recording (minimum 45 seconds) where you briefly introduce yourself. Tell us a bit about your background, relevant experience, and one hobby you genuinely enjoy.



Thanks,

Aron

title: eCommerce Growth Manager
description:
Own Category Growth, Optimize Performance, and Expand Market Dominance.



Hadley Designs is seeking a Growth Manager to take full ownership of a multi-million dollar product category, with Amazon as the primary growth channel. This is a high-impact role for a results-driven e-commerce operator who thrives on ownership, accountability, and driving measurable growth through disciplined execution and data-backed decision-making.



While this role operates deeply within Amazon, we welcome candidates who have driven growth across e-commerce, DTC, or marketplace environments and are excited to apply that experience within a scaled Amazon ecosystem.



How You’ll Win at Hadley Designs:

We believe performance comes from strong systems executed consistently.



Every eCommerce Growth Manager is expected to progress through three stages:



- Learn the Playbook – Understand our category strategy, operating standards, and decision frameworks

- Apply the Playbook – Execute accurately and consistently to deliver predictable, scalable results

- Enhance the Playbook – Improve systems with new ideas and strategies after mastery is demonstrated



This order matters. We value innovation, but only when it is grounded in proven execution. Our playbook exists to help high performers win faster, create leverage, and scale impact — not slow them down.



To formally apply, apply HERE:

title: Call Listening & Reporting Specialist
description:
Overview:

We’re looking for a meticulous, English-proficient reporting specialist to handle client data, tag leads from call recordings, and manage monthly client reporting. You’ll ensure accurate data across multiple platforms and ensure our clients’ analytics are always on point.

Key Responsibilities:

Call Tagging & Lead Classification:





Listen to client calls (in English) from platforms like CallRail.





Determine the lead type: program, online, etc.





Tag each call for service requested, quote requested, or quality of lead.





Note why a lead is not good, if applicable.





Client Data Management:





Regularly review each client’s accounts for data consistency.





Monthly updates to spreadsheets summarizing leads from platforms (LSA, Google Business Profile, website, etc.).





Agency Analytics & Reporting:





Manage agency analytics tools ensuring all client data is integrated (Search Console, Google Analytics, etc.).





Ensure every client’s dashboards are set up properly and updated monthly.





Onboard new clients by ensuring their reporting dashboards are connected and functioning smoothly.





Attention to Detail:





Understand nuances in calls to categorize them accurately.





Ensure all data is correct, timely, and precise.

Qualifications:

Exceptional spoken English comprehension.





Strong attention to detail and ability to accurately classify information.





Familiarity with call tagging or lead management is a plus.





Experience with Google Analytics, Search Console, and reporting dashboards is highly desirable.





Proficiency in spreadsheet tools (Excel or Google Sheets).





How to Apply:

Please submit your application with a brief cover note detailing relevant experience. We’d love to hear about times you’ve worked with client data, reporting, or tagging calls. Once you apply via OnlineJobs.ph,
 
 with the subject line: ‘Blue Rhino: I’m your reporting specialist!’ Also, attach a brief audio file of yourself explaining why you're a good fit. If the instructions are not followed, you will be automatically disqualified. Let’s find that detail-oriented A-player!

title: Video Editor for Instagram Reels (Part Time)
description:
We're a fast growing digital marketing agency and we're looking for a skilled, reliable video editor to join our team and turn raw video clips into scroll-stopping Instagram Reels.



What you'll do:

Every day, you'll receive sets of raw video clips and audio files via Google Drive. Your job is to edit them into polished, engaging Instagram Reels using CapCut. This includes cutting and arranging clips, syncing voiceover audio to video, adding text overlays and captions, adding background music or trending sounds, and exporting in the correct format for Instagram.

This is a part-time role (4 hours per day) with the opportunity to grow into a full-time position as we scale.



You're perfect for this if you:

You already edit short-form video content and understand what makes a Reel perform well. You know that the first 1-2 seconds d
 everything. You have a natural feel for timing, transitions and when to cut. You can work independently without being micromanaged and deliver consistent quality every day.



Requirements:

-Experience with video editing using CapCut

-Understanding of Instagram Reels format and trends

-Ability to sync audio to video cleanly

-Good eye for text placement, font choices and readability

-Reliable internet connection for downloading and uploading video files



What we offer

-$400-$500/month, paid bi-weekly

-Part-time: 4 hours per day, 6 days per week

-Flexible schedule – work whenever suits you as long as daily deliverables are submitted on time

-Long-term role with real growth potential as we expand

 of your application 

Subject line: “Video Editor IG – Your First Name”

, include:

2. Your location + timezone



Only applicants who follow the instructions will be reviewed.

title: Project Assistant
description:
Are you great at communicating with others? Are you meticulous and organized? Let’s team up.



We believe in people. This is why we only work with clients who serve people. From firefighters, to law firms, to suppliers sending life-saving food to kids dying of malnutrition, the work you do will help make the world a better place.



Our team is made up of people who want to do the best work of their life. People who love to learn, challenge themselves, grow and have some fun along the journey. We also care about each other – we support each other in our own personal goals and vision. We are human beings before employees and we love to bring out the best in each other.



Now, ready to learn more about this opening? Buckle up.



If you work here, you’ll be:

- Challenged to do the best work of your life in a supportive environment.

- Become the best communicator you can become (this is the most important thing we do).

- Have the space to ask questions, voice your feedback and make a difference (and be yourself).

- Help drive our projects and tools, participate in stimulating conversations, and grow with like-minded people.



What you could be working on:

- Oversight of our fast growth projects and understanding the nuances

- Communicate status, progress, ensuring "nothing slips through the cracks"

- Build and voice your opinion on key project features

- Communicate and help developers understand various tasks

- Testing new features to ensure it meets project needs

- Research, engaging customers via
/chat, proof reading, copywriting, organizing events, etc



You’ll do well in this job if you:

- Are a master at the English language and care about writing well

- Enjoy using and learning about technology and being helpful

- Enjoy working with people who actually care about what they do and will not let you be lazy or do sloppy work.

- Have an opinion and care about best practices and love learning and creating and building.

- Have grit and determination and are someone who will exceed no matter what gets in your way.

- Are attentive to details.



You probably shouldn’t apply if:

- You’re “just looking for extra money.”

- You like working 5 full-time jobs because all you care about is work.

- You get offended easily and take things personally.

- You are not someone with grit and determination who can persevere while being challenged to do great work.

- You get overwhelmed easily, new habits, new learnings and chat messages.



The interview process:

- Since 99% of our work is done via Slack (we don’t do scheduled calls), the entire interview process will be via
. (With lots of questions, sprinkled with a few voice notes)



If you work here:

- You’ll get 13th month salary, Filipino holidays, unlimited time off (we don’t count sick days), a normal working day schedule (no night shifts, although an early start is preferred for time overlap) with some flexibility, a week off during the holidays in December, and the opportunity to grow and become your best self.



A little more about us:

- We’ve been in business for a decade+. Our teams are remote (mostly in the Philippines). Our longest standing tea
mber has been with us for over 14+ years. We've had people quit smoking on our teams with our help, lose weight, learn a new instrument, speak a new language, and more. We all love what we do.



How to begin

- Your mission, should you choose to accept, is to send us an
 with 3 questions you have about this role. If you’re currently in a full-time role and are looking for something new, we’re open to a transition window. We actually care about your happiness.



NOTE: While we like AI, and we use it in certain circumstances, we ask that no AI be used during communication. Communication is the most important thing we do. If I don't see your natural voice from our first interaction, then you're setting an inaccurate representation of who you are and how you communicate. And when I see that change, it's going to come across as a lack of harmony in how you communicate.

title: Functional Medicine Coach VA
description:

We are a growing functional medicine and wellness brand led by Dr. Christina Yang, focused on helping people heal the root cause of chronic health issues such as:

Thyroid conditions (Hashimoto’s, hypothyroidism)

Blood sugar imbalance and diabetes

Weightloss resistance, fatigue, and metabolic health

This is a remote virtual assistant + health coach hybrid role.

You must be passionate about nutrition, root-cause healing, and holistic wellness.

Support
, chat, and community engagement when needed



Required Qualifications

Background in nutrition, medicine, nursing, pharmacy, or holistic health

Strong understanding of:

Anti-inflammatory nutrition

Gut health basics

Blood sugar balance

Thyroid health fundamentals

Excellent English communication (written & spoken)

Empathetic, encouraging, and patient with clients

Highly organized and detail-oriented



Strongly Preferred (Big Plus)

Excellent communicating skill.

English language proficiency.

Hashimoto’s or hypothyroidism

Compensation

Competitive monthly salary based on experience

Opportunity for long-term growth in a fast-expanding wellness company

Who This Role Is Perfect For

Is excited to grow with an international wellness brand

title: Paint & Wallpaper Takeoff Estimator
description:

This role is ideal for someone with strong analytical skills who can work independently and maintain a high level of accuracy when handling technical measurements and project estimates.



The successful candidate must be reliable, proactive in communication, and comfortable working with minimal supervision while providing consistent updates on project progress. The role will initially start as a part-time position, with a strong potential to transition into a full-time role based on performance and business needs.



Key Responsibilities



- Review construction plans and drawings to perform accurate takeoffs for painting and wallpaper projects

- Calculate and estimate required paint, wallpaper, coatings, and related materials

- Ensure all measurements and estimates are accurate, consistent, and well-documented

- Identify potential discrepancies or missing details in plans and clarify when necessary

- Maintain organized records of estimates and project information

- Provide regular progress updates regarding ongoing tasks and project status

- Communicate proactively to ensure timelines and project requirements are met



Qualifications

- Strong attention to detail and accuracy when interpreting plans and measurements

- Ability to read and interpret architectural or construction drawings

- Highly analytical with strong problem-solving skills and practical judgment

Work Arrangement

- Part-time role initially, with strong potential to transition to full-time based on performance and project needs

title: Regulatory Compliant & Document Control Specialist
description:
The Regulatory Compliance & Document Control Specialist supports global product and packaging compliance by managing regulatory documentation, packaging registrations, and data collection related to Extended Producer Responsibility (EPR) programs and other regulatory requirements.

This role organizes compliance documentation for personal care products and general consumer articles marketed in the EU and UK, and supports product labeling compliance under the EU Classification, Labelling and Packaging (CLP) Regulation. The position works cross-functionally with product development, marketing, sales, and supply chain teams to ensure regulatory documentation is accurate, complete, and audit-ready.

 

Key Responsibilities

• Assist with packaging registrations and reporting requirements for EPR and environmental compliance programs across multiple jurisdictions.

• Track regulatory obligations, reporting deadlines, and maintain registrations with regulatory authorities and producer responsibility organizations.

• Maintain regulatory documentation within the company document control system, ensuring proper version control and organized recordkeeping.

• Collect and organize compliance documentation for personal care products and general consumer articles marketed in the EU and UK.

• Maintain product regulatory files including declarations, test reports, safety documentation, and supporting compliance materials.

• Support product labeling documentation related to EU CLP requirements, including maintaining records of classifications, hazard statements, and Safety Data Sheets (SDS).

• Collect and maintain packaging data required for EPR reporting, including packaging material composition, weights, packaging categories, and market placement volumes.

• Coordinate with internal teams and suppliers to obtain required compliance documentation.

• Support regulatory reporting, documentation preparation, and compliance audits.

 

Please send your resume.

title: Affiliate Manager
description:
Job Description:



Full-Time | Work From Home | Ecommerce & Influencer Partnerships



SRI Labs is a fast-growing, premium beauty & wellness ecommerce brand known for high-end skincare, hair tools, and breakthrough consumer products. We’re looking for a driven, organized, and relationship-focused Affiliate Manager to lead and scale our affiliate program across platforms like ShopMy, Levanta, and key influencer networks.



If you love partnering with creators, optimizing affiliate performance, and helping a brand grow through relationships — this is the role for you.



What You’ll Do



As our Affiliate Manager, you will own the entire affiliate ecosystem and work directly with the CEO and marketing leadership team to scale creator-led revenue.



Key Responsibilities



Manage and optimize SRI Labs’ affiliate program across ShopMy, Levanta, and other affiliate platforms.

Recruit, vet, and onboard new affiliates, creators, and influencers that align with our brand.

Build strong long-term relationships with partners to drive consistent revenue and brand growth.

Track performance, payouts, ROI, and ensure all affiliates are supported with assets, codes, and campaigns.

Coordinate affiliate-driven launches, seasonal promotions, and strategic campaigns.

Identify top performers and build incentive strategies to maximize their output.

Maintain reporting dashboards and communicate results to leadership weekly.

Collaborate with internal marketing, product, design, and operations teams to support affiliate needs.

Continuously test new platforms, creators, strategies, and incentives to grow revenue.

Who You Are



We’re looking for someone who is:



Based in the Philippines

Experienced in affiliate, influencer marketing, or digital partnerships (1–3+ years preferred).

Organized, reliable, and able to manage many creators and campaigns at once.

Strong at relationship-building — someone affiliates love to work with.

Comfortable working within platforms like ShopMy, Levanta, Impact, or similar tools.

Data-driven with excellent follow-through and communication skills.

Hungry, proactive, and passionate about helping a brand grow.

Why Join SRI Labs?



Remote work

Work directly with a high-performing founding team

Competitive salary based on experience

Long-term growth potential within a fast-scaling ecommerce company

Supportive, positive culture built around speed, innovation, and passion for great products

title: Appointment Setting Virtual Assistant (Medicare) Part-Time : Grow to Full-Time | Strong English Required
description:
We are hiring a dedicated Appointment Setting Virtual Assistant with excellent spoken English to support licensed Medicare agents and agencies in the United States.

Your primary responsibility will be booking qualified appointments with individuals turning 65 or currently on Medicare who have requested information about their coverage options.

This role is heavily phone-based. We need someone whose English is clear, natural, and immediately comfortable for U.S. seniors — with a neutral or minimal accent, a warm tone, and a confident, professional phone presence.

This position starts part-time, with a clear and fast path to full-time hours for the right person. We are not looking for someone juggling multiple clients or treating this as a side job. We want a reliable, long-term tea
mber who is ready to grow with us. Show up, perform, and be consistent — and full-time stability will follow quickly.

Your main goal is simple: keep agents' calendars consistently filled with qualified appointments.



Responsibilities:



Make outbound calls to leads who have requested Medicare information

Handle inbound calls and convert them into booked appointments

Follow scripts naturally while sounding genuinely conversational

Professionally handle basic objections without being pushy

Schedule qualified appointments for licensed agents

Confirm appointments and send reminders

Follow up on missed calls and no-shows

Maintain accurate notes inside GoHighLevel (GHL) CRM

Identify leads that require additional follow-up

Ensure every interested prospect receives proper attention



This is a performance-driven, results-oriented role. Your success is measured in booked appointments and calendar consistency.



What We're Looking For:



Excellent spoken English — clear, natural, and confident on the phone with U.S. seniors

Neutral or minimal accent suitable for U.S. phone calls (non-negotiable)

Warm, professional, and composed phone presence

Comfortable handling objections without sounding scripted or pushy

Ability to follow a script while sounding like a real human conversation

Organized, detail-oriented, and self-motivated

Reliable high-speed internet connection

Quiet, distraction-free work environment for phone calls

Available during U.S. business hours

Committed to long-term employment — this is not a short-term or freelance role



Experience Preferred:



Appointment setting or call center background

Insurance or Medicare industry experience

Experience with GoHighLevel / GHL CRM





Compensation:



Competitive hourly rate based on experience

Clear and fast path from part-time to full-time hours

Performance incentives for strong appointment setters

Long-term opportunity with a stable, growing U.S. insurance team





 HOW TO APPLY — INCOMPLETE APPLICATIONS WILL NOT BE REVIEWED

To be considered, you must submit ALL THREE of the following:

1: Your Resume

Attach your updated resume in PDF or Word format.

2: Voice Recording (Required)

Your voice recording is the most important part of your application. This is how we evaluate your:



Spoken English clarity

Phone presence and tone

Confidence and conversational ability



 Record yourself at 
 (free, no account needed), then paste the link directly into your application.

Read the script below exactly as written. Speak naturally and conversationally — do not rush, and do not sound like you are reading. Pretend you are on a real call with a Medicare prospect. This is your audition.



"Hi, this is [Your Name] calling from Assistantly.

I'm reaching out because you recently requested information about your Medicare coverage options. I just wanted to follow up and help you schedule a quick call with one of our licensed agents who can walk you through your benefits and answer any questions you may have.

This consultation is completely free, and there's no obligation. It typically takes about 15 to 20 minutes.

Would mornings or afternoons work better for you?

Perfect — I'll go ahead and schedule that for you. You'll receive a confirmation and reminder before the appointment.

We look forward to speaking with you soon. Have a great day!"



3. Attention Check

At the very beginning of your application message, write the word:

CALENDAR

This confirms you read the full posting. Applications missing this word will not be opened.

 Applications without a resume AND a voice recording will be automatically disqualified — no exceptions.



If you are confident on the phone, enjoy connecting with people, and are looking for a long-term opportunity to grow with a stable U.S. team — we would love to hear from you.

Apply today.

title: Technical Writer
description:
A US-based consulting company is looking to hire a hard-working and self-motivated Filipino Technical Writer to create and document processes and procedures for our clients. Impeccable mastery of the English language (both written and verbal) is a must. 



This role is 100% work from home.



Your responsibilities will include but not be limited to:



• Map process flows based on a recording of the consultant interviewing the client. This includes creating flow charts and diagrams. 

• Write high-quality, clear, easy-to-understand step-by-step procedures based on a recording of an interview of a client or videos submitted directly by clients on how they perform certain tasks.

• Organize the material in a cloud-based process documentation software or Learning Management System software. 

• Use videos, screenshots, links, etc to provide a balance between written material and demonstration of the material and to ensure full understanding. 

• Identify points of improvement and communicate it clearly to the consultant you are working with 

• Use our internal systems to communicate about their work and report daily on progress. 





About You:



• 3+ years of experience in technical writing, creating instructions, creating flow charts, process mapping, and process improvement background. 

• Ability to translate highly technical information into easily understandable information

• Very good understanding of the business world and high familiarity with common terms 

• Experience in process documentation and process improvement 

• Ability to duplicate what is said and translate it into writing

• Excellent mastery of the English language including grammar, punctuation and spelling. 

• Good mastery of MS Products (Word, Excel and PowerPoint) and Google suite 

• Detail-oriented, efficient and concise

• Ability to critical thinking and problem-solving





Compensation: 



• Competitive salary

• Training and mentorship

• Awesome culture and work-from-home set-up

• SSS, Philhealth, and Pag-ibig

• Healthcare (HMO)

• 13th Month Pay

• Paid incentive leave 

• Yearly performance review





How to apply:



Please fill out this application form: 
. We will only respond to candidates that meet the above qualifications.

description:

title: Digital Marketing VA (GoHighLevel Funnels, Meta/google/tiktok Ads, Video Editing & Automation)
description:
Job Description



We are looking for a highly skilled and proactive Virtual Assistant to help manage and grow our digital marketing systems.



This role combines funnel building, Meta Ads management, video editing, creative development, and automation.



You will work directly with the founder of a healthcare and functional medicine company that runs funnels, webinars, and social media content across multiple platforms.



We are looking for someone who understands marketing funnels, value stacking offers, and conversion-focused content, not just basic posting.



This is a long-term position with room to grow for the right person.



Responsibilities

GoHighLevel (GHL) Funnels & Automation

/SMS automation)

Conversion rate

Veed



or similar platforms

-style and viral-style content

LinkedIn

Webinar & Funnel Marketing

Required Skills



Applicants must have experience with:

You should also:

Highly preferred skills:

Work Hours

MUST WORK PST 10am-7pm

Your expected hourly rate

so we know you read the full job description.



About Us



We are a healthcare and functional medicine company focused on helping people improve their health through advanced treatment programs and personalized care.



Our marketing includes funnels, webinars, social media, and educational content, and we are looking for someone who can help support and grow these systems.

title: Video Editor
description:
About Us

We are MagicStar — a UAE-based home entertainment brand bringing premium audio and karaoke experiences to homes, gatherings, and events across the Middle East.

With over two decades of expertise in audio-visual products, we've built a reputation as one of the region's most trusted names in karaoke and home entertainment systems. From intimate family nights to corporate events, our products are designed to turn any space into a stage.

We work directly with leading manufacturers across Asia to bring you high-quality sound systems, wireless microphones, and entertainment solutions — at prices that make premium accessible.

Based in Dubai. Delivering across the UAE. Built for people who believe life is better when there's music in the room.



The Role

You will receive all content from us — raw footage, AI-generated video clips, product images, audio, and written briefs. You do not need to film anything or come up with creative ideas. We will also train you on AI tools to help generate and enhance content. Your job is to edit everything together into polished, high-converting Meta video ads.



What You'll Be Doing

Editing raw footage and AI-generated clips into short-form vertical video ads (9x16 format, 15–35 seconds) for
 and Instagram.

Reordering and recutting video sequences based on our performance data — we track exactly where viewers stop watching and will tell you precisely what to move, cut, or replace.

Adding on-screen text overlays at specific timestamps — price points, benefit callouts, CTAs — we will tell you exactly what to write and when it should appear.

Producing multiple variations of the same ad by swapping opening hooks and scenes for A/B testing.

Stitching together AI-generated content with real footage seamlessly so the final video looks and feels cohesive.

Basic colour correction, audio levelling, and ensuring clean cuts throughout.

Resizing and reformatting ads for different placements when needed (Stories, Reels, Feed).

Organising and maintaining a clean file library of all raw assets, finished ads, and versions.



Tools You Must Know

Video Editing:

CapCut Pro — our primary editing tool for fast short-form content

Adobe Premiere Pro — for more complex edits and sequencing

DaVinci Resolve — colour correction and grading

Image & Graphic Design:

Adobe Photoshop — for text overlays, thumbnails, and cleaning up visuals

Adobe Express or Canva Pro — for quick graphic elements and ad creatives

AI Tools (we will train you on these):

Runway ML — AI video generation and scene enhancement

ElevenLabs — AI voiceover if needed

CapCut AI features — auto-captions, background removal, AI transitions

File Management:

Google Drive — all assets and deliverables shared here

Frame.io or WeTransfer — for sending large files



Requirements

Minimum 2 years of video editing experience, specifically short-form vertical video for social media.

Strong proficiency in at least CapCut Pro and Adobe Premiere Pro — you will be tested.

Stable internet connection and a computer capable of running editing software without lag.

Able to follow detailed written and voice note briefs precisely — attention to detail is everything in this role.

Fast turnaround — first drafts within 24 hours of receiving a brief, revisions same day.

Comfortable learning and working with AI tools — we will guide you but you need to be tech-savvy and curious.



What We Provide

All raw content, footage, and assets — you will never need to film or source anything yourself.

Clear briefs every time — we tell you exactly what we need, why, and how.

Training on AI content generation tools so you can work faster and produce better output over time.

A long-term working relationship for the right person — we are growing and want someone who grows with us.



To Apply

Send your portfolio with 2–3 examples of short-form vertical video ads or social media content you have edited. Include the tools you used for each. Applications without a portfolio will not be reviewed.
